```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,349 @@
- 
+ // ===== 6.1 企業文化手冊管理 =====
+ 
+ // 企業文化核心價值
+ export interface CoreValue {
+   id: string;
+   name: string;
+   description: string;
+   icon: string;
+   behaviors: string[]; // 行為準則
+   order: number;
+ }
+ 
+ // 企業願景使命
+ export interface VisionMission {
+   vision: string;
+   mission: string;
+   coreValues: CoreValue[];
+   lastUpdated: Date;
+   version: string;
+ }
+ 
+ // 文化故事
+ export interface CultureStory {
+   id: string;
+   title: string;
+   content: string;
+   author: string;
+   authorDepartment: string;
+   authorAvatar?: string;
+   category: 'founder' | 'success' | 'teamwork' | 'innovation' | 'customer';
+   publishDate: Date;
+   likes: number;
+   views: number;
+   featured: boolean;
+ }
+ 
+ // 文化認同度調查
+ export interface CultureSurvey {
+   id: string;
+   title: string;
+   period: string;
+   status: 'draft' | 'active' | 'completed';
+   responseRate: number;
+   overallScore: number; // 1-5
+   dimensions: CultureDimension[];
+   startDate: Date;
+   endDate: Date;
+ }
+ 
+ export interface CultureDimension {
+   name: string;
+   score: number;
+   benchmark: number;
+   trend: 'up' | 'down' | 'stable';
+   items: { question: string; score: number }[];
+ }
+ 
+ // 文化指標
+ export interface CultureMetric {
+   id: string;
+   name: string;
+   value: number;
+   target: number;
+   unit: string;
+   trend: 'up' | 'down' | 'stable';
+   category: 'engagement' | 'retention' | 'satisfaction' | 'behavior';
+ }
+ 
+ // ===== 6.1 EAP 員工協助方案 =====
+ 
+ export type EAPServiceType = 'counseling' | 'health' | 'legal' | 'financial' | 'family';
+ export type BookingStatus = 'pending' | 'confirmed' | 'completed' | 'cancelled';
+ 
+ // EAP 服務項目
+ export interface EAPService {
+   id: string;
+   type: EAPServiceType;
+   name: string;
+   description: string;
+   icon: string;
+   provider: string;
+   annualQuota: number; // 年度免費額度
+   usedQuota: number;
+   available: boolean;
+ }
+ 
+ // EAP 預約記錄 (匿名)
+ export interface EAPBooking {
+   id: string;
+   anonymousCode: string; // 匿名代碼
+   serviceType: EAPServiceType;
+   scheduledDate: Date;
+   status: BookingStatus;
+   isAnonymous: boolean;
+ }
+ 
+ // EAP 使用統計 (去識別化)
+ export interface EAPUsageStats {
+   period: string;
+   totalUsage: number;
+   serviceBreakdown: { type: EAPServiceType; count: number; percentage: number }[];
+   departmentUsage: { department: string; rate: number }[]; // 使用率，非個人資料
+   satisfactionScore: number;
+   yearOverYearChange: number;
+ }
+ 
+ // 健康促進計畫
+ export interface HealthProgram {
+   id: string;
+   name: string;
+   type: 'workshop' | 'checkup' | 'fitness' | 'nutrition';
+   description: string;
+   schedule: Date;
+   capacity: number;
+   enrolled: number;
+   instructor?: string;
+ }
+ 
+ // 危機支援案例 (去識別化)
+ export interface CrisisSupport {
+   id: string;
+   type: 'illness' | 'accident' | 'bereavement' | 'other';
+   status: 'active' | 'resolved' | 'followup';
+   supportProvided: string[];
+   resolutionDate?: Date;
+ }
+ 
+ // ===== 6.2 獎項資料庫管理 =====
+ 
+ export type AwardCategory = 'hr' | 'sustainability' | 'innovation' | 'employer' | 'industry' | 'government';
+ export type AwardStatus = 'upcoming' | 'applying' | 'submitted' | 'won' | 'not-won' | 'missed';
+ 
+ // 獎項
+ export interface Award {
+   id: string;
+   name: string;
+   organizer: string;
+   category: AwardCategory;
+   description: string;
+   eligibility: string[];
+   applicationDeadline: Date;
+   announcementDate?: Date;
+   applicationFee?: number;
+   website: string;
+   status: AwardStatus;
+   priority: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
+   matchScore?: number; // AI 推薦匹配度
+   tags: string[];
+ }
+ 
+ // 獎項申請記錄
+ export interface AwardApplication {
+   id: string;
+   awardId: string;
+   awardName: string;
+   year: number;
+   status: AwardStatus;
+   submittedDate?: Date;
+   result?: 'won' | 'finalist' | 'not-won';
+   notes: string;
+   documents: string[];
+   assignee: string;
+ }
+ 
+ // ===== 6.3 文件儲存庫 =====
+ 
+ export type DocumentType = 'policy' | 'certificate' | 'report' | 'award' | 'training' | 'hr' | 'other';
+ export type DocumentStatus = 'draft' | 'active' | 'expired' | 'archived';
+ 
+ // 文件
+ export interface CultureDocument {
+   id: string;
+   name: string;
+   type: DocumentType;
+   category: string;
+   description: string;
+   filePath: string;
+   fileSize: number;
+   fileFormat: string;
+   version: string;
+   status: DocumentStatus;
+   tags: string[];
+   uploadedBy: string;
+   uploadedDate: Date;
+   expiryDate?: Date;
+   lastModified: Date;
+   accessLevel: 'public' | 'internal' | 'confidential';
+ }
+ 
+ // 文件版本
+ export interface DocumentVersion {
+   id: string;
+   documentId: string;
+   version: string;
+   changes: string;
+   modifiedBy: string;
+   modifiedDate: Date;
+   filePath: string;
+ }
+ 
+ // ===== 6.4 AI 申請助理 =====
+ 
+ // AI 申請檢核表
+ export interface ApplicationChecklist {
+   id: string;
+   awardId: string;
+   awardName: string;
+   items: ChecklistItem[];
+   completionRate: number;
+   generatedDate: Date;
+ }
+ 
+ export interface ChecklistItem {
+   id: string;
+   category: string;
+   requirement: string;
+   status: 'pending' | 'in-progress' | 'completed' | 'not-applicable';
+   sourceModule?: string; // 資料來源模組 (L1-L6)
+   autoFilled: boolean;
+   value?: string;
+   documents: string[];
+   notes: string;
+ }
+ 
+ // AI 生成內容
+ export interface AIGeneratedContent {
+   id: string;
+   type: 'highlight' | 'summary' | 'case-study' | 'achievement';
+   title: string;
+   content: string;
+   sourceData: string[]; // 引用的資料來源
+   generatedDate: Date;
+   status: 'draft' | 'reviewed' | 'approved';
+   editedContent?: string;
+ }
+ 
+ // 簡報輸出
+ export interface PresentationExport {
+   id: string;
+   title: string;
+   format: 'ppt' | 'pdf' | 'keynote';
+   sections: string[];
+   generatedDate: Date;
+   downloadUrl: string;
+ }
+ 
+ // ===== 6.5 智慧文件分析 =====
+ 
+ export type RiskLevel = 'low' | 'medium' | 'high' | 'critical';
+ 
+ // 文件缺漏
+ export interface DocumentGap {
+   id: string;
+   category: string;
+   requiredDocument: string;
+   status: 'missing' | 'expired' | 'outdated' | 'incomplete';
+   severity: RiskLevel;
+   responsiblePerson: string;
+   dueDate: Date;
+   recommendation: string;
+ }
+ 
+ // 合規風險
+ export interface ComplianceRisk {
+   id: string;
+   area: string;
+   description: string;
+   riskLevel: RiskLevel;
+   relatedDocuments: string[];
+   actionRequired: string;
+   deadline: Date;
+   status: 'open' | 'in-progress' | 'resolved';
+ }
+ 
+ // 文件品質評估
+ export interface DocumentQuality {
+   documentId: string;
+   documentName: string;
+   completenessScore: number; // 0-100
+   accuracyScore: number;
+   freshnessScore: number;
+   overallScore: number;
+   issues: { type: string; description: string; severity: RiskLevel }[];
+   lastAssessed: Date;
+ }
+ 
+ // ===== 6.6 影響力評估引擎 =====
+ 
+ // 影響力指標
+ export interface ImpactMetric {
+   id: string;
+   name: string;
+   category: 'performance' | 'talent' | 'culture' | 'business';
+   value: number;
+   previousValue: number;
+   target: number;
+   unit: string;
+   sourceModules: string[];
+   trend: 'up' | 'down' | 'stable';
+ }
+ 
+ // 報獎潛力評估
+ export interface AwardPotential {
+   awardId: string;
+   awardName: string;
+   potentialScore: number; // 0-100
+   strengths: string[];
+   gaps: string[];
+   recommendedActions: string[];
+   estimatedEffort: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high';
+   successProbability: number;
+ }
+ 
+ // 文化影響力報告
+ export interface CultureImpactReport {
+   period: string;
+   overallImpactScore: number;
+   dimensions: {
+     name: string;
+     score: number;
+     impact: string;
+     metrics: ImpactMetric[];
+   }[];
+   eapImpact: {
+     usageRate: number;
+     productivityImprovement: number;
+     turnoverReduction: number;
+     roi: number;
+   };
+   recommendations: string[];
+   generatedDate: Date;
+ }
+ 
+ // 成果摘要
+ export interface HighlightSummary {
+   id: string;
+   title: string;
+   period: string;
+   highlights: {
+     category: string;
+     title: string;
+     description: string;
+     metrics: { label: string; value: string }[];
+     sourceModule: string;
+   }[];
+   generatedDate: Date;
+   exportFormats: string[];
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
+ import { Routes } from '@angular/router';
+ 
+ export const CULTURE_ROUTES: Routes = [
+   {
+     path: '',
+     redirectTo: 'handbook',
+     pathMatch: 'full'
+   },
+   {
+     path: 'handbook',
+     loadComponent: () =&gt; import('./pages/culture-handbook-page/culture-handbook-page.component')
+       .then(m =&gt; m.CultureHandbookPageComponent)
+   },
+   {
+     path: 'eap',
+     loadComponent: () =&gt; import('./pages/eap-page/eap-page.component')
+       .then(m =&gt; m.EapPageComponent)
+   },
+   {
+     path: 'awards',
+     loadComponent: () =&gt; import('./pages/awards-page/awards-page.component')
+       .then(m =&gt; m.AwardsPageComponent)
+   },
+   {
+     path: 'documents',
+     loadComponent: () =&gt; import('./pages/document-repository-page/document-repository-page.component')
+       .then(m =&gt; m.DocumentRepositoryPageComponent)
+   },
+   {
+     path: 'ai-assistant',
+     loadComponent: () =&gt; import('./pages/ai-assistant-page/ai-assistant-page.component')
+       .then(m =&gt; m.AiAssistantPageComponent)
+   },
+   {
+     path: 'analysis',
+     loadComponent: () =&gt; import('./pages/document-analysis-page/document-analysis-page.component')
+       .then(m =&gt; m.DocumentAnalysisPageComponent)
+   },
+   {
+     path: 'impact',
+     loadComponent: () =&gt; import('./pages/impact-assessment-page/impact-assessment-page.component')
+       .then(m =&gt; m.ImpactAssessmentPageComponent)
+   }
+ ];
+
```

```diff
+ import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
+ import { Observable, of, delay } from 'rxjs';
+ import {
+   VisionMission,
+   CultureStory,
+   CultureSurvey,
+   CultureMetric,
+   EAPService,
+   EAPUsageStats,
+   HealthProgram,
+   Award,
+   AwardApplication,
+   CultureDocument,
+   DocumentGap,
+   ComplianceRisk,
+   AwardPotential,
+   CultureImpactReport,
+   HighlightSummary,
+   ApplicationChecklist
+ } from '../models/culture.model';
+ 
+ @Injectable({
+   providedIn: 'root'
+ })
+ export class CultureService {
+ 
+   // ===== 6.1 企業文化手冊 =====
+ 
+   getVisionMission(): Observable&lt;VisionMission&gt; {
+     return of({
+       vision: '成為亞太區最具創新力的人資科技領導者，引領企業邁向智慧人才管理新時代',
+       mission: '透過科技創新與人性化設計，協助企業建立高效能、高幸福感的工作環境，實現人才與組織的共同成長',
+       coreValues: [
+         { id: '1', name: '創新', description: '勇於突破，持續創新', icon: 'ri-lightbulb-flash-line', behaviors: ['主動提出改善方案', '擁抱變化與新技術', '鼓勵實驗與試錯'], order: 1 },
+         { id: '2', name: '誠信', description: '誠實正直，言行一致', icon: 'ri-shield-check-line', behaviors: ['信守承諾', '透明溝通', '勇於承擔責任'], order: 2 },
+         { id: '3', name: '協作', description: '團隊合作，共創價值', icon: 'ri-team-line', behaviors: ['跨部門協作', '分享知識與經驗', '尊重多元觀點'], order: 3 },
+         { id: '4', name: '卓越', description: '追求卓越，超越期待', icon: 'ri-trophy-line', behaviors: ['設定高標準', '持續學習成長', '交付高品質成果'], order: 4 },
+         { id: '5', name: '關懷', description: '以人為本，關懷員工', icon: 'ri-heart-line', behaviors: ['傾聽員工聲音', '支持工作生活平衡', '營造包容環境'], order: 5 }
+       ],
+       lastUpdated: new Date('2024-01-15'),
+       version: '3.0'
+     }).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   getCultureStories(): Observable&lt;CultureStory[]&gt; {
+     return of([
+       { id: '1', title: '從挫折到成功：我們的創業故事', content: '十年前，三位創辦人在一間小公寓開始了這段旅程...', author: '創辦人 張志明', authorDepartment: '董事會', category: 'founder', publishDate: new Date('2024-01-10'), likes: 256, views: 1520, featured: true },
+       { id: '2', title: '跨部門協作的力量', content: '當研發、業務與客服攜手合作，我們完成了看似不可能的任務...', author: '王小華', authorDepartment: '研發部', category: 'teamwork', publishDate: new Date('2024-03-15'), likes: 89, views: 456, featured: false },
+       { id: '3', title: '客戶成功就是我們的成功', content: '那天客戶打來的感謝電話，讓我深刻體會到工作的意義...', author: '李美玲', authorDepartment: '客戶成功部', category: 'customer', publishDate: new Date('2024-05-20'), likes: 124, views: 678, featured: true },
+       { id: '4', title: '一個大膽的想法如何改變產品方向', content: '在一次腦力激盪會議中，新人提出的點子徹底改變了我們的產品策略...', author: '陳大文', authorDepartment: '產品部', category: 'innovation', publishDate: new Date('2024-06-08'), likes: 156, views: 890, featured: false },
+     ]).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   getCultureSurveys(): Observable&lt;CultureSurvey[]&gt; {
+     return of([
+       {
+         id: '1', title: '2024 Q4 文化認同度調查', period: '2024 Q4', status: 'completed', responseRate: 87,
+         overallScore: 4.2,
+         dimensions: [
+           { name: '核心價值認同', score: 4.5, benchmark: 4.0, trend: 'up', items: [] },
+           { name: '管理信任度', score: 4.1, benchmark: 3.8, trend: 'stable', items: [] },
+           { name: '團隊協作', score: 4.3, benchmark: 4.0, trend: 'up', items: [] },
+           { name: '創新氛圍', score: 3.9, benchmark: 3.7, trend: 'up', items: [] },
+           { name: '職涯發展', score: 4.0, benchmark: 3.9, trend: 'stable', items: [] }
+         ],
+         startDate: new Date('2024-12-01'), endDate: new Date('2024-12-15')
+       }
+     ]).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   getCultureMetrics(): Observable&lt;CultureMetric[]&gt; {
+     return of([
+       { id: '1', name: '員工淨推薦值 (eNPS)', value: 42, target: 40, unit: '', trend: 'up', category: 'engagement' },
+       { id: '2', name: '員工留任率', value: 92, target: 90, unit: '%', trend: 'stable', category: 'retention' },
+       { id: '3', name: '員工滿意度', value: 4.2, target: 4.0, unit: '/5', trend: 'up', category: 'satisfaction' },
+       { id: '4', name: '文化行為實踐率', value: 78, target: 80, unit: '%', trend: 'up', category: 'behavior' },
+       { id: '5', name: '內部轉調成功率', value: 85, target: 80, unit: '%', trend: 'up', category: 'engagement' },
+       { id: '6', name: '新人文化融入率', value: 88, target: 85, unit: '%', trend: 'stable', category: 'behavior' }
+     ]).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   // ===== 6.1 EAP =====
```

<details><summary>Tool use: **write** • Edit file: /Users/alifrt/Desktop/Bombus/bombus-system/src/app/features/culture/pages/culture-handbook-page/culture-handbook-page.component.ts</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 108, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,108 @@
- 
+ import { Component, ChangeDetectionStrategy, signal, inject, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
+ import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
+ import { HeaderComponent } from '../../../../shared/components/header/header.component';
+ import { CultureService } from '../../services/culture.service';
+ import { VisionMission, CultureStory, CultureSurvey, CultureMetric } from '../../models/culture.model';
+ 
+ @Component({
+   standalone: true,
+   selector: 'app-culture-handbook-page',
+   templateUrl: './culture-handbook-page.component.html',
+   styleUrl: './culture-handbook-page.component.scss',
+   imports: [CommonModule, HeaderComponent],
+   changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
+ })
+ export class CultureHandbookPageComponent implements OnInit {
+   private cultureService = inject(CultureService);
+ 
+   // State
+   loading = signal(true);
+   visionMission = signal&lt;VisionMission | null&gt;(null);
+   stories = signal&lt;CultureStory[]&gt;([]);
+   surveys = signal&lt;CultureSurvey[]&gt;([]);
+   metrics = signal&lt;CultureMetric[]&gt;([]);
+ 
+   // UI State
+   selectedValueId = signal&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
+   activeTab = signal&lt;'vision' | 'stories' | 'metrics'&gt;('vision');
+ 
+   ngOnInit(): void {
+     this.loadData();
+   }
+ 
+   loadData(): void {
+     this.loading.set(true);
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getVisionMission().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.visionMission.set(data);
+     });
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getCultureStories().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.stories.set(data);
+     });
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getCultureSurveys().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.surveys.set(data);
+     });
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getCultureMetrics().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.metrics.set(data);
+       this.loading.set(false);
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   setActiveTab(tab: 'vision' | 'stories' | 'metrics'): void {
+     this.activeTab.set(tab);
+   }
+ 
+   selectValue(id: string): void {
+     this.selectedValueId.set(this.selectedValueId() === id ? null : id);
+   }
+ 
+   getCategoryLabel(category: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'founder': '創辦故事',
+       'success': '成功案例',
+       'teamwork': '團隊合作',
+       'innovation': '創新突破',
+       'customer': '客戶導向'
+     };
+     return labels[category] || category;
+   }
+ 
+   getCategoryIcon(category: string): string {
+     const icons: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'founder': 'ri-star-line',
+       'success': 'ri-trophy-line',
+       'teamwork': 'ri-team-line',
+       'innovation': 'ri-lightbulb-flash-line',
+       'customer': 'ri-customer-service-2-line'
+     };
+     return icons[category] || 'ri-article-line';
+   }
+ 
+   getMetricCategoryLabel(category: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'engagement': '參與度',
+       'retention': '留任',
+       'satisfaction': '滿意度',
+       'behavior': '行為'
+     };
+     return labels[category] || category;
+   }
+ 
+   getTrendIcon(trend: string): string {
+     const icons: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'up': 'ri-arrow-up-line',
+       'down': 'ri-arrow-down-line',
+       'stable': 'ri-subtract-line'
+     };
+     return icons[trend] || 'ri-subtract-line';
+   }
+ 
+   getLatestSurvey(): CultureSurvey | null {
+     const list = this.surveys();
+     return list.length &gt; 0 ? list[0] : null;
+   }
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,269 @@

+ &lt;app-header
+   [title]="'企業文化手冊'"
+   [subtitle]="'願景使命 · 核心價值 · 文化故事'"
+   [showBreadcrumb]="true"
+   [breadcrumbItems]="[
+     { label: '首頁', link: '/' },
+     { label: '文化管理', link: '/culture' },
+     { label: '企業文化手冊' }
+   ]"
+ /&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;main class="handbook-page"&gt;
+   &lt;!-- 頁籤導航 --&gt;
+   &lt;nav class="page-tabs"&gt;
+     &lt;button
+       class="tab-btn"
+       [class.active]="activeTab() === 'vision'"
+       (click)="setActiveTab('vision')"
+     &gt;
+       &lt;i class="ri-focus-3-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+       願景與價值
+     &lt;/button&gt;
+     &lt;button
+       class="tab-btn"
+       [class.active]="activeTab() === 'stories'"
+       (click)="setActiveTab('stories')"
+     &gt;
+       &lt;i class="ri-book-open-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+       文化故事
+     &lt;/button&gt;
+     &lt;button
+       class="tab-btn"
+       [class.active]="activeTab() === 'metrics'"
+       (click)="setActiveTab('metrics')"
+     &gt;
+       &lt;i class="ri-bar-chart-grouped-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+       文化指標
+     &lt;/button&gt;
+   &lt;/nav&gt;
+ 
+   &lt;!-- 願景與價值 --&gt;
+   @if (activeTab() === 'vision') {
+     &lt;div class="vision-section"&gt;
+       &lt;!-- 願景使命卡片 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="vision-mission-card"&gt;
+         &lt;div class="vm-header"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="vm-badge"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-compass-3-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             企業方向
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           @if (visionMission()) {
+             &lt;span class="version-tag"&gt;v{{ visionMission()?.version }}&lt;/span&gt;
+           }
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         @if (visionMission()) {
+           &lt;div class="vm-content"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="vm-item vision"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="vm-label"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-eye-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 願景 Vision
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;p class="vm-text"&gt;{{ visionMission()?.vision }}&lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="vm-divider"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="vm-item mission"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="vm-label"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-rocket-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 使命 Mission
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;p class="vm-text"&gt;{{ visionMission()?.mission }}&lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         }
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 核心價值觀 --&gt;
+       &lt;section class="values-section"&gt;
+         &lt;h2 class="section-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-heart-3-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           核心價值觀
+         &lt;/h2&gt;
+ 
+         &lt;div class="values-grid"&gt;
+           @for (value of visionMission()?.coreValues; track value.id) {
+             &lt;div
+               class="value-card"
+               [class.expanded]="selectedValueId() === value.id"
+               (click)="selectValue(value.id)"
+             &gt;
+               &lt;div class="value-header"&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="value-icon"&gt;
+                   &lt;i [class]="value.icon"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="value-info"&gt;
+                   &lt;h3 class="value-name"&gt;{{ value.name }}&lt;/h3&gt;
+                   &lt;p class="value-desc"&gt;{{ value.description }}&lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="expand-icon ri-arrow-down-s-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               @if (selectedValueId() === value.id) {
+                 &lt;div class="value-behaviors"&gt;
+                   &lt;h4&gt;行為準則&lt;/h4&gt;
+                   &lt;ul&gt;
+                     @for (behavior of value.behaviors; track behavior) {
+                       &lt;li&gt;
+                         &lt;i class="ri-checkbox-circle-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                         {{ behavior }}
+                       &lt;/li&gt;
+                     }
+                   &lt;/ul&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               }
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           }
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/section&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 文化認同度調查摘要 --&gt;
+       @if (getLatestSurvey()) {
+         &lt;section class="survey-summary"&gt;
+           &lt;h2 class="section-title"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-pie-chart-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             最新文化認同調查
+           &lt;/h2&gt;
+ 
+           &lt;div class="survey-card"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="survey-header"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="survey-info"&gt;
+                 &lt;h3&gt;{{ getLatestSurvey()?.title }}&lt;/h3&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="survey-period"&gt;{{ getLatestSurvey()?.period }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div class="survey-score"&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="score-value"&gt;{{ getLatestSurvey()?.overallScore }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="score-max"&gt;/5&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="survey-stats"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="stat-item"&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="stat-label"&gt;回覆率&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="stat-value"&gt;{{ getLatestSurvey()?.responseRate }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="dimensions-chart"&gt;
+               @for (dim of getLatestSurvey()?.dimensions; track dim.name) {
+                 &lt;div class="dimension-row"&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="dim-info"&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="dim-name"&gt;{{ dim.name }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="dim-score"&gt;{{ dim.score }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="dim-bar-wrapper"&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="dim-bar" [style.width.%]="(dim.score / 5) * 100"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="dim-benchmark" [style.left.%]="(dim.benchmark / 5) * 100"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;i [class]="getTrendIcon(dim.trend)" [class.trend-up]="dim.trend === 'up'" [class.trend-down]="dim.trend === 'down'"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               }
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/section&gt;
+       }
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   }
+ 
+   &lt;!-- 文化故事 --&gt;
+   @if (activeTab() === 'stories') {
+     &lt;div class="stories-section"&gt;
+       &lt;div class="stories-header"&gt;
+         &lt;h2 class="section-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-quill-pen-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           我們的故事
+         &lt;/h2&gt;
+         &lt;button class="btn-add-story"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-add-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           分享故事
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 精選故事 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="featured-stories"&gt;
+         @for (story of stories(); track story.id) {
+           @if (story.featured) {
+             &lt;article class="story-card featured"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="story-category"&gt;
+                 &lt;i [class]="getCategoryIcon(story.category)"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 {{ getCategoryLabel(story.category) }}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;h3 class="story-title"&gt;{{ story.title }}&lt;/h3&gt;
+               &lt;p class="story-excerpt"&gt;{{ story.content }}&lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;div class="story-meta"&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="story-author"&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="author-avatar"&gt;
+                     &lt;i class="ri-user-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="author-info"&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="author-name"&gt;{{ story.author }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="author-dept"&gt;{{ story.authorDepartment }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="story-stats"&gt;
+                   &lt;span&gt;&lt;i class="ri-heart-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; {{ story.likes }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;span&gt;&lt;i class="ri-eye-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; {{ story.views }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/article&gt;
+           }
+         }
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 所有故事 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="all-stories"&gt;
+         @for (story of stories(); track story.id) {
+           @if (!story.featured) {
+             &lt;article class="story-card"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="story-category"&gt;
+                 &lt;i [class]="getCategoryIcon(story.category)"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 {{ getCategoryLabel(story.category) }}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;h3 class="story-title"&gt;{{ story.title }}&lt;/h3&gt;
+               &lt;p class="story-excerpt"&gt;{{ story.content }}&lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;div class="story-meta"&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="author-name"&gt;{{ story.author }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="story-stats"&gt;
+                   &lt;span&gt;&lt;i class="ri-heart-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; {{ story.likes }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/article&gt;
+           }
+         }
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   }
+ 
+   &lt;!-- 文化指標 --&gt;
+   @if (activeTab() === 'metrics') {
+     &lt;div class="metrics-section"&gt;
+       &lt;h2 class="section-title"&gt;
+         &lt;i class="ri-dashboard-3-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+         文化指標儀表板
+       &lt;/h2&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;div class="metrics-grid"&gt;
+         @for (metric of metrics(); track metric.id) {
+           &lt;div class="metric-card" [attr.data-category]="metric.category"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="metric-header"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="metric-category"&gt;{{ getMetricCategoryLabel(metric.category) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;i [class]="getTrendIcon(metric.trend)" [class.trend-up]="metric.trend === 'up'" [class.trend-down]="metric.trend === 'down'"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="metric-value"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="value"&gt;{{ metric.value }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="unit"&gt;{{ metric.unit }}&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="metric-name"&gt;{{ metric.name }}&lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="metric-target"&gt;
+               目標: {{ metric.target }}{{ metric.unit }}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="metric-progress"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="progress-bar" [style.width.%]="(metric.value / metric.target) * 100"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         }
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   }
+ &lt;/main&gt;
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,715 @@
- 
+ @use '../../../../styles/variables' as *;
+ 
+ .handbook-page {
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   padding-top: calc(var(--header-height) + $spacing-lg);
+   min-height: 100vh;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ // 頁籤導航
+ .page-tabs {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   padding: $spacing-xs;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .tab-btn {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   padding: $spacing-sm $spacing-md;
+   border: none;
+   background: transparent;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.1rem;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     background: $color-cloud-gray;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.active {
+     background: $color-l6-olive;
+     color: $color-pure-white;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 願景使命卡片
+ .vision-mission-card {
+   background: linear-gradient(135deg, $color-l6-olive 0%, darken($color-l6-olive, 10%) 100%);
+   border-radius: $radius-xl;
+   padding: $spacing-xl;
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+   position: relative;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ 
+   &amp;::before {
+     content: '';
+     position: absolute;
+     top: -50%;
+     right: -20%;
+     width: 60%;
+     height: 200%;
+     background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
+     pointer-events: none;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .vm-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .vm-badge {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
+   padding: $spacing-xs $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1rem;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .version-tag {
+   background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
+   padding: 2px $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .vm-content {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+   align-items: stretch;
+ }
+ 
+ .vm-item {
+   position: relative;
+   z-index: 1;
+ }
+ 
+ .vm-label {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   opacity: 0.9;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+   text-transform: uppercase;
+   letter-spacing: 1px;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.1rem;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .vm-text {
+   font-size: $font-size-lg;
+   line-height: 1.6;
+   margin: 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .vm-divider {
+   width: 1px;
+   background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
+ }
+ 
+ // 核心價值觀
+ .values-section {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .section-title {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   font-size: $font-size-lg;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .values-grid {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .value-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.3s ease;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     transform: translateY(-2px);
+     box-shadow: $shadow-md;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.expanded {
+     .expand-icon {
+       transform: rotate(180deg);
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .value-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .value-icon {
+   width: 48px;
+   height: 48px;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.1) 0%, rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.2) 100%);
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   flex-shrink: 0;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.5rem;
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .value-info {
+   flex: 1;
+   min-width: 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .value-name {
+   font-size: $font-size-md;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0 0 4px;
+ }
+ 
+ .value-desc {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   margin: 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .expand-icon {
+   color: $color-text-tertiary;
+   font-size: 1.25rem;
+   transition: transform 0.3s ease;
+ }
+ 
+ .value-behaviors {
+   margin-top: $spacing-md;
+   padding-top: $spacing-md;
+   border-top: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+   animation: slideDown 0.3s ease;
+ 
+   h4 {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+     margin: 0 0 $spacing-sm;
+   }
+ 
+   ul {
+     list-style: none;
+     padding: 0;
+     margin: 0;
+   }
+ 
+   li {
+     display: flex;
+     align-items: center;
+     gap: $spacing-sm;
+     padding: $spacing-xs 0;
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+ 
+     i {
+       color: $color-l6-olive;
+       font-size: 1rem;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ @keyframes slideDown {
+   from {
+     opacity: 0;
+     max-height: 0;
+   }
+   to {
+     opacity: 1;
+     max-height: 200px;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 調查摘要
+ .survey-summary {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .survey-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .survey-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .survey-info {
+   h3 {
+     font-size: $font-size-md;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     margin: 0 0 4px;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .survey-period {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .survey-score {
+   text-align: right;
+ }
+ 
+ .score-value {
+   font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+   font-style: italic;
+   font-size: 2.5rem;
+   font-weight: 700;
+   color: $color-l6-olive;
+ }
+ 
+ .score-max {
+   font-size: $font-size-lg;
+   color: $color-text-tertiary;
+ }
+ 
+ .survey-stats {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+   padding-bottom: $spacing-md;
+   border-bottom: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ .stat-item {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: 4px;
+ }
+ 
+ .stat-label {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .stat-value {
+   font-size: $font-size-lg;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+ }
+ 
+ .dimensions-chart {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .dimension-row {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .dim-info {
+   display: flex;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   width: 140px;
+   flex-shrink: 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .dim-name {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+ }
+ 
+ .dim-score {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-l6-olive;
+ }
+ 
+ .dim-bar-wrapper {
+   flex: 1;
+   height: 8px;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   position: relative;
+ }
+ 
+ .dim-bar {
+   height: 100%;
+   background: linear-gradient(90deg, $color-l6-olive, lighten($color-l6-olive, 10%));
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   transition: width 0.5s ease;
+ }
+ 
+ .dim-benchmark {
+   position: absolute;
+   top: -4px;
+   width: 2px;
+   height: 16px;
+   background: $color-text-tertiary;
+ 
+   &amp;::after {
+     content: '基準';
+     position: absolute;
+     top: -20px;
+     left: 50%;
+     transform: translateX(-50%);
+     font-size: 10px;
+     color: $color-text-tertiary;
+     white-space: nowrap;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .trend-up {
+   color: $color-success;
+ }
+ 
+ .trend-down {
+   color: $color-error;
+ }
+ 
+ // 文化故事
+ .stories-section {
+   .stories-header {
+     display: flex;
+     align-items: center;
+     justify-content: space-between;
+     margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-add-story {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   padding: $spacing-sm $spacing-md;
+   background: $color-l6-olive;
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   border: none;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     background: darken($color-l6-olive, 8%);
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .featured-stories {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(400px, 1fr));
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .all-stories {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .story-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+   transition: all 0.3s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     transform: translateY(-2px);
+     box-shadow: $shadow-md;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.featured {
+     background: linear-gradient(135deg, $color-pure-white 0%, rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.05) 100%);
+     border: 1px solid rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.2);
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .story-category {
+   display: inline-flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   background: rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.1);
+   color: $color-l6-olive;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .story-title {
+   font-size: $font-size-md;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-sm;
+   line-height: 1.4;
+ }
+ 
+ .story-excerpt {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   line-height: 1.6;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-md;
+   display: -webkit-box;
+   -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
+   -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ }
+ 
+ .story-meta {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+ }
+ 
+ .story-author {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .author-avatar {
+   width: 36px;
+   height: 36px;
+   border-radius: 50%;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: $color-text-tertiary;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .author-info {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+ }
+ 
+ .author-name {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+ }
+ 
+ .author-dept {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .story-stats {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   span {
+     display: flex;
+     align-items: center;
+     gap: 4px;
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     color: $color-text-tertiary;
+ 
+     i {
+       font-size: 1rem;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 文化指標
+ .metrics-section {
+   .metrics-grid {
+     display: grid;
+     grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(240px, 1fr));
+     gap: $spacing-md;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .metric-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+   position: relative;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ 
+   &amp;::before {
+     content: '';
+     position: absolute;
+     top: 0;
+     left: 0;
+     right: 0;
+     height: 4px;
+     background: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-category="engagement"]::before {
+     background: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-category="retention"]::before {
+     background: $color-l3-petrol;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-category="satisfaction"]::before {
+     background: $color-l5-terracotta;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-category="behavior"]::before {
+     background: $color-l4-slate;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .metric-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .metric-category {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   text-transform: uppercase;
+   letter-spacing: 0.5px;
+ }
+ 
+ .metric-value {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-xs;
+ 
+   .value {
+     font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+     font-style: italic;
+     font-size: 2rem;
+     font-weight: 700;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+   }
+ 
+   .unit {
+     font-size: $font-size-md;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .metric-name {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .metric-target {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-tertiary;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .metric-progress {
+   height: 4px;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ 
+   .progress-bar {
+     height: 100%;
+     background: $color-l6-olive;
+     border-radius: $radius-full;
+     transition: width 0.5s ease;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 響應式
+ @media (max-width: 768px) {
+   .handbook-page {
+     padding: $spacing-md;
+     padding-top: calc(var(--header-height) + $spacing-md);
+   }
+ 
+   .page-tabs {
+     flex-wrap: wrap;
+   }
+ 
+   .vm-content {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+     gap: $spacing-md;
+   }
+ 
+   .vm-divider {
+     width: 100%;
+     height: 1px;
+   }
+ 
+   .featured-stories {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ 
+   .all-stories {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ 
+   .values-grid {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ 
+   .metrics-grid {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

<details><summary>Tool use: **write** • Edit file: /Users/alifrt/Desktop/Bombus/bombus-system/src/app/features/culture/pages/eap-page/eap-page.component.ts</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 120, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,120 @@
- 
+ import { Component, ChangeDetectionStrategy, signal, inject, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
+ import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
+ import { HeaderComponent } from '../../../../shared/components/header/header.component';
+ import { CultureService } from '../../services/culture.service';
+ import { EAPService, EAPUsageStats, HealthProgram } from '../../models/culture.model';
+ 
+ @Component({
+   standalone: true,
+   selector: 'app-eap-page',
+   templateUrl: './eap-page.component.html',
+   styleUrl: './eap-page.component.scss',
+   imports: [CommonModule, HeaderComponent],
+   changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
+ })
+ export class EapPageComponent implements OnInit {
+   private cultureService = inject(CultureService);
+ 
+   // State
+   loading = signal(true);
+   services = signal&lt;EAPService[]&gt;([]);
+   usageStats = signal&lt;EAPUsageStats | null&gt;(null);
+   healthPrograms = signal&lt;HealthProgram[]&gt;([]);
+ 
+   // UI State
+   showBookingModal = signal(false);
+   selectedService = signal&lt;EAPService | null&gt;(null);
+ 
+   ngOnInit(): void {
+     this.loadData();
+   }
+ 
+   loadData(): void {
+     this.loading.set(true);
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getEAPServices().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.services.set(data);
+     });
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getEAPUsageStats().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.usageStats.set(data);
+     });
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getHealthPrograms().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.healthPrograms.set(data);
+       this.loading.set(false);
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   getServiceIcon(type: string): string {
+     const icons: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'counseling': 'ri-mental-health-line',
+       'health': 'ri-heart-pulse-line',
+       'legal': 'ri-scales-3-line',
+       'financial': 'ri-money-dollar-circle-line',
+       'family': 'ri-home-heart-line'
+     };
+     return icons[type] || 'ri-service-line';
+   }
+ 
+   getServiceLabel(type: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'counseling': '心理諮商',
+       'health': '健康諮詢',
+       'legal': '法律諮詢',
+       'financial': '財務規劃',
+       'family': '家庭諮詢'
+     };
+     return labels[type] || type;
+   }
+ 
+   getProgramTypeLabel(type: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'workshop': '工作坊',
+       'checkup': '健康檢查',
+       'fitness': '健身課程',
+       'nutrition': '營養講座'
+     };
+     return labels[type] || type;
+   }
+ 
+   getProgramTypeIcon(type: string): string {
+     const icons: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'workshop': 'ri-brain-line',
+       'checkup': 'ri-stethoscope-line',
+       'fitness': 'ri-run-line',
+       'nutrition': 'ri-restaurant-line'
+     };
+     return icons[type] || 'ri-calendar-event-line';
+   }
+ 
+   getRemainingQuota(service: EAPService): number {
+     return service.annualQuota - service.usedQuota;
+   }
+ 
+   getQuotaPercentage(service: EAPService): number {
+     return (service.usedQuota / service.annualQuota) * 100;
+   }
+ 
+   openBooking(service: EAPService): void {
+     this.selectedService.set(service);
+     this.showBookingModal.set(true);
+   }
+ 
+   closeBookingModal(): void {
+     this.showBookingModal.set(false);
+     this.selectedService.set(null);
+   }
+ 
+   formatDate(date: Date): string {
+     return new Date(date).toLocaleDateString('zh-TW', {
+       month: 'long',
+       day: 'numeric'
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   getEnrollmentPercentage(program: HealthProgram): number {
+     return (program.enrolled / program.capacity) * 100;
+   }
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,252 @@
- 
+ &lt;app-header
+   [title]="'員工協助方案 EAP'"
+   [subtitle]="'心理健康 · 工作生活平衡 · 全方位支持'"
+   [showBreadcrumb]="true"
+   [breadcrumbItems]="[
+     { label: '首頁', link: '/' },
+     { label: '文化管理', link: '/culture' },
+     { label: '員工協助方案' }
+   ]"
+ /&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;main class="eap-page"&gt;
+   &lt;!-- 匿名提示 --&gt;
+   &lt;div class="privacy-notice"&gt;
+     &lt;i class="ri-shield-check-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+     &lt;div class="notice-content"&gt;
+       &lt;strong&gt;隱私保護聲明&lt;/strong&gt;
+       &lt;p&gt;您的 EAP 使用紀錄完全匿名。諮商內容不進入任何系統，HR 僅能查看整體使用率統計。&lt;/p&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+   &lt;div class="eap-layout"&gt;
+     &lt;!-- 左側：服務列表 --&gt;
+     &lt;section class="services-section"&gt;
+       &lt;h2 class="section-title"&gt;
+         &lt;i class="ri-hand-heart-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+         可用服務
+       &lt;/h2&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;div class="services-grid"&gt;
+         @for (service of services(); track service.id) {
+           &lt;div class="service-card" [class.low-quota]="getRemainingQuota(service) &lt;= 1"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="service-icon"&gt;
+               &lt;i [class]="service.icon"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="service-content"&gt;
+               &lt;h3 class="service-name"&gt;{{ service.name }}&lt;/h3&gt;
+               &lt;p class="service-desc"&gt;{{ service.description }}&lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;div class="service-provider"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-building-2-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 {{ service.provider }}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="service-quota"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="quota-info"&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="quota-label"&gt;剩餘額度&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="quota-value"&gt;{{ getRemainingQuota(service) }} / {{ service.annualQuota }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div class="quota-bar"&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="quota-used" [style.width.%]="getQuotaPercentage(service)"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;button class="btn-book" (click)="openBooking(service)" [disabled]="getRemainingQuota(service) === 0"&gt;
+               @if (getRemainingQuota(service) &gt; 0) {
+                 &lt;i class="ri-calendar-check-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 匿名預約
+               } @else {
+                 &lt;i class="ri-close-circle-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 額度已用完
+               }
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         }
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/section&gt;
+ 
+     &lt;!-- 右側：統計與活動 --&gt;
+     &lt;aside class="side-panel"&gt;
+       &lt;!-- 使用統計 (去識別化) --&gt;
+       @if (usageStats()) {
+         &lt;div class="stats-card"&gt;
+           &lt;h3 class="card-title"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-bar-chart-box-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             整體使用統計
+             &lt;span class="period-badge"&gt;{{ usageStats()?.period }}&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/h3&gt;
+ 
+           &lt;div class="stats-overview"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="stat-item"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="stat-value"&gt;{{ usageStats()?.totalUsage }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="stat-label"&gt;總使用人次&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="stat-item"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="stat-value"&gt;{{ usageStats()?.satisfactionScore }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="stat-label"&gt;滿意度 /5&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="stat-item highlight"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="stat-value"&gt;+{{ usageStats()?.yearOverYearChange }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="stat-label"&gt;年增率&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           &lt;div class="usage-breakdown"&gt;
+             &lt;h4&gt;服務類型分佈&lt;/h4&gt;
+             @for (item of usageStats()?.serviceBreakdown; track item.type) {
+               &lt;div class="breakdown-row"&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="breakdown-info"&gt;
+                   &lt;i [class]="getServiceIcon(item.type)"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                   &lt;span&gt;{{ getServiceLabel(item.type) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="breakdown-bar-wrapper"&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="breakdown-bar" [style.width.%]="item.percentage"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="breakdown-value"&gt;{{ item.percentage }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             }
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       }
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 健康促進計畫 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="programs-card"&gt;
+         &lt;h3 class="card-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-calendar-event-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           即將舉行的活動
+         &lt;/h3&gt;
+ 
+         &lt;div class="programs-list"&gt;
+           @for (program of healthPrograms(); track program.id) {
+             &lt;div class="program-item"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="program-icon" [attr.data-type]="program.type"&gt;
+                 &lt;i [class]="getProgramTypeIcon(program.type)"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div class="program-content"&gt;
+                 &lt;h4 class="program-name"&gt;{{ program.name }}&lt;/h4&gt;
+                 &lt;p class="program-desc"&gt;{{ program.description }}&lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="program-meta"&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="program-date"&gt;
+                     &lt;i class="ri-calendar-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                     {{ formatDate(program.schedule) }}
+                   &lt;/span&gt;
+                   @if (program.instructor) {
+                     &lt;span class="program-instructor"&gt;
+                       &lt;i class="ri-user-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                       {{ program.instructor }}
+                     &lt;/span&gt;
+                   }
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="program-enrollment"&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="enrollment-bar"&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="enrollment-fill" [style.width.%]="getEnrollmentPercentage(program)"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="enrollment-text"&gt;{{ program.enrolled }} / {{ program.capacity }} 人&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;button class="btn-enroll" [disabled]="program.enrolled &gt;= program.capacity"&gt;
+                 @if (program.enrolled &lt; program.capacity) {
+                   報名
+                 } @else {
+                   已額滿
+                 }
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           }
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- EAP 效益 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="impact-card"&gt;
+         &lt;h3 class="card-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-line-chart-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           EAP 效益分析
+         &lt;/h3&gt;
+         &lt;div class="impact-metrics"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="impact-item"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="impact-icon productivity"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-speed-up-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="impact-info"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="impact-value"&gt;+8%&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="impact-label"&gt;生產力提升&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="impact-item"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="impact-icon retention"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-user-heart-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="impact-info"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="impact-value"&gt;-15%&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="impact-label"&gt;離職率降低&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="impact-item"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="impact-icon roi"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-funds-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="impact-info"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="impact-value"&gt;320%&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="impact-label"&gt;投資報酬率&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/aside&gt;
+   &lt;/div&gt;
+ &lt;/main&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;!-- 預約 Modal --&gt;
+ @if (showBookingModal() &amp;&amp; selectedService()) {
+   &lt;div class="modal-overlay" (click)="closeBookingModal()"&gt;
+     &lt;div class="modal-content" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()"&gt;
+       &lt;div class="modal-header"&gt;
+         &lt;h3&gt;
+           &lt;i [class]="selectedService()?.icon"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           預約 {{ selectedService()?.name }}
+         &lt;/h3&gt;
+         &lt;button class="btn-close" (click)="closeBookingModal()"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-close-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;div class="modal-body"&gt;
+         &lt;div class="booking-notice"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-information-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           &lt;p&gt;此預約為匿名模式，系統將使用匿名代碼追蹤預約狀態。&lt;/p&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;div class="booking-form"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="form-group"&gt;
+             &lt;label&gt;預約模式&lt;/label&gt;
+             &lt;div class="radio-group"&gt;
+               &lt;label class="radio-item"&gt;
+                 &lt;input type="radio" name="mode" value="anonymous" checked&gt;
+                 &lt;span&gt;匿名預約（推薦）&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/label&gt;
+               &lt;label class="radio-item"&gt;
+                 &lt;input type="radio" name="mode" value="named"&gt;
+                 &lt;span&gt;具名預約&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/label&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="form-group"&gt;
+             &lt;label&gt;偏好時段&lt;/label&gt;
+             &lt;select&gt;
+               &lt;option&gt;週一至週五 上午&lt;/option&gt;
+               &lt;option&gt;週一至週五 下午&lt;/option&gt;
+               &lt;option&gt;週六 上午&lt;/option&gt;
+               &lt;option&gt;無特別偏好&lt;/option&gt;
+             &lt;/select&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="form-group"&gt;
+             &lt;label&gt;備註（選填）&lt;/label&gt;
+             &lt;textarea placeholder="請簡述您希望諮詢的方向..."&gt;&lt;/textarea&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;div class="modal-footer"&gt;
+         &lt;button class="btn-cancel" (click)="closeBookingModal()"&gt;取消&lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;button class="btn-confirm"&gt;確認預約&lt;/button&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   &lt;/div&gt;
+ }
+ 
```

```diff
+ @use '../../../../styles/variables' as *;
+ 
+ .eap-page {
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   padding-top: calc(var(--header-height) + $spacing-lg);
+   min-height: 100vh;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ // 隱私提示
+ .privacy-notice {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: flex-start;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.1) 0%, rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.05) 100%);
+   border: 1px solid rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.2);
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ 
+   &gt; i {
+     font-size: 1.5rem;
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+     flex-shrink: 0;
+   }
+ 
+   .notice-content {
+     strong {
+       display: block;
+       font-size: $font-size-sm;
+       color: $color-l6-olive;
+       margin-bottom: 4px;
+     }
+ 
+     p {
+       font-size: $font-size-sm;
+       color: $color-text-secondary;
+       margin: 0;
+       line-height: 1.5;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 佈局
+ .eap-layout {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: 1fr 400px;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ // 服務列表
+ .services-section {
+   .section-title {
+     display: flex;
+     align-items: center;
+     gap: $spacing-sm;
+     font-size: $font-size-lg;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+     margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ 
+     i {
+       color: $color-l6-olive;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .services-grid {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .service-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   transition: all 0.3s ease;
+   position: relative;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     transform: translateY(-2px);
+     box-shadow: $shadow-md;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.low-quota {
+     border: 1px solid rgba($color-warning, 0.3);
+ 
+     .quota-value {
+       color: $color-warning;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .service-icon {
+   width: 56px;
+   height: 56px;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.1) 0%, rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.2) 100%);
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.75rem;
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .service-content {
+   flex: 1;
+ }
+ 
+ .service-name {
+   font-size: $font-size-md;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .service-desc {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-sm;
+   line-height: 1.5;
+ }
+ 
+ .service-provider {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-tertiary;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .service-quota {
+   padding-top: $spacing-sm;
+   border-top: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ .quota-info {
+   display: flex;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .quota-label {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .quota-value {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-l6-olive;
+ }
+ 
+ .quota-bar {
+   height: 6px;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ }
+ 
+ .quota-used {
+   height: 100%;
+   background: $color-l6-olive;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   transition: width 0.5s ease;
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-book {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   padding: $spacing-sm $spacing-md;
+   background: $color-l6-olive;
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   border: none;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover:not(:disabled) {
+     background: darken($color-l6-olive, 8%);
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;:disabled {
+     background: $color-soft-gray;
+     color: $color-text-tertiary;

+   }
+ }
+

+ .side-panel {

+ }
+ 
+ .card-title {

+   gap: $spacing-sm;

+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-md;
+

+     color: $color-l6-olive;

+ 
+   .period-badge {

+     padding: 2px $spacing-sm;

+     font-size: $font-size-xs;

+   align-items: center;

+

+ .btn-cancel {
```

**Chunk 1**

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,172 @@
- 
+ import { Component, ChangeDetectionStrategy, signal, inject, OnInit, computed } from '@angular/core';
+ import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
+ import { HeaderComponent } from '../../../../shared/components/header/header.component';
+ import { CultureService } from '../../services/culture.service';
+ import { Award, AwardApplication, AwardCategory } from '../../models/culture.model';
+ 
+ @Component({
+   standalone: true,
+   selector: 'app-awards-page',
+   templateUrl: './awards-page.component.html',
+   styleUrl: './awards-page.component.scss',
+   imports: [CommonModule, HeaderComponent],
+   changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
+ })
+ export class AwardsPageComponent implements OnInit {
+   private cultureService = inject(CultureService);
+ 
+   // State
+   loading = signal(true);
+   awards = signal&lt;Award[]&gt;([]);
+   applications = signal&lt;AwardApplication[]&gt;([]);
+ 
+   // Filters
+   selectedCategory = signal&lt;AwardCategory | 'all'&gt;('all');
+   searchQuery = signal('');
+ 
+   // Categories
+   categories: { value: AwardCategory | 'all'; label: string; icon: string }[] = [
+     { value: 'all', label: '全部', icon: 'ri-apps-line' },
+     { value: 'hr', label: '人資類', icon: 'ri-user-star-line' },
+     { value: 'employer', label: '雇主品牌', icon: 'ri-building-2-line' },
+     { value: 'government', label: '政府獎項', icon: 'ri-government-line' },
+     { value: 'sustainability', label: '永續發展', icon: 'ri-leaf-line' },
+     { value: 'innovation', label: '創新類', icon: 'ri-lightbulb-line' },
+     { value: 'industry', label: '產業獎項', icon: 'ri-award-line' }
+   ];
+ 
+   // Computed
+   filteredAwards = computed(() =&gt; {
+     let result = this.awards();
+     const category = this.selectedCategory();
+     const query = this.searchQuery().toLowerCase();
+ 
+     if (category !== 'all') {
+       result = result.filter(a =&gt; a.category === category);
+     }
+ 
+     if (query) {
+       result = result.filter(a =&gt;
+         a.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
+         a.organizer.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
+         a.tags.some(t =&gt; t.toLowerCase().includes(query))
+       );
+     }
+ 
+     return result;
+   });
+ 
+   upcomingDeadlines = computed(() =&gt; {
+     const now = new Date();
+     const twoWeeks = new Date(now.getTime() + 14 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
+     return this.awards().filter(a =&gt;
+       a.applicationDeadline &gt;= now &amp;&amp;
+       a.applicationDeadline &lt;= twoWeeks
+     );
+   });
+ 
+   ngOnInit(): void {
+     this.loadData();
+   }
+ 
+   loadData(): void {
+     this.loading.set(true);
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getAwards().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.awards.set(data);
+     });
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getAwardApplications().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.applications.set(data);
+       this.loading.set(false);
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   setCategory(category: AwardCategory | 'all'): void {
+     this.selectedCategory.set(category);
+   }
+ 
+   onSearch(event: Event): void {
+     const target = event.target as HTMLInputElement;
+     this.searchQuery.set(target.value);
+   }
+ 
+   getCategoryLabel(category: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'hr': '人資類',
+       'employer': '雇主品牌',
+       'government': '政府獎項',
+       'sustainability': '永續發展',
+       'innovation': '創新類',
+       'industry': '產業獎項'
+     };
+     return labels[category] || category;
+   }
+ 
+   getCategoryIcon(category: string): string {
+     const icons: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'hr': 'ri-user-star-line',
+       'employer': 'ri-building-2-line',
+       'government': 'ri-government-line',
+       'sustainability': 'ri-leaf-line',
+       'innovation': 'ri-lightbulb-line',
+       'industry': 'ri-award-line'
+     };
+     return icons[category] || 'ri-award-line';
+   }
+ 
+   getStatusLabel(status: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'upcoming': '即將開放',
+       'applying': '申請中',
+       'submitted': '已提交',
+       'won': '已獲獎',
+       'not-won': '未獲獎',
+       'missed': '已錯過'
+     };
+     return labels[status] || status;
+   }
+ 
+   getStatusClass(status: string): string {
+     const classes: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'upcoming': 'status-upcoming',
+       'applying': 'status-applying',
+       'submitted': 'status-submitted',
+       'won': 'status-won',
+       'not-won': 'status-not-won',
+       'missed': 'status-missed'
+     };
+     return classes[status] || '';
+   }
+ 
+   getPriorityLabel(priority: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'high': '高優先',
+       'medium': '中優先',
+       'low': '低優先'
+     };
+     return labels[priority] || priority;
+   }
+ 
+   formatDate(date: Date): string {
+     return new Date(date).toLocaleDateString('zh-TW', {
+       year: 'numeric',
+       month: 'long',
+       day: 'numeric'
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   getDaysUntilDeadline(date: Date): number {
+     const now = new Date();
+     const deadline = new Date(date);
+     const diffTime = deadline.getTime() - now.getTime();
+     return Math.ceil(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
+   }
+ 
+   getMatchScoreClass(score: number): string {
+     if (score &gt;= 90) return 'score-high';
+     if (score &gt;= 70) return 'score-medium';
+     return 'score-low';
+   }
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,195 @@
- 
+ &lt;app-header
+   [title]="'獎項資料庫'"
+   [subtitle]="'獎項追蹤 · 智慧推薦 · 申請管理'"
+   [showBreadcrumb]="true"
+   [breadcrumbItems]="[
+     { label: '首頁', link: '/' },
+     { label: '文化管理', link: '/culture' },
+     { label: '獎項資料庫' }
+   ]"
+ /&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;main class="awards-page"&gt;
+   &lt;div class="awards-layout"&gt;
+     &lt;!-- 左側：獎項列表 --&gt;
+     &lt;section class="awards-section"&gt;
+       &lt;!-- 搜尋與篩選 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="filter-bar"&gt;
+         &lt;div class="search-box"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-search-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           &lt;input
+             type="text"
+             placeholder="搜尋獎項名稱、主辦單位..."
+             [value]="searchQuery()"
+             (input)="onSearch($event)"
+           &gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;div class="category-tabs"&gt;
+           @for (cat of categories; track cat.value) {
+             &lt;button
+               class="category-tab"
+               [class.active]="selectedCategory() === cat.value"
+               (click)="setCategory(cat.value)"
+             &gt;
+               &lt;i [class]="cat.icon"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               {{ cat.label }}
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           }
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 獎項卡片列表 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="awards-grid"&gt;
+         @for (award of filteredAwards(); track award.id) {
+           &lt;article class="award-card" [attr.data-priority]="award.priority"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="award-header"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="award-category"&gt;
+                 &lt;i [class]="getCategoryIcon(award.category)"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 {{ getCategoryLabel(award.category) }}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div class="award-status" [class]="getStatusClass(award.status)"&gt;
+                 {{ getStatusLabel(award.status) }}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;h3 class="award-name"&gt;{{ award.name }}&lt;/h3&gt;
+             &lt;p class="award-organizer"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-building-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               {{ award.organizer }}
+             &lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;p class="award-description"&gt;{{ award.description }}&lt;/p&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="award-tags"&gt;
+               @for (tag of award.tags; track tag) {
+                 &lt;span class="tag"&gt;{{ tag }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               }
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="award-meta"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="deadline"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-calendar-event-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 &lt;span&gt;截止: {{ formatDate(award.applicationDeadline) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 @if (getDaysUntilDeadline(award.applicationDeadline) &lt;= 30 &amp;&amp; getDaysUntilDeadline(award.applicationDeadline) &gt; 0) {
+                   &lt;span class="days-left"&gt;剩 {{ getDaysUntilDeadline(award.applicationDeadline) }} 天&lt;/span&gt;
+                 }
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               @if (award.matchScore) {
+                 &lt;div class="match-score" [class]="getMatchScoreClass(award.matchScore)"&gt;
+                   &lt;i class="ri-ai-generate"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                   匹配度 {{ award.matchScore }}%
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               }
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="award-actions"&gt;
+               &lt;button class="btn-detail"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-file-list-3-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 查看詳情
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+               @if (award.status === 'upcoming' || award.status === 'applying') {
+                 &lt;button class="btn-apply"&gt;
+                   &lt;i class="ri-edit-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                   開始申請
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+               }
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/article&gt;
+         }
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/section&gt;
+ 
+     &lt;!-- 右側面板 --&gt;
+     &lt;aside class="side-panel"&gt;
+       &lt;!-- 即將截止提醒 --&gt;
+       @if (upcomingDeadlines().length &gt; 0) {
+         &lt;div class="deadline-alert"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="alert-header"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-alarm-warning-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;即將截止&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="alert-list"&gt;
+             @for (award of upcomingDeadlines(); track award.id) {
+               &lt;div class="alert-item"&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="alert-info"&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="alert-name"&gt;{{ award.name }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="alert-date"&gt;{{ formatDate(award.applicationDeadline) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="alert-days"&gt;{{ getDaysUntilDeadline(award.applicationDeadline) }} 天&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             }
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       }
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 申請進度 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="applications-card"&gt;
+         &lt;h3 class="card-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-file-edit-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           申請進度追蹤
+         &lt;/h3&gt;
+ 
+         &lt;div class="applications-list"&gt;
+           @for (app of applications(); track app.id) {
+             &lt;div class="application-item"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="app-status-icon" [class]="getStatusClass(app.status)"&gt;
+                 @if (app.status === 'won') {
+                   &lt;i class="ri-trophy-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 } @else if (app.status === 'applying') {
+                   &lt;i class="ri-edit-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 } @else {
+                   &lt;i class="ri-file-list-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 }
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div class="app-content"&gt;
+                 &lt;h4 class="app-name"&gt;{{ app.awardName }}&lt;/h4&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="app-meta"&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="app-year"&gt;{{ app.year }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="app-status" [class]="getStatusClass(app.status)"&gt;
+                     {{ getStatusLabel(app.status) }}
+                   &lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 @if (app.notes) {
+                   &lt;p class="app-notes"&gt;{{ app.notes }}&lt;/p&gt;
+                 }
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           }
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 歷年成績 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="stats-card"&gt;
+         &lt;h3 class="card-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-bar-chart-grouped-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           歷年獲獎成績
+         &lt;/h3&gt;
+         &lt;div class="stats-summary"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="stat-item"&gt;
+             &lt;span class="stat-value"&gt;12&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="stat-label"&gt;累計獲獎&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="stat-item"&gt;
+             &lt;span class="stat-value"&gt;3&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="stat-label"&gt;2024 年&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="stat-item highlight"&gt;
+             &lt;span class="stat-value"&gt;85%&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="stat-label"&gt;成功率&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;div class="recent-wins"&gt;
+           &lt;h4&gt;近期獲獎&lt;/h4&gt;
+           &lt;div class="win-item"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-trophy-fill"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;亞洲最佳雇主獎 2024&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="win-item"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-medal-fill"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;國家人才發展獎 2024&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/aside&gt;
+   &lt;/div&gt;
+ &lt;/main&gt;
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>
