```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,589 @@
- 
+ @use '../../../../styles/variables' as *;
+ 
+ .awards-page {
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   padding-top: calc(var(--header-height) + $spacing-lg);
+   min-height: 100vh;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ .awards-layout {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: 1fr 360px;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ // 篩選列
+ .filter-bar {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .search-box {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   padding: $spacing-sm $spacing-md;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: $color-text-tertiary;
+     font-size: 1.1rem;
+   }
+ 
+   input {
+     flex: 1;
+     border: none;
+     background: transparent;
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+ 
+     &amp;::placeholder {
+       color: $color-text-tertiary;
+     }
+ 
+     &amp;:focus {
+       outline: none;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .category-tabs {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-wrap: wrap;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .category-tab {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   padding: $spacing-xs $spacing-sm;
+   background: transparent;
+   border: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     border-color: $color-l6-olive;
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.active {
+     background: $color-l6-olive;
+     border-color: $color-l6-olive;
+     color: $color-pure-white;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 獎項卡片
+ .awards-grid {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(340px, 1fr));
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .award-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+   transition: all 0.3s ease;
+   position: relative;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     transform: translateY(-2px);
+     box-shadow: $shadow-md;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-priority="high"] {
+     border-left: 4px solid $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-priority="medium"] {
+     border-left: 4px solid $color-l4-slate;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .award-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .award-category {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   background: rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.1);
+   color: $color-l6-olive;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .award-status {
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ 
+   &amp;.status-upcoming {
+     background: rgba($color-info, 0.1);
+     color: $color-info;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.status-applying {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.status-submitted {
+     background: rgba($color-l3-petrol, 0.1);
+     color: $color-l3-petrol;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.status-won {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     color: $color-success;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.status-not-won {
+     background: rgba($color-text-tertiary, 0.1);
+     color: $color-text-tertiary;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .award-name {
+   font-size: $font-size-md;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-xs;
+   line-height: 1.4;
+ }
+ 
+ .award-organizer {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-sm;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+     color: $color-text-tertiary;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .award-description {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   line-height: 1.5;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-sm;
+   display: -webkit-box;
+   -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
+   -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ }
+ 
+ .award-tags {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-wrap: wrap;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   .tag {
+     padding: 2px $spacing-sm;
+     background: $color-cloud-gray;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+     border-radius: $radius-full;
+     font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .award-meta {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   padding-top: $spacing-sm;
+   border-top: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .deadline {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1rem;
+     color: $color-text-tertiary;
+   }
+ 
+   .days-left {
+     padding: 2px $spacing-xs;
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     color: $color-warning;
+     border-radius: $radius-sm;
+     font-size: $font-size-xs;
+     font-weight: 500;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .match-score {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.score-high {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     color: $color-success;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.score-medium {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.score-low {
+     background: rgba($color-text-tertiary, 0.1);
+     color: $color-text-tertiary;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .award-actions {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-detail,
+ .btn-apply {
+   flex: 1;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   padding: $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-detail {
+   background: transparent;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   border: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     border-color: $color-l6-olive;
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-apply {
+   background: $color-l6-olive;
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   border: none;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     background: darken($color-l6-olive, 8%);
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 側邊面板
+ .side-panel {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ // 截止提醒
+ .deadline-alert {
+   background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba($color-warning, 0.1) 0%, rgba($color-warning, 0.05) 100%);
+   border: 1px solid rgba($color-warning, 0.2);
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .alert-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.25rem;
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   span {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .alert-list {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .alert-item {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   padding: $spacing-sm;
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .alert-info {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: 2px;
+ }
+ 
+ .alert-name {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+ }
+ 
+ .alert-date {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-tertiary;
+ }
+ 
+ .alert-days {
+   padding: $spacing-xs $spacing-sm;
+   background: $color-warning;
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 600;
+ }
+ 
+ // 申請進度
+ .applications-card,
+ .stats-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .card-title {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   font-size: $font-size-md;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-md;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .applications-list {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .application-item {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .app-status-icon {
+   width: 40px;
+   height: 40px;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   flex-shrink: 0;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.25rem;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.status-won {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-success; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.status-applying {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-warning; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.status-submitted {
+     background: rgba($color-l3-petrol, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-l3-petrol; }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .app-content {
+   flex: 1;
+   min-width: 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .app-name {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0 0 4px;
+ }
+ 
+ .app-meta {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .app-year {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-tertiary;
+ }
+ 
+ .app-status {
+   padding: 2px $spacing-xs;
+   border-radius: $radius-sm;
+   font-size: 10px;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ 
+   &amp;.status-won {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     color: $color-success;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.status-applying {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .app-notes {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   margin: $spacing-xs 0 0;
+ }
+ 
+ // 統計
+ .stats-summary {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+   padding-bottom: $spacing-md;
+   border-bottom: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ .stat-item {
+   text-align: center;
+ 
+   .stat-value {
+     display: block;
+     font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+     font-style: italic;
+     font-size: 1.5rem;
+     font-weight: 700;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+   }
+ 
+   .stat-label {
+     font-size: $font-size-xs;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.highlight .stat-value {
+     color: $color-success;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .recent-wins {
+   h4 {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     font-weight: 500;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+     margin: 0 0 $spacing-sm;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .win-item {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   padding: $spacing-xs 0;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: #FFD700;
+     font-size: 1rem;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;:nth-child(2) i {
+     color: #C0C0C0;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 響應式
+ @media (max-width: 1024px) {
+   .awards-layout {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ @media (max-width: 768px) {
+   .awards-page {
+     padding: $spacing-md;
+     padding-top: calc(var(--header-height) + $spacing-md);
+   }
+ 
+   .awards-grid {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ 
+   .category-tabs {
+     overflow-x: auto;
+     flex-wrap: nowrap;
+     padding-bottom: $spacing-xs;
+   }
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

<details><summary>Tool use: **write** • Edit file: /Users/alifrt/Desktop/Bombus/bombus-system/src/app/features/culture/pages/document-repository-page/document-repository-page.component.ts</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 174, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,174 @@
- 
+ import { Component, ChangeDetectionStrategy, signal, inject, OnInit, computed } from '@angular/core';
+ import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
+ import { HeaderComponent } from '../../../../shared/components/header/header.component';
+ import { CultureService } from '../../services/culture.service';
+ import { CultureDocument, DocumentType } from '../../models/culture.model';
+ 
+ @Component({
+   standalone: true,
+   selector: 'app-document-repository-page',
+   templateUrl: './document-repository-page.component.html',
+   styleUrl: './document-repository-page.component.scss',
+   imports: [CommonModule, HeaderComponent],
+   changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
+ })
+ export class DocumentRepositoryPageComponent implements OnInit {
+   private cultureService = inject(CultureService);
+ 
+   // State
+   loading = signal(true);
+   documents = signal&lt;CultureDocument[]&gt;([]);
+ 
+   // Filters
+   selectedType = signal&lt;DocumentType | 'all'&gt;('all');
+   searchQuery = signal('');
+   viewMode = signal&lt;'grid' | 'list'&gt;('grid');
+ 
+   // Document types
+   documentTypes: { value: DocumentType | 'all'; label: string; icon: string }[] = [
+     { value: 'all', label: '全部', icon: 'ri-folder-line' },
+     { value: 'policy', label: '規章制度', icon: 'ri-file-text-line' },
+     { value: 'certificate', label: '證書認證', icon: 'ri-award-line' },
+     { value: 'training', label: '培訓文件', icon: 'ri-book-open-line' },
+     { value: 'report', label: '報告', icon: 'ri-file-chart-line' },
+     { value: 'hr', label: '人事文件', icon: 'ri-user-line' },
+     { value: 'other', label: '其他', icon: 'ri-file-line' }
+   ];
+ 
+   // Computed
+   filteredDocuments = computed(() =&gt; {
+     let result = this.documents();
+     const type = this.selectedType();
+     const query = this.searchQuery().toLowerCase();
+ 
+     if (type !== 'all') {
+       result = result.filter(d =&gt; d.type === type);
+     }
+ 
+     if (query) {
+       result = result.filter(d =&gt;
+         d.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
+         d.category.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
+         d.tags.some(t =&gt; t.toLowerCase().includes(query))
+       );
+     }
+ 
+     return result;
+   });
+ 
+   expiringDocuments = computed(() =&gt; {
+     const now = new Date();
+     const threeMonths = new Date(now.getTime() + 90 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
+     return this.documents().filter(d =&gt;
+       d.expiryDate &amp;&amp;
+       new Date(d.expiryDate) &gt;= now &amp;&amp;
+       new Date(d.expiryDate) &lt;= threeMonths
+     );
+   });
+ 
+   ngOnInit(): void {
+     this.loadData();
+   }
+ 
+   loadData(): void {
+     this.loading.set(true);
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getDocuments().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.documents.set(data);
+       this.loading.set(false);
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   setType(type: DocumentType | 'all'): void {
+     this.selectedType.set(type);
+   }
+ 
+   setViewMode(mode: 'grid' | 'list'): void {
+     this.viewMode.set(mode);
+   }
+ 
+   onSearch(event: Event): void {
+     const target = event.target as HTMLInputElement;
+     this.searchQuery.set(target.value);
+   }
+ 
+   getTypeLabel(type: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'policy': '規章制度',
+       'certificate': '證書認證',
+       'training': '培訓文件',
+       'report': '報告',
+       'hr': '人事文件',
+       'award': '獎項文件',
+       'other': '其他'
+     };
+     return labels[type] || type;
+   }
+ 
+   getTypeIcon(type: string): string {
+     const icons: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'policy': 'ri-file-text-line',
+       'certificate': 'ri-award-line',
+       'training': 'ri-book-open-line',
+       'report': 'ri-file-chart-line',
+       'hr': 'ri-user-line',
+       'award': 'ri-trophy-line',
+       'other': 'ri-file-line'
+     };
+     return icons[type] || 'ri-file-line';
+   }
+ 
+   getFormatIcon(format: string): string {
+     const icons: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'pdf': 'ri-file-pdf-2-line',
+       'xlsx': 'ri-file-excel-2-line',
+       'xls': 'ri-file-excel-2-line',
+       'docx': 'ri-file-word-2-line',
+       'doc': 'ri-file-word-2-line',
+       'pptx': 'ri-file-ppt-2-line',
+       'ppt': 'ri-file-ppt-2-line'
+     };
+     return icons[format.toLowerCase()] || 'ri-file-line';
+   }
+ 
+   getStatusLabel(status: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'draft': '草稿',
+       'active': '生效中',
+       'expired': '已過期',
+       'archived': '已封存'
+     };
+     return labels[status] || status;
+   }
+ 
+   getAccessLabel(access: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'public': '公開',
+       'internal': '內部',
+       'confidential': '機密'
+     };
+     return labels[access] || access;
+   }
+ 
+   formatFileSize(bytes: number): string {
+     if (bytes &lt; 1024) return bytes + ' B';
+     if (bytes &lt; 1024 * 1024) return (bytes / 1024).toFixed(1) + ' KB';
+     return (bytes / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1) + ' MB';
+   }
+ 
+   formatDate(date: Date): string {
+     return new Date(date).toLocaleDateString('zh-TW', {
+       year: 'numeric',
+       month: 'short',
+       day: 'numeric'
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   getDaysUntilExpiry(date: Date): number {
+     const now = new Date();
+     const expiry = new Date(date);
+     const diffTime = expiry.getTime() - now.getTime();
+     return Math.ceil(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
+   }
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

<details><summary>Tool use: **write** • Edit file: /Users/alifrt/Desktop/Bombus/bombus-system/src/app/features/culture/pages/document-repository-page/document-repository-page.component.html</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 276, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,276 @@
- 
+ &lt;app-header
+   [title]="'文件儲存庫'"
+   [subtitle]="'文件管理 · 版本控制 · 到期提醒'"
+   [showBreadcrumb]="true"
+   [breadcrumbItems]="[
+     { label: '首頁', link: '/' },
+     { label: '文化管理', link: '/culture' },
+     { label: '文件儲存庫' }
+   ]"
+ /&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;main class="repository-page"&gt;
+   &lt;div class="repository-layout"&gt;
+     &lt;!-- 主要區域 --&gt;
+     &lt;section class="main-section"&gt;
+       &lt;!-- 工具列 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="toolbar"&gt;
+         &lt;div class="search-box"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-search-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           &lt;input
+             type="text"
+             placeholder="搜尋文件名稱、分類、標籤..."
+             [value]="searchQuery()"
+             (input)="onSearch($event)"
+           &gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         &lt;div class="toolbar-actions"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="view-toggle"&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               [class.active]="viewMode() === 'grid'"
+               (click)="setViewMode('grid')"
+             &gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-grid-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               [class.active]="viewMode() === 'list'"
+               (click)="setViewMode('list')"
+             &gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-list-check"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           &lt;button class="btn-upload"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-upload-cloud-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             上傳文件
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 類型篩選 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="type-filter"&gt;
+         @for (type of documentTypes; track type.value) {
+           &lt;button
+             class="type-btn"
+             [class.active]="selectedType() === type.value"
+             (click)="setType(type.value)"
+           &gt;
+             &lt;i [class]="type.icon"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             {{ type.label }}
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         }
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 文件列表 - Grid 模式 --&gt;
+       @if (viewMode() === 'grid') {
+         &lt;div class="documents-grid"&gt;
+           @for (doc of filteredDocuments(); track doc.id) {
+             &lt;article class="document-card"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="doc-icon" [attr.data-format]="doc.fileFormat"&gt;
+                 &lt;i [class]="getFormatIcon(doc.fileFormat)"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;div class="doc-content"&gt;
+                 &lt;h3 class="doc-name"&gt;{{ doc.name }}&lt;/h3&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="doc-meta"&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="doc-type"&gt;
+                     &lt;i [class]="getTypeIcon(doc.type)"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                     {{ getTypeLabel(doc.type) }}
+                   &lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="doc-size"&gt;{{ formatFileSize(doc.fileSize) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                 &lt;div class="doc-tags"&gt;
+                   @for (tag of doc.tags.slice(0, 2); track tag) {
+                     &lt;span class="tag"&gt;{{ tag }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   }
+                   @if (doc.tags.length &gt; 2) {
+                     &lt;span class="tag more"&gt;+{{ doc.tags.length - 2 }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   }
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                 &lt;div class="doc-footer"&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="doc-info"&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="doc-version"&gt;v{{ doc.version }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="doc-status" [attr.data-status]="doc.status"&gt;
+                       {{ getStatusLabel(doc.status) }}
+                     &lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="doc-date"&gt;{{ formatDate(doc.lastModified) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;div class="doc-actions"&gt;
+                 &lt;button class="btn-action" title="下載"&gt;
+                   &lt;i class="ri-download-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;button class="btn-action" title="預覽"&gt;
+                   &lt;i class="ri-eye-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;button class="btn-action" title="更多"&gt;
+                   &lt;i class="ri-more-2-fill"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               @if (doc.accessLevel === 'confidential') {
+                 &lt;div class="access-badge confidential"&gt;
+                   &lt;i class="ri-lock-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               }
+             &lt;/article&gt;
+           }
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       }
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 文件列表 - List 模式 --&gt;
+       @if (viewMode() === 'list') {
+         &lt;div class="documents-table"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="table-header"&gt;
+             &lt;span class="col-name"&gt;文件名稱&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="col-type"&gt;類型&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="col-size"&gt;大小&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="col-version"&gt;版本&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="col-status"&gt;狀態&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="col-date"&gt;更新日期&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="col-actions"&gt;操作&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           @for (doc of filteredDocuments(); track doc.id) {
+             &lt;div class="table-row"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="col-name"&gt;
+                 &lt;i [class]="getFormatIcon(doc.fileFormat)" [attr.data-format]="doc.fileFormat"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 &lt;span&gt;{{ doc.name }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 @if (doc.accessLevel === 'confidential') {
+                   &lt;i class="ri-lock-line lock-icon"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 }
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;span class="col-type"&gt;{{ getTypeLabel(doc.type) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="col-size"&gt;{{ formatFileSize(doc.fileSize) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="col-version"&gt;v{{ doc.version }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="col-status" [attr.data-status]="doc.status"&gt;
+                 {{ getStatusLabel(doc.status) }}
+               &lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="col-date"&gt;{{ formatDate(doc.lastModified) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;div class="col-actions"&gt;
+                 &lt;button class="btn-action" title="下載"&gt;
+                   &lt;i class="ri-download-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;button class="btn-action" title="預覽"&gt;
+                   &lt;i class="ri-eye-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           }
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       }
+     &lt;/section&gt;
+ 
+     &lt;!-- 側邊面板 --&gt;
+     &lt;aside class="side-panel"&gt;
+       &lt;!-- 即將到期提醒 --&gt;
+       @if (expiringDocuments().length &gt; 0) {
+         &lt;div class="expiry-alert"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="alert-header"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-alarm-warning-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;即將到期文件&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="alert-list"&gt;
+             @for (doc of expiringDocuments(); track doc.id) {
+               &lt;div class="alert-item"&gt;
+                 &lt;i [class]="getFormatIcon(doc.fileFormat)"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="alert-info"&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="alert-name"&gt;{{ doc.name }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="alert-expiry"&gt;
+                     到期: {{ formatDate(doc.expiryDate!) }}
+                     ({{ getDaysUntilExpiry(doc.expiryDate!) }} 天)
+                   &lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             }
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       }
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 儲存空間 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="storage-card"&gt;
+         &lt;h3 class="card-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-hard-drive-2-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           儲存空間
+         &lt;/h3&gt;
+         &lt;div class="storage-info"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="storage-used"&gt;
+             &lt;span class="used-value"&gt;4.2&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="used-unit"&gt;GB&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="used-label"&gt;/ 10 GB&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="storage-bar"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="storage-fill" style="width: 42%"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;div class="storage-breakdown"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="breakdown-item"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-file-pdf-2-line pdf"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;PDF 文件&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="breakdown-size"&gt;1.8 GB&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="breakdown-item"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-file-excel-2-line excel"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;Excel 文件&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="breakdown-size"&gt;1.2 GB&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="breakdown-item"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-file-word-2-line word"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;Word 文件&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="breakdown-size"&gt;0.8 GB&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="breakdown-item"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-file-line other"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;其他&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="breakdown-size"&gt;0.4 GB&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 最近活動 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="activity-card"&gt;
+         &lt;h3 class="card-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-history-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           最近活動
+         &lt;/h3&gt;
+         &lt;div class="activity-list"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="activity-item"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="activity-icon upload"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-upload-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="activity-content"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="activity-action"&gt;上傳新文件&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="activity-name"&gt;年度培訓計畫.xlsx&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="activity-time"&gt;2 小時前&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="activity-item"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="activity-icon update"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-edit-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="activity-content"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="activity-action"&gt;更新版本&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="activity-name"&gt;員工手冊 2024.pdf&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="activity-time"&gt;昨天&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="activity-item"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="activity-icon download"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-download-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="activity-content"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="activity-action"&gt;下載文件&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="activity-name"&gt;TTQS 認證證書.pdf&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="activity-time"&gt;3 天前&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/aside&gt;
+   &lt;/div&gt;
+ &lt;/main&gt;
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,767 @@
- 
+ @use '../../../../styles/variables' as *;
+ 
+ .repository-page {
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   padding-top: calc(var(--header-height) + $spacing-lg);
+   min-height: 100vh;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ .repository-layout {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: 1fr 320px;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ // 工具列
+ .toolbar {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .search-box {
+   flex: 1;
+   max-width: 400px;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   padding: $spacing-sm $spacing-md;
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: $color-text-tertiary;
+     font-size: 1.1rem;
+   }
+ 
+   input {
+     flex: 1;
+     border: none;
+     background: transparent;
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+ 
+     &amp;::placeholder {
+       color: $color-text-tertiary;
+     }
+ 
+     &amp;:focus {
+       outline: none;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .toolbar-actions {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .view-toggle {
+   display: flex;
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ 
+   button {
+     padding: $spacing-sm;
+     border: none;
+     background: transparent;
+     color: $color-text-tertiary;
+     cursor: pointer;
+     transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+     i {
+       font-size: 1.1rem;
+     }
+ 
+     &amp;:hover {
+       color: $color-text-primary;
+     }
+ 
+     &amp;.active {
+       background: $color-l6-olive;
+       color: $color-pure-white;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-upload {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   padding: $spacing-sm $spacing-md;
+   background: $color-l6-olive;
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   border: none;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     background: darken($color-l6-olive, 8%);
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 類型篩選
+ .type-filter {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-wrap: wrap;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .type-btn {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   padding: $spacing-xs $spacing-sm;
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     border-color: $color-l6-olive;
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.active {
+     background: $color-l6-olive;
+     border-color: $color-l6-olive;
+     color: $color-pure-white;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 文件 Grid
+ .documents-grid {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .document-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   position: relative;
+   transition: all 0.3s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     transform: translateY(-2px);
+     box-shadow: $shadow-md;
+ 
+     .doc-actions {
+       opacity: 1;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-icon {
+   width: 48px;
+   height: 48px;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.5rem;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-format="pdf"] {
+     background: rgba(#E74C3C, 0.1);
+     i { color: #E74C3C; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-format="xlsx"],
+   &amp;[data-format="xls"] {
+     background: rgba(#27AE60, 0.1);
+     i { color: #27AE60; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-format="docx"],
+   &amp;[data-format="doc"] {
+     background: rgba(#2980B9, 0.1);
+     i { color: #2980B9; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-format="pptx"],
+   &amp;[data-format="ppt"] {
+     background: rgba(#E67E22, 0.1);
+     i { color: #E67E22; }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-content {
+   flex: 1;
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-name {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-xs;
+   line-height: 1.4;
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-meta {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-type {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: 4px;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.85rem;
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-size {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-tertiary;
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-tags {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-wrap: wrap;
+   gap: 4px;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ 
+   .tag {
+     padding: 2px $spacing-xs;
+     background: $color-cloud-gray;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+     border-radius: $radius-sm;
+     font-size: 10px;
+ 
+     &amp;.more {
+       background: rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.1);
+       color: $color-l6-olive;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-footer {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   padding-top: $spacing-xs;
+   border-top: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-info {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-version {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-tertiary;
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-status {
+   padding: 2px $spacing-xs;
+   border-radius: $radius-sm;
+   font-size: 10px;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="active"] {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     color: $color-success;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="draft"] {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="expired"] {
+     background: rgba($color-error, 0.1);
+     color: $color-error;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="archived"] {
+     background: rgba($color-text-tertiary, 0.1);
+     color: $color-text-tertiary;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-date {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-tertiary;
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-actions {
+   position: absolute;
+   top: $spacing-sm;
+   right: $spacing-sm;
+   display: flex;
+   gap: 4px;
+   opacity: 0;
+   transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-action {
+   width: 28px;
+   height: 28px;
+   border: none;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-sm;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     background: $color-l6-olive;
+ 
+     i {
+       color: $color-pure-white;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .access-badge {
+   position: absolute;
+   top: $spacing-sm;
+   left: $spacing-sm;
+   width: 24px;
+   height: 24px;
+   border-radius: 50%;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+ 
+   &amp;.confidential {
+     background: rgba($color-error, 0.1);
+ 
+     i {
+       font-size: 0.75rem;
+       color: $color-error;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 文件 Table
+ .documents-table {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ }
+ 
+ .table-header {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 80px 80px 80px 100px 80px;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   text-transform: uppercase;
+   letter-spacing: 0.5px;
+ }
+ 
+ .table-row {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 80px 80px 80px 100px 80px;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+   align-items: center;
+   border-bottom: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+   transition: background 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:last-child {
+     border-bottom: none;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     background: rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.02);
+ 
+     .btn-action {
+       opacity: 1;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .col-name {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   min-width: 0;
+ 
+   &gt; span {
+     overflow: hidden;
+     text-overflow: ellipsis;
+     white-space: nowrap;
+   }
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.25rem;
+     flex-shrink: 0;
+ 
+     &amp;[data-format="pdf"] { color: #E74C3C; }
+     &amp;[data-format="xlsx"], &amp;[data-format="xls"] { color: #27AE60; }
+     &amp;[data-format="docx"], &amp;[data-format="doc"] { color: #2980B9; }
+   }
+ 
+   .lock-icon {
+     font-size: 0.85rem;
+     color: $color-error;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .col-type,
+ .col-size,
+ .col-version,
+ .col-date {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .col-status {
+   padding: 4px $spacing-xs;
+   border-radius: $radius-sm;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   text-align: center;
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="active"] {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     color: $color-success;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="draft"] {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="expired"] {
+     background: rgba($color-error, 0.1);
+     color: $color-error;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .col-actions {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: 4px;
+ 
+   .btn-action {
+     opacity: 0.5;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 側邊面板
+ .side-panel {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ // 到期提醒
+ .expiry-alert {
+   background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba($color-warning, 0.1) 0%, rgba($color-warning, 0.05) 100%);
+   border: 1px solid rgba($color-warning, 0.2);
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .alert-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.25rem;
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   span {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .alert-list {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .alert-item {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: flex-start;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   padding: $spacing-sm;
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+ 
+   &gt; i {
+     font-size: 1.25rem;
+     color: #E74C3C;
+     flex-shrink: 0;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .alert-info {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: 2px;
+   min-width: 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .alert-name {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   overflow: hidden;
+   text-overflow: ellipsis;
+   white-space: nowrap;
+ }
+ 
+ .alert-expiry {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-warning;
+ }
+ 
+ // 儲存空間
+ .storage-card,
+ .activity-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .card-title {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   font-size: $font-size-md;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-md;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .storage-info {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .storage-used {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-xs;
+ 
+   .used-value {
+     font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+     font-style: italic;
+     font-size: 2rem;
+     font-weight: 700;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+   }
+ 
+   .used-unit {
+     font-size: $font-size-md;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+   }
+ 
+   .used-label {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     color: $color-text-tertiary;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .storage-bar {
+   height: 8px;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ }
+ 
+ .storage-fill {
+   height: 100%;
+   background: linear-gradient(90deg, $color-l6-olive, lighten($color-l6-olive, 10%));
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+ }
+ 
+ .storage-breakdown {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .breakdown-item {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1rem;
+ 
+     &amp;.pdf { color: #E74C3C; }
+     &amp;.excel { color: #27AE60; }
+     &amp;.word { color: #2980B9; }
+     &amp;.other { color: $color-text-tertiary; }
+   }
+ 
+   .breakdown-size {
+     margin-left: auto;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 活動記錄
+ .activity-list {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .activity-item {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .activity-icon {
+   width: 32px;
+   height: 32px;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   flex-shrink: 0;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1rem;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.upload {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-success; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.update {
+     background: rgba($color-info, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-info; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.download {
+     background: rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-l6-olive; }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .activity-content {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: 2px;
+   min-width: 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .activity-action {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .activity-name {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   overflow: hidden;
+   text-overflow: ellipsis;
+   white-space: nowrap;
+ }
+ 
+ .activity-time {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-tertiary;
+ }
+ 
+ // 響應式
+ @media (max-width: 1024px) {
+   .repository-layout {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ @media (max-width: 768px) {
+   .repository-page {
+     padding: $spacing-md;
+     padding-top: calc(var(--header-height) + $spacing-md);
+   }
+ 
+   .toolbar {
+     flex-direction: column;
+     align-items: stretch;
+   }
+ 
+   .search-box {
+     max-width: none;
+   }
+ 
+   .toolbar-actions {
+     justify-content: space-between;
+   }
+ 
+   .documents-grid {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ 
+   .table-header,
+   .table-row {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr auto auto;
+ 
+     .col-type,
+     .col-version,
+     .col-status {
+       display: none;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,169 @@
- 
+ import { Component, ChangeDetectionStrategy, signal, inject, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
+ import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
+ import { HeaderComponent } from '../../../../shared/components/header/header.component';
+ import { CultureService } from '../../services/culture.service';
+ import { Award, ApplicationChecklist, ChecklistItem } from '../../models/culture.model';
+ 
+ @Component({
+   standalone: true,
+   selector: 'app-ai-assistant-page',
+   templateUrl: './ai-assistant-page.component.html',
+   styleUrl: './ai-assistant-page.component.scss',
+   imports: [CommonModule, HeaderComponent],
+   changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
+ })
+ export class AiAssistantPageComponent implements OnInit {
+   private cultureService = inject(CultureService);
+ 
+   // State
+   loading = signal(true);
+   awards = signal&lt;Award[]&gt;([]);
+   selectedAward = signal&lt;Award | null&gt;(null);
+   checklist = signal&lt;ApplicationChecklist | null&gt;(null);
+ 
+   // AI Features
+   showAIGenerator = signal(false);
+   generatingContent = signal(false);
+   generatedContent = signal&lt;string&gt;('');
+ 
+   ngOnInit(): void {
+     this.loadData();
+   }
+ 
+   loadData(): void {
+     this.loading.set(true);
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getAwards().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       const applyingAwards = data.filter(a =&gt; a.status === 'upcoming' || a.status === 'applying');
+       this.awards.set(applyingAwards);
+ 
+       if (applyingAwards.length &gt; 0) {
+         this.selectAward(applyingAwards[0]);
+       }
+ 
+       this.loading.set(false);
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   selectAward(award: Award): void {
+     this.selectedAward.set(award);
+     this.loadChecklist(award.id);
+   }
+ 
+   loadChecklist(awardId: string): void {
+     this.cultureService.getApplicationChecklist(awardId).subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.checklist.set(data);
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   getStatusIcon(status: string): string {
+     const icons: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'pending': 'ri-checkbox-blank-circle-line',
+       'in-progress': 'ri-loader-4-line',
+       'completed': 'ri-checkbox-circle-fill',
+       'not-applicable': 'ri-forbid-line'
+     };
+     return icons[status] || 'ri-checkbox-blank-circle-line';
+   }
+ 
+   getStatusLabel(status: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'pending': '待處理',
+       'in-progress': '進行中',
+       'completed': '已完成',
+       'not-applicable': '不適用'
+     };
+     return labels[status] || status;
+   }
+ 
+   getSourceModuleLabel(module: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'L1': '組織管理',
+       'L2': '職能管理',
+       'L3': '教育訓練',
+       'L4': '專案管理',
+       'L5': '績效管理',
+       'L6': '文化管理'
+     };
+     return labels[module] || module;
+   }
+ 
+   getGroupedChecklist(): { category: string; items: ChecklistItem[] }[] {
+     const items = this.checklist()?.items || [];
+     const groups: Record&lt;string, ChecklistItem[]&gt; = {};
+ 
+     items.forEach(item =&gt; {
+       if (!groups[item.category]) {
+         groups[item.category] = [];
+       }
+       groups[item.category].push(item);
+     });
+ 
+     return Object.entries(groups).map(([category, items]) =&gt; ({ category, items }));
+   }
+ 
+   getCategoryProgress(items: ChecklistItem[]): number {
+     const completed = items.filter(i =&gt; i.status === 'completed').length;
+     return Math.round((completed / items.length) * 100);
+   }
+ 
+   toggleAIGenerator(): void {
+     this.showAIGenerator.set(!this.showAIGenerator());
+   }
+ 
+   generateContent(type: string): void {
+     this.generatingContent.set(true);
+     this.generatedContent.set('');
+ 
+     // 模擬 AI 生成
+     setTimeout(() =&gt; {
+       if (type === 'highlight') {
+         this.generatedContent.set(&#96;
+ ## 2024 年度人資管理亮點
+ 
+ ### 人才發展成就
+ - **TTQS 金牌認證**：連續三年獲得國家人才發展品質認證金牌，培訓體系獲國家肯定
+ - **培訓投資**：年度培訓總時數達 32,000 小時，人均培訓時數 40 小時，較去年成長 15%
+ - **培訓滿意度**：學員滿意度達 4.6/5 分，講師滿意度 4.8/5 分
+ 
+ ### 員工關懷創新
+ - **EAP 服務擴展**：新增財務與法律諮詢服務，服務使用率提升 25%
+ - **員工滿意度**：年度員工滿意度調查達 4.2/5 分，較去年提升 0.3 分
+ - **員工留任率**：關鍵人才留任率達 95%，整體留任率 92%
+ 
+ ### 績效管理革新
+ - **OKR 導入**：全公司導入 OKR 制度，目標達成率提升 18%
+ - **即時回饋**：建立即時回饋文化，每季 1:1 面談覆蓋率達 100%
+         &#96;);
+       } else if (type === 'summary') {
+         this.generatedContent.set(&#96;
+ ## 企業概況摘要
+ 
+ 本公司成立於 2015 年，專注於人力資源科技領域，致力於透過創新科技協助企業提升人才管理效能。
+ 
+ ### 核心業務
+ - 人力資源管理系統 (HRMS)
+ - 人才發展解決方案
+ - 組織效能診斷與諮詢
+ 
+ ### 經營績效
+ - 員工人數：150 人
+ - 2024 年營收成長：25%
+ - 客戶滿意度：4.7/5 分
+ - 市場佔有率：產業前三名
+ 
+ ### 企業文化
+ 秉持「創新、誠信、協作、卓越、關懷」五大核心價值，打造以人為本的工作環境。
+         &#96;);
+       }
+ 
+       this.generatingContent.set(false);
+     }, 2000);
+   }
+ 
+   exportPresentation(format: string): void {
+     console.log('Exporting presentation as:', format);
+     // 實際實作會調用後端 API 生成簡報
+   }
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,254 @@
- 
+ &lt;app-header
+   [title]="'AI 申請助理'"
+   [subtitle]="'智慧檢核 · 自動填入 · 文案產生'"
+   [showBreadcrumb]="true"
+   [breadcrumbItems]="[
+     { label: '首頁', link: '/' },
+     { label: '文化管理', link: '/culture' },
+     { label: 'AI 申請助理' }
+   ]"
+ /&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;main class="ai-assistant-page"&gt;
+   &lt;div class="assistant-layout"&gt;
+     &lt;!-- 左側：獎項選擇與檢核表 --&gt;
+     &lt;section class="main-section"&gt;
+       &lt;!-- 獎項選擇 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="award-selector"&gt;
+         &lt;h2 class="section-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-trophy-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           選擇申請獎項
+         &lt;/h2&gt;
+         &lt;div class="awards-list"&gt;
+           @for (award of awards(); track award.id) {
+             &lt;button
+               class="award-item"
+               [class.selected]="selectedAward()?.id === award.id"
+               (click)="selectAward(award)"
+             &gt;
+               &lt;div class="award-info"&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="award-name"&gt;{{ award.name }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="award-organizer"&gt;{{ award.organizer }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               @if (award.matchScore) {
+                 &lt;span class="match-badge"&gt;{{ award.matchScore }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+               }
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           }
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 檢核表 --&gt;
+       @if (checklist()) {
+         &lt;div class="checklist-section"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="checklist-header"&gt;
+             &lt;h2 class="section-title"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-list-check-2"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               申請檢核表
+             &lt;/h2&gt;
+             &lt;div class="progress-indicator"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="progress-ring"&gt;
+                 &lt;svg viewBox="0 0 36 36"&gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     class="progress-bg"
+                     d="M18 2.0845
+                       a 15.9155 15.9155 0 0 1 0 31.831
+                       a 15.9155 15.9155 0 0 1 0 -31.831"
+                   /&gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     class="progress-fill"
+                     [attr.stroke-dasharray]="checklist()?.completionRate + ', 100'"
+                     d="M18 2.0845
+                       a 15.9155 15.9155 0 0 1 0 31.831
+                       a 15.9155 15.9155 0 0 1 0 -31.831"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="progress-text"&gt;{{ checklist()?.completionRate }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;span class="progress-label"&gt;完成度&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           &lt;div class="checklist-groups"&gt;
+             @for (group of getGroupedChecklist(); track group.category) {
+               &lt;div class="checklist-group"&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="group-header"&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="group-title"&gt;{{ group.category }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="group-progress"&gt;{{ getCategoryProgress(group.items) }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                 &lt;div class="group-items"&gt;
+                   @for (item of group.items; track item.id) {
+                     &lt;div class="checklist-item" [attr.data-status]="item.status"&gt;
+                       &lt;i [class]="getStatusIcon(item.status)" class="status-icon"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                       &lt;div class="item-content"&gt;
+                         &lt;span class="item-requirement"&gt;{{ item.requirement }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                         @if (item.sourceModule) {
+                           &lt;span class="item-source"&gt;
+                             &lt;i class="ri-database-2-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                             {{ getSourceModuleLabel(item.sourceModule) }}
+                             @if (item.autoFilled) {
+                               &lt;span class="auto-badge"&gt;自動帶入&lt;/span&gt;
+                             }
+                           &lt;/span&gt;
+                         }
+                         @if (item.value) {
+                           &lt;span class="item-value"&gt;{{ item.value }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                         }
+                         @if (item.notes) {
+                           &lt;span class="item-notes"&gt;
+                             &lt;i class="ri-information-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                             {{ item.notes }}
+                           &lt;/span&gt;
+                         }
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;div class="item-actions"&gt;
+                         @if (item.status === 'pending') {
+                           &lt;button class="btn-fill"&gt;
+                             &lt;i class="ri-magic-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                             AI 填入
+                           &lt;/button&gt;
+                         }
+                         &lt;button class="btn-edit"&gt;
+                           &lt;i class="ri-edit-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                         &lt;/button&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   }
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             }
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       }
+     &lt;/section&gt;
+ 
+     &lt;!-- 右側：AI 工具面板 --&gt;
+     &lt;aside class="side-panel"&gt;
+       &lt;!-- AI 文案產生器 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="ai-generator-card"&gt;
+         &lt;h3 class="card-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-ai-generate"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           AI 文案產生器
+         &lt;/h3&gt;
+ 
+         &lt;div class="generator-options"&gt;
+           &lt;button class="generator-btn" (click)="generateContent('highlight')"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-star-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;亮點摘要&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;small&gt;自動萃取年度成果亮點&lt;/small&gt;
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;button class="generator-btn" (click)="generateContent('summary')"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-file-text-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;企業摘要&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;small&gt;產生企業簡介文案&lt;/small&gt;
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;button class="generator-btn"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-lightbulb-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;案例故事&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;small&gt;整理成功案例敘述&lt;/small&gt;
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;button class="generator-btn"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-bar-chart-grouped-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;數據報告&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;small&gt;彙整量化成效數據&lt;/small&gt;
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         @if (generatingContent()) {
+           &lt;div class="generating-indicator"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-loader-4-line spinning"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;AI 正在產生內容...&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         }
+ 
+         @if (generatedContent()) {
+           &lt;div class="generated-content"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="content-header"&gt;
+               &lt;span&gt;生成結果&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;div class="content-actions"&gt;
+                 &lt;button&gt;&lt;i class="ri-file-copy-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; 複製&lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;button&gt;&lt;i class="ri-edit-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; 編輯&lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="content-body"&gt;
+               {{ generatedContent() }}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         }
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 簡報輸出 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="export-card"&gt;
+         &lt;h3 class="card-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-slideshow-3-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           簡報輸出
+         &lt;/h3&gt;
+ 
+         &lt;div class="export-preview"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="preview-placeholder"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-presentation-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;申請簡報預覽&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         &lt;div class="export-options"&gt;
+           &lt;button class="export-btn ppt" (click)="exportPresentation('ppt')"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-file-ppt-2-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;PowerPoint&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;button class="export-btn pdf" (click)="exportPresentation('pdf')"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-file-pdf-2-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;PDF&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;button class="export-btn keynote" (click)="exportPresentation('keynote')"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-keynote-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;Keynote&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 資料來源 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="sources-card"&gt;
+         &lt;h3 class="card-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-database-2-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           資料來源模組
+         &lt;/h3&gt;
+ 
+         &lt;div class="sources-list"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="source-item connected"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-organization-chart"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;L1 組織管理&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-check-line status"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="source-item connected"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-user-settings-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;L2 職能管理&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-check-line status"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="source-item connected"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-book-open-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;L3 教育訓練&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-check-line status"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="source-item connected"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-folder-chart-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;L4 專案管理&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-check-line status"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="source-item connected"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-line-chart-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;L5 績效管理&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-check-line status"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="source-item connected"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-heart-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;span&gt;L6 文化管理&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-check-line status"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/aside&gt;
+   &lt;/div&gt;
+ &lt;/main&gt;
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
+ @use '../../../../styles/variables' as *;
+ 
+ .ai-assistant-page {
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   padding-top: calc(var(--header-height) + $spacing-lg);
+   min-height: 100vh;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ .assistant-layout {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: 1fr 400px;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .section-title {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   font-size: $font-size-lg;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-md;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 獎項選擇
+ .award-selector {
+   background: $color-pure-white;

+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;

+ 
+ .awards-list {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-wrap: wrap;

+ 
+ .award-item {
+   display: flex;

+   justify-content: space-between;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   padding: $spacing-sm $spacing-md;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border: 2px solid transparent;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+   text-align: left;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     border-color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.selected {
+     background: rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.1);
+     border-color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .award-info {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: 2px;
+ }
+ 
+ .award-name {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+ }
+ 
+ .award-organizer {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .match-badge {
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   background: $color-l6-olive;
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 600;
+ }
+ 
+ // 檢核表
+ .checklist-section {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .checklist-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: flex-start;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .progress-indicator {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .progress-ring {
+   position: relative;
+   width: 60px;
+   height: 60px;
+ 
+   svg {
+     transform: rotate(-90deg);
+   }
+ 
+   .progress-bg {
+     fill: none;
+     stroke: $color-cloud-gray;
+     stroke-width: 3;
+   }
+ 
+   .progress-fill {
+     fill: none;
+     stroke: $color-l6-olive;
+     stroke-width: 3;
+     stroke-linecap: round;
+     transition: stroke-dasharray 0.5s ease;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .progress-text {
+   position: absolute;
+   top: 50%;
+   left: 50%;
+   transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
+   font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+   font-style: italic;
+   font-size: $font-size-md;
+   font-weight: 700;
+   color: $color-l6-olive;
+ }
+ 
+ .progress-label {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .checklist-groups {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .checklist-group {
+   border: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ }
+ 
+ .group-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   padding: $spacing-sm $spacing-md;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ .group-title {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+ }
+ 
+ .group-progress {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-l6-olive;
+ }
+ 
+ .group-items {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+ }
+ 
+ .checklist-item {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: flex-start;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+   border-bottom: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+   transition: background 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:last-child {
+     border-bottom: none;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     background: rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.02);
+   }
+ 
+   .status-icon {
+     font-size: 1.25rem;
+     flex-shrink: 0;
+     margin-top: 2px;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="completed"] .status-icon {
+     color: $color-success;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="in-progress"] .status-icon {

+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="pending"] .status-icon {

+

+     color: $color-text-tertiary;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ @keyframes spin {

+   to { transform: rotate(360deg); }

+

+ .export-btn {
+   flex: 1;
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: 4px;
+   padding: $spacing-sm;
+   border: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   background: transparent;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.5rem;
+   }
+ 
+   span {
+     font-size: $font-size-xs;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.ppt {
+     i { color: #E67E22; }
+     &amp;:hover { border-color: #E67E22; background: rgba(#E67E22, 0.05); }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.pdf {

+     &amp;:hover { border-color: #E74C3C; background: rgba(#E74C3C, 0.05); }

+ 
+   &amp;.keynote {
+     i { color: #3498DB; }

+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 資料來源
+ .sources-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;

+ 
+ .sources-list {
+   display: flex;

+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .source-item {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   padding: $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+ 
+   &gt; i:first-child {

+

+

+

+ 
+   &amp;.disconnected {

+ 
+ // 響應式

+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;

+ 
+ @media (max-width: 768px) {
```

<details><summary>Tool use: **write** • Edit file: /Users/alifrt/Desktop/Bombus/bombus-system/src/app/features/culture/pages/document-analysis-page/document-analysis-page.component.ts</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 125, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,125 @@
- 
+ import { Component, ChangeDetectionStrategy, signal, inject, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
+ import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
+ import { HeaderComponent } from '../../../../shared/components/header/header.component';
+ import { CultureService } from '../../services/culture.service';
+ import { DocumentGap, ComplianceRisk } from '../../models/culture.model';
+ 
+ @Component({
+   standalone: true,
+   selector: 'app-document-analysis-page',
+   templateUrl: './document-analysis-page.component.html',
+   styleUrl: './document-analysis-page.component.scss',
+   imports: [CommonModule, HeaderComponent],
+   changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
+ })
+ export class DocumentAnalysisPageComponent implements OnInit {
+   private cultureService = inject(CultureService);
+ 
+   // State
+   loading = signal(true);
+   documentGaps = signal&lt;DocumentGap[]&gt;([]);
+   complianceRisks = signal&lt;ComplianceRisk[]&gt;([]);
+ 
+   // Summary stats
+   totalGaps = signal(0);
+   criticalGaps = signal(0);
+   openRisks = signal(0);
+   overallScore = signal(0);
+ 
+   ngOnInit(): void {
+     this.loadData();
+   }
+ 
+   loadData(): void {
+     this.loading.set(true);
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getDocumentGaps().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.documentGaps.set(data);
+       this.totalGaps.set(data.length);
+       this.criticalGaps.set(data.filter(g =&gt; g.severity === 'high' || g.severity === 'critical').length);
+     });
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getComplianceRisks().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.complianceRisks.set(data);
+       this.openRisks.set(data.filter(r =&gt; r.status === 'open').length);
+ 
+       // 計算整體分數
+       const maxRisk = data.length * 4; // 假設每個風險最高 4 分
+       const currentRisk = data.reduce((sum, r) =&gt; {
+         const riskScore = { 'low': 1, 'medium': 2, 'high': 3, 'critical': 4 };
+         return sum + (riskScore[r.riskLevel] || 0);
+       }, 0);
+       this.overallScore.set(Math.round(((maxRisk - currentRisk) / maxRisk) * 100));
+ 
+       this.loading.set(false);
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   getSeverityLabel(severity: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'low': '低',
+       'medium': '中',
+       'high': '高',
+       'critical': '嚴重'
+     };
+     return labels[severity] || severity;
+   }
+ 
+   getSeverityIcon(severity: string): string {
+     const icons: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'low': 'ri-error-warning-line',
+       'medium': 'ri-alert-line',
+       'high': 'ri-alarm-warning-line',
+       'critical': 'ri-fire-line'
+     };
+     return icons[severity] || 'ri-error-warning-line';
+   }
+ 
+   getStatusLabel(status: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'missing': '缺漏',
+       'expired': '已過期',
+       'outdated': '需更新',
+       'incomplete': '不完整',
+       'open': '待處理',
+       'in-progress': '處理中',
+       'resolved': '已解決'
+     };
+     return labels[status] || status;
+   }
+ 
+   getRiskStatusLabel(status: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'open': '待處理',
+       'in-progress': '處理中',
+       'resolved': '已解決'
+     };
+     return labels[status] || status;
+   }
+ 
+   formatDate(date: Date): string {
+     return new Date(date).toLocaleDateString('zh-TW', {
+       year: 'numeric',
+       month: 'short',
+       day: 'numeric'
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   getDaysUntilDue(date: Date): number {
+     const now = new Date();
+     const due = new Date(date);
+     const diffTime = due.getTime() - now.getTime();
+     return Math.ceil(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
+   }
+ 
+   isOverdue(date: Date): boolean {
+     return this.getDaysUntilDue(date) &lt; 0;
+   }
+ 
+   getScoreClass(score: number): string {
+     if (score &gt;= 80) return 'score-good';
+     if (score &gt;= 60) return 'score-warning';
+     return 'score-danger';
+   }
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
- 
+ &lt;app-header
+   [title]="'智慧文件分析'"
+   [subtitle]="'缺漏偵測 · 品質評估 · 合規風險'"
+   [showBreadcrumb]="true"
+   [breadcrumbItems]="[
+     { label: '首頁', link: '/' },
+     { label: '文化管理', link: '/culture' },
+     { label: '智慧文件分析' }
+   ]"
+ /&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;main class="analysis-page"&gt;
+   &lt;!-- KPI 摘要 --&gt;
+   &lt;section class="kpi-section"&gt;
+     &lt;div class="kpi-card score" [class]="getScoreClass(overallScore())"&gt;
+       &lt;div class="kpi-icon"&gt;
+         &lt;i class="ri-shield-check-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;div class="kpi-content"&gt;
+         &lt;span class="kpi-value"&gt;{{ overallScore() }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+         &lt;span class="kpi-label"&gt;整體合規分數&lt;/span&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+     &lt;div class="kpi-card gaps"&gt;
+       &lt;div class="kpi-icon"&gt;
+         &lt;i class="ri-file-damage-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;div class="kpi-content"&gt;
+         &lt;span class="kpi-value"&gt;{{ totalGaps() }}&lt;/span&gt;
+         &lt;span class="kpi-label"&gt;文件缺漏&lt;/span&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+     &lt;div class="kpi-card critical"&gt;
+       &lt;div class="kpi-icon"&gt;
+         &lt;i class="ri-alarm-warning-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;div class="kpi-content"&gt;
+         &lt;span class="kpi-value"&gt;{{ criticalGaps() }}&lt;/span&gt;
+         &lt;span class="kpi-label"&gt;高優先缺漏&lt;/span&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+     &lt;div class="kpi-card risks"&gt;
+       &lt;div class="kpi-icon"&gt;
+         &lt;i class="ri-error-warning-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;div class="kpi-content"&gt;
+         &lt;span class="kpi-value"&gt;{{ openRisks() }}&lt;/span&gt;
+         &lt;span class="kpi-label"&gt;待處理風險&lt;/span&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   &lt;/section&gt;
+ 
+   &lt;div class="analysis-layout"&gt;
+     &lt;!-- 文件缺漏 --&gt;
+     &lt;section class="gaps-section"&gt;
+       &lt;h2 class="section-title"&gt;
+         &lt;i class="ri-file-search-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+         文件缺漏偵測
+       &lt;/h2&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;div class="gaps-list"&gt;
+         @for (gap of documentGaps(); track gap.id) {
+           &lt;div class="gap-card" [attr.data-severity]="gap.severity"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="gap-header"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="severity-badge" [attr.data-severity]="gap.severity"&gt;
+                 &lt;i [class]="getSeverityIcon(gap.severity)"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 {{ getSeverityLabel(gap.severity) }}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div class="status-badge" [attr.data-status]="gap.status"&gt;
+                 {{ getStatusLabel(gap.status) }}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="gap-content"&gt;
+               &lt;h3 class="gap-title"&gt;{{ gap.requiredDocument }}&lt;/h3&gt;
+               &lt;span class="gap-category"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-folder-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 {{ gap.category }}
+               &lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="gap-meta"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="responsible"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-user-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 {{ gap.responsiblePerson }}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div class="due-date" [class.overdue]="isOverdue(gap.dueDate)"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-calendar-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 @if (isOverdue(gap.dueDate)) {
+                   已逾期 {{ -getDaysUntilDue(gap.dueDate) }} 天
+                 } @else {
+                   剩餘 {{ getDaysUntilDue(gap.dueDate) }} 天
+                 }
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="gap-recommendation"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-lightbulb-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               &lt;span&gt;{{ gap.recommendation }}&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="gap-actions"&gt;
+               &lt;button class="btn-action"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-upload-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 上傳文件
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;button class="btn-action secondary"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-more-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         }
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/section&gt;
+ 
+     &lt;!-- 合規風險 --&gt;
+     &lt;section class="risks-section"&gt;
+       &lt;h2 class="section-title"&gt;
+         &lt;i class="ri-shield-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+         合規風險儀表板
+       &lt;/h2&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;div class="risks-list"&gt;
+         @for (risk of complianceRisks(); track risk.id) {
+           &lt;div class="risk-card" [attr.data-level]="risk.riskLevel"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="risk-header"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="risk-level" [attr.data-level]="risk.riskLevel"&gt;
+                 &lt;i [class]="getSeverityIcon(risk.riskLevel)"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 {{ getSeverityLabel(risk.riskLevel) }}風險
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div class="risk-status" [attr.data-status]="risk.status"&gt;
+                 {{ getRiskStatusLabel(risk.status) }}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="risk-content"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="risk-area"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-bookmark-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 {{ risk.area }}
+               &lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;p class="risk-description"&gt;{{ risk.description }}&lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="risk-action-required"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-arrow-right-circle-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               &lt;span&gt;{{ risk.actionRequired }}&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="risk-footer"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="deadline" [class.overdue]="isOverdue(risk.deadline)"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-time-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 截止: {{ formatDate(risk.deadline) }}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;button class="btn-resolve"&gt;
+                 @if (risk.status === 'open') {
+                   開始處理
+                 } @else if (risk.status === 'in-progress') {
+                   標記完成
+                 } @else {
+                   查看詳情
+                 }
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         }
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/section&gt;
+   &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+   &lt;!-- AI 分析建議 --&gt;
+   &lt;section class="ai-insights"&gt;
+     &lt;div class="insights-header"&gt;
+       &lt;h2 class="section-title"&gt;
+         &lt;i class="ri-ai-generate"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+         AI 智慧分析建議
+       &lt;/h2&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+     &lt;div class="insights-grid"&gt;
+       &lt;div class="insight-card priority"&gt;
+         &lt;div class="insight-icon"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-focus-3-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;div class="insight-content"&gt;
+           &lt;h3&gt;優先處理建議&lt;/h3&gt;
+           &lt;p&gt;建議優先處理「性騷擾防治辦法」缺漏，此為法規強制要求，逾期可能面臨主管機關裁罰。&lt;/p&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;div class="insight-card trend"&gt;
+         &lt;div class="insight-icon"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-line-chart-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;div class="insight-content"&gt;
+           &lt;h3&gt;趨勢分析&lt;/h3&gt;
+           &lt;p&gt;本月文件缺漏數較上月減少 15%，認證類文件管理效率提升明顯。&lt;/p&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;div class="insight-card prediction"&gt;
+         &lt;div class="insight-icon"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-calendar-check-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;div class="insight-content"&gt;
+           &lt;h3&gt;到期預警&lt;/h3&gt;
+           &lt;p&gt;未來 30 天內將有 2 項認證到期，建議提前安排續證審核。&lt;/p&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   &lt;/section&gt;
+ &lt;/main&gt;
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

---
