```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,579 @@
- 
+ @use '../../../../styles/variables' as *;
+ 
+ .analysis-page {
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   padding-top: calc(var(--header-height) + $spacing-lg);
+   min-height: 100vh;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ // KPI 摘要
+ .kpi-section {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .kpi-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   position: relative;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ 
+   &amp;::before {
+     content: '';
+     position: absolute;
+     top: 0;
+     left: 0;
+     right: 0;
+     height: 4px;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.score::before { background: $color-l6-olive; }
+   &amp;.gaps::before { background: $color-warning; }
+   &amp;.critical::before { background: $color-error; }
+   &amp;.risks::before { background: $color-l4-slate; }
+ 
+   &amp;.score-good .kpi-value { color: $color-success; }
+   &amp;.score-warning .kpi-value { color: $color-warning; }
+   &amp;.score-danger .kpi-value { color: $color-error; }
+ }
+ 
+ .kpi-icon {
+   width: 56px;
+   height: 56px;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.75rem;
+   }
+ 
+   .score &amp; {
+     background: rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-l6-olive; }
+   }
+ 
+   .gaps &amp; {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-warning; }
+   }
+ 
+   .critical &amp; {
+     background: rgba($color-error, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-error; }
+   }
+ 
+   .risks &amp; {
+     background: rgba($color-l4-slate, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-l4-slate; }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .kpi-content {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: 4px;
+ }
+ 
+ .kpi-value {
+   font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+   font-style: italic;
+   font-size: 1.75rem;
+   font-weight: 700;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+ }
+ 
+ .kpi-label {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ // 佈局
+ .analysis-layout {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .section-title {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   font-size: $font-size-lg;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-md;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 文件缺漏
+ .gaps-list,
+ .risks-list {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .gap-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+   border-left: 4px solid transparent;
+ 
+   &amp;[data-severity="high"],
+   &amp;[data-severity="critical"] {
+     border-left-color: $color-error;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-severity="medium"] {
+     border-left-color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-severity="low"] {
+     border-left-color: $color-info;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .gap-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .severity-badge,
+ .status-badge {
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: 4px;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .severity-badge {
+   &amp;[data-severity="high"],
+   &amp;[data-severity="critical"] {
+     background: rgba($color-error, 0.1);
+     color: $color-error;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-severity="medium"] {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-severity="low"] {
+     background: rgba($color-info, 0.1);
+     color: $color-info;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .status-badge {
+   &amp;[data-status="missing"] {
+     background: rgba($color-error, 0.1);
+     color: $color-error;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="expired"] {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="outdated"],
+   &amp;[data-status="incomplete"] {
+     background: rgba($color-info, 0.1);
+     color: $color-info;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .gap-content {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .gap-title {
+   font-size: $font-size-md;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0 0 4px;
+ }
+ 
+ .gap-category {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: 4px;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .gap-meta {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .responsible,
+ .due-date {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: 4px;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .due-date.overdue {
+   color: $color-error;
+ }
+ 
+ .gap-recommendation {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: flex-start;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   padding: $spacing-sm;
+   background: rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.05);
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+     font-size: 1rem;
+     flex-shrink: 0;
+     margin-top: 2px;
+   }
+ 
+   span {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+     line-height: 1.5;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .gap-actions {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-action {
+   flex: 1;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   padding: $spacing-sm;
+   background: $color-l6-olive;
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   border: none;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     background: darken($color-l6-olive, 8%);
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.secondary {
+     flex: none;
+     width: 40px;
+     background: $color-cloud-gray;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+ 
+     &amp;:hover {
+       background: $color-soft-gray;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 合規風險
+ .risk-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+   border-left: 4px solid transparent;
+ 
+   &amp;[data-level="high"],
+   &amp;[data-level="critical"] {
+     border-left-color: $color-error;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-level="medium"] {
+     border-left-color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-level="low"] {
+     border-left-color: $color-info;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .risk-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .risk-level {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: 4px;
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-level="high"],
+   &amp;[data-level="critical"] {
+     background: rgba($color-error, 0.1);
+     color: $color-error;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-level="medium"] {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-level="low"] {
+     background: rgba($color-info, 0.1);
+     color: $color-info;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .risk-status {
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="open"] {
+     background: rgba($color-error, 0.1);
+     color: $color-error;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="in-progress"] {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="resolved"] {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     color: $color-success;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .risk-content {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .risk-area {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: 4px;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   color: $color-l6-olive;
+   margin-bottom: 4px;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .risk-description {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0;
+   line-height: 1.5;
+ }
+ 
+ .risk-action-required {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: flex-start;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   padding: $spacing-sm;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+     font-size: 1rem;
+     flex-shrink: 0;
+     margin-top: 2px;
+   }
+ 
+   span {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+     line-height: 1.5;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .risk-footer {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+ }
+ 
+ .deadline {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: 4px;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.overdue {
+     color: $color-error;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-resolve {
+   padding: $spacing-xs $spacing-md;
+   background: $color-l6-olive;
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   border: none;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     background: darken($color-l6-olive, 8%);
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // AI 分析建議
+ .ai-insights {
+   margin-top: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .insights-grid {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .insight-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   transition: all 0.3s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     transform: translateY(-2px);
+     box-shadow: $shadow-md;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .insight-icon {
+   width: 48px;
+   height: 48px;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   flex-shrink: 0;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.5rem;
+   }
+ 
+   .priority &amp; {
+     background: rgba($color-error, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-error; }
+   }
+ 
+   .trend &amp; {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-success; }
+   }
+ 
+   .prediction &amp; {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-warning; }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .insight-content {
+   h3 {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+     margin: 0 0 $spacing-xs;
+   }
+ 
+   p {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+     margin: 0;
+     line-height: 1.5;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 響應式
+ @media (max-width: 1024px) {
+   .kpi-section {
+     grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
+   }
+ 
+   .analysis-layout {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ 
+   .insights-grid {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ @media (max-width: 768px) {
+   .analysis-page {
+     padding: $spacing-md;
+     padding-top: calc(var(--header-height) + $spacing-md);
+   }
+ 
+   .kpi-section {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

<details><summary>Tool use: **write** • Edit file: /Users/alifrt/Desktop/Bombus/bombus-system/src/app/features/culture/pages/impact-assessment-page/impact-assessment-page.component.ts</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 95, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,95 @@
- 
+ import { Component, ChangeDetectionStrategy, signal, inject, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
+ import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
+ import { HeaderComponent } from '../../../../shared/components/header/header.component';
+ import { CultureService } from '../../services/culture.service';
+ import { AwardPotential, CultureImpactReport, HighlightSummary } from '../../models/culture.model';
+ 
+ @Component({
+   standalone: true,
+   selector: 'app-impact-assessment-page',
+   templateUrl: './impact-assessment-page.component.html',
+   styleUrl: './impact-assessment-page.component.scss',
+   imports: [CommonModule, HeaderComponent],
+   changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
+ })
+ export class ImpactAssessmentPageComponent implements OnInit {
+   private cultureService = inject(CultureService);
+ 
+   // State
+   loading = signal(true);
+   awardPotentials = signal&lt;AwardPotential[]&gt;([]);
+   impactReport = signal&lt;CultureImpactReport | null&gt;(null);
+   highlightSummary = signal&lt;HighlightSummary | null&gt;(null);
+ 
+   // Active tab
+   activeTab = signal&lt;'potential' | 'impact' | 'highlights'&gt;('potential');
+ 
+   ngOnInit(): void {
+     this.loadData();
+   }
+ 
+   loadData(): void {
+     this.loading.set(true);
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getAwardPotentials().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.awardPotentials.set(data);
+     });
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getCultureImpactReport().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.impactReport.set(data);
+     });
+ 
+     this.cultureService.getHighlightSummary().subscribe(data =&gt; {
+       this.highlightSummary.set(data);
+       this.loading.set(false);
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   setActiveTab(tab: 'potential' | 'impact' | 'highlights'): void {
+     this.activeTab.set(tab);
+   }
+ 
+   getEffortLabel(effort: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'low': '低投入',
+       'medium': '中投入',
+       'high': '高投入'
+     };
+     return labels[effort] || effort;
+   }
+ 
+   getEffortClass(effort: string): string {
+     const classes: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'low': 'effort-low',
+       'medium': 'effort-medium',
+       'high': 'effort-high'
+     };
+     return classes[effort] || '';
+   }
+ 
+   getScoreClass(score: number): string {
+     if (score &gt;= 85) return 'score-excellent';
+     if (score &gt;= 70) return 'score-good';
+     if (score &gt;= 50) return 'score-fair';
+     return 'score-poor';
+   }
+ 
+   getProbabilityClass(probability: number): string {
+     if (probability &gt;= 80) return 'prob-high';
+     if (probability &gt;= 60) return 'prob-medium';
+     return 'prob-low';
+   }
+ 
+   getSourceModuleIcon(module: string): string {
+     const icons: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'L1': 'ri-organization-chart',
+       'L2': 'ri-user-settings-line',
+       'L3': 'ri-book-open-line',
+       'L4': 'ri-folder-chart-line',
+       'L5': 'ri-line-chart-line',
+       'L6': 'ri-heart-line'
+     };
+     return icons[module] || 'ri-database-2-line';
+   }
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

@@ -1,1 +1,285 @@

+ &lt;app-header
+   [title]="'影響力評估引擎'"
+   [subtitle]="'報獎潛力 · 文化影響力 · 成果摘要'"
+   [showBreadcrumb]="true"
+   [breadcrumbItems]="[
+     { label: '首頁', link: '/' },
+     { label: '文化管理', link: '/culture' },
+     { label: '影響力評估' }
+   ]"
+ /&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;main class="impact-page"&gt;
+   &lt;!-- 頁籤導航 --&gt;
+   &lt;nav class="page-tabs"&gt;
+     &lt;button
+       class="tab-btn"
+       [class.active]="activeTab() === 'potential'"
+       (click)="setActiveTab('potential')"
+     &gt;
+       &lt;i class="ri-trophy-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+       報獎潛力分析
+     &lt;/button&gt;
+     &lt;button
+       class="tab-btn"
+       [class.active]="activeTab() === 'impact'"
+       (click)="setActiveTab('impact')"
+     &gt;
+       &lt;i class="ri-line-chart-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+       文化影響力報告
+     &lt;/button&gt;
+     &lt;button
+       class="tab-btn"
+       [class.active]="activeTab() === 'highlights'"
+       (click)="setActiveTab('highlights')"
+     &gt;
+       &lt;i class="ri-star-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+       成果亮點摘要
+     &lt;/button&gt;
+   &lt;/nav&gt;
+ 
+   &lt;!-- 報獎潛力分析 --&gt;
+   @if (activeTab() === 'potential') {
+     &lt;section class="potential-section"&gt;
+       &lt;div class="section-header"&gt;
+         &lt;h2 class="section-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-ai-generate"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           AI 報獎潛力評估
+         &lt;/h2&gt;
+         &lt;p class="section-desc"&gt;根據您的組織數據，AI 分析各獎項的獲獎機率與準備建議&lt;/p&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;div class="potentials-grid"&gt;
+         @for (potential of awardPotentials(); track potential.awardId) {
+           &lt;article class="potential-card" [class]="getScoreClass(potential.potentialScore)"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="potential-header"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="award-info"&gt;
+                 &lt;h3 class="award-name"&gt;{{ potential.awardName }}&lt;/h3&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="potential-badges"&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="effort-badge" [class]="getEffortClass(potential.estimatedEffort)"&gt;
+                     {{ getEffortLabel(potential.estimatedEffort) }}
+                   &lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div class="score-ring" [class]="getScoreClass(potential.potentialScore)"&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="score-value"&gt;{{ potential.potentialScore }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="score-label"&gt;分&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="probability-bar"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="bar-label"&gt;
+                 &lt;span&gt;獲獎機率&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="probability-value" [class]="getProbabilityClass(potential.successProbability)"&gt;
+                   {{ potential.successProbability }}%
+                 &lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div class="bar-track"&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="bar-fill" [style.width.%]="potential.successProbability"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="analysis-section"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="strengths"&gt;
+                 &lt;h4&gt;
+                   &lt;i class="ri-check-double-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                   優勢
+                 &lt;/h4&gt;
+                 &lt;ul&gt;
+                   @for (strength of potential.strengths; track strength) {
+                     &lt;li&gt;{{ strength }}&lt;/li&gt;
+                   }
+                 &lt;/ul&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;div class="gaps"&gt;
+                 &lt;h4&gt;
+                   &lt;i class="ri-error-warning-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                   待改進
+                 &lt;/h4&gt;
+                 &lt;ul&gt;
+                   @for (gap of potential.gaps; track gap) {
+                     &lt;li&gt;{{ gap }}&lt;/li&gt;
+                   }
+                 &lt;/ul&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="recommendations"&gt;
+               &lt;h4&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-lightbulb-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 建議行動
+               &lt;/h4&gt;
+               @for (action of potential.recommendedActions; track action) {
+                 &lt;div class="action-item"&gt;
+                   &lt;i class="ri-arrow-right-s-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                   &lt;span&gt;{{ action }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               }
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="card-actions"&gt;
+               &lt;button class="btn-start"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-play-circle-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 開始準備
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;button class="btn-detail"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-file-list-3-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 查看詳情
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/article&gt;
+         }
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/section&gt;
+   }
+ 
+   &lt;!-- 文化影響力報告 --&gt;
+   @if (activeTab() === 'impact' &amp;&amp; impactReport()) {
+     &lt;section class="impact-section"&gt;
+       &lt;div class="impact-header"&gt;
+         &lt;div class="impact-score-card"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="score-circle" [class]="getScoreClass(impactReport()!.overallImpactScore)"&gt;
+             &lt;span class="big-score"&gt;{{ impactReport()?.overallImpactScore }}&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="score-unit"&gt;分&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="score-info"&gt;
+             &lt;h2&gt;整體文化影響力&lt;/h2&gt;
+             &lt;p&gt;{{ impactReport()?.period }} 年度綜合評估&lt;/p&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 各維度分析 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="dimensions-grid"&gt;
+         @for (dim of impactReport()?.dimensions; track dim.name) {
+           &lt;div class="dimension-card"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="dim-header"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="dim-name"&gt;{{ dim.name }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="dim-score" [class]="getScoreClass(dim.score)"&gt;{{ dim.score }}分&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="dim-bar"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="dim-fill" [style.width.%]="dim.score"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;p class="dim-impact"&gt;{{ dim.impact }}&lt;/p&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         }
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- EAP 影響力 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="eap-impact-card"&gt;
+         &lt;h3 class="card-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-hand-heart-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           EAP 員工協助方案效益
+         &lt;/h3&gt;
+         &lt;div class="eap-metrics"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="eap-metric"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="metric-icon"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-user-follow-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="metric-info"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="metric-value"&gt;{{ impactReport()?.eapImpact?.usageRate }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="metric-label"&gt;使用率&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="eap-metric"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="metric-icon productivity"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-speed-up-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="metric-info"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="metric-value"&gt;+{{ impactReport()?.eapImpact?.productivityImprovement }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="metric-label"&gt;生產力提升&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="eap-metric"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="metric-icon retention"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-user-heart-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="metric-info"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="metric-value"&gt;-{{ impactReport()?.eapImpact?.turnoverReduction }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="metric-label"&gt;離職率降低&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="eap-metric"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="metric-icon roi"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-funds-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="metric-info"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="metric-value"&gt;{{ impactReport()?.eapImpact?.roi }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="metric-label"&gt;投資報酬率&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- 建議 --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="recommendations-card"&gt;
+         &lt;h3 class="card-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-lightbulb-flash-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           AI 改善建議
+         &lt;/h3&gt;
+         &lt;div class="recommendations-list"&gt;
+           @for (rec of impactReport()?.recommendations; track rec; let i = $index) {
+             &lt;div class="recommendation-item"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="rec-number"&gt;{{ i + 1 }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="rec-text"&gt;{{ rec }}&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           }
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/section&gt;
+   }
+ 
+   &lt;!-- 成果亮點摘要 --&gt;
+   @if (activeTab() === 'highlights' &amp;&amp; highlightSummary()) {
+     &lt;section class="highlights-section"&gt;
+       &lt;div class="section-header"&gt;
+         &lt;h2 class="section-title"&gt;
+           &lt;i class="ri-star-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           {{ highlightSummary()?.title }}
+         &lt;/h2&gt;
+         &lt;div class="export-buttons"&gt;
+           @for (format of highlightSummary()?.exportFormats; track format) {
+             &lt;button class="btn-export" [attr.data-format]="format"&gt;
+               @if (format === 'ppt') {
+                 &lt;i class="ri-file-ppt-2-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               } @else if (format === 'pdf') {
+                 &lt;i class="ri-file-pdf-2-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               } @else {
+                 &lt;i class="ri-file-word-2-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               }
+               {{ format.toUpperCase() }}
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           }
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;div class="highlights-grid"&gt;
+         @for (highlight of highlightSummary()?.highlights; track highlight.title) {
+           &lt;article class="highlight-card"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="highlight-header"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="highlight-category"&gt;{{ highlight.category }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span class="source-module"&gt;
+                 &lt;i [class]="getSourceModuleIcon(highlight.sourceModule)"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 {{ highlight.sourceModule }}
+               &lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;h3 class="highlight-title"&gt;{{ highlight.title }}&lt;/h3&gt;
+             &lt;p class="highlight-desc"&gt;{{ highlight.description }}&lt;/p&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="highlight-metrics"&gt;
+               @for (metric of highlight.metrics; track metric.label) {
+                 &lt;div class="metric-item"&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="metric-value"&gt;{{ metric.value }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="metric-label"&gt;{{ metric.label }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               }
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/article&gt;
+         }
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/section&gt;
+   }
+ &lt;/main&gt;
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ 
+   .section-desc {
+     margin: $spacing-xs 0 0;
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 報獎潛力分析
+ .potentials-grid {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(380px, 1fr));
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .potential-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-xl;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+   border-top: 4px solid transparent;
+   transition: all 0.3s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     transform: translateY(-4px);
+     box-shadow: $shadow-lg;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.score-excellent { border-top-color: $color-success; }
+   &amp;.score-good { border-top-color: $color-l6-olive; }
+   &amp;.score-fair { border-top-color: $color-warning; }
+   &amp;.score-poor { border-top-color: $color-text-tertiary; }
+ }
+ 
+ .potential-header {
+   display: flex;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   align-items: flex-start;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .award-info {
+   flex: 1;
+ }
+ 
+ .award-name {
+   font-size: $font-size-lg;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .potential-badges {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .effort-badge {
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ 
+   &amp;.effort-low {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     color: $color-success;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.effort-medium {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.effort-high {
+     background: rgba($color-error, 0.1);
+     color: $color-error;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .score-ring {
+   width: 64px;
+   height: 64px;
+   border-radius: 50%;
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+ 
+   &amp;.score-excellent { background: rgba($color-success, 0.1); .score-value { color: $color-success; } }
+   &amp;.score-good { background: rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.1); .score-value { color: $color-l6-olive; } }
+   &amp;.score-fair { background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1); .score-value { color: $color-warning; } }
+ }
+ 
+ .score-value {
+   font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+   font-style: italic;
+   font-size: 1.5rem;
+   font-weight: 700;
+   line-height: 1;
+ }
+ 
+ .score-label {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .probability-bar {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .bar-label {
+   display: flex;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-xs;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .probability-value {
+   font-weight: 600;
+ 
+   &amp;.prob-high { color: $color-success; }
+   &amp;.prob-medium { color: $color-warning; }
+   &amp;.prob-low { color: $color-text-tertiary; }
+ }
+ 
+ .bar-track {
+   height: 8px;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ }
+ 
+ .bar-fill {
+   height: 100%;
+   background: linear-gradient(90deg, $color-l6-olive, lighten($color-l6-olive, 15%));
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   transition: width 0.5s ease;
+ }
+ 
+ .analysis-section {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .strengths,
+ .gaps {
+   h4 {
+     display: flex;
+     align-items: center;
+     gap: $spacing-xs;
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     margin: 0 0 $spacing-xs;
+   }
+ 
+   ul {
+     list-style: none;
+     padding: 0;
+     margin: 0;
+ 
+     li {
+       font-size: $font-size-sm;
+       color: $color-text-secondary;
+       padding: 4px 0;
+       position: relative;
+       padding-left: $spacing-md;
+ 
+       &amp;::before {
+         content: '•';
+         position: absolute;
+         left: 0;
+       }
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .strengths h4 {
+   color: $color-success;
+ }
+ 
+ .gaps h4 {
+   color: $color-warning;
+ }
+ 
+ .recommendations {
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+   background: rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.05);
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   h4 {
+     display: flex;
+     align-items: center;
+     gap: $spacing-xs;
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+     margin: 0 0 $spacing-sm;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .action-item {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: flex-start;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   padding: 4px 0;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+     flex-shrink: 0;
+     margin-top: 2px;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .card-actions {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-start,
+ .btn-detail {
+   flex: 1;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   padding: $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-start {
+   background: $color-l6-olive;
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   border: none;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     background: darken($color-l6-olive, 8%);
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-detail {
+   background: transparent;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   border: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     border-color: $color-l6-olive;
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 文化影響力報告
+ .impact-section {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .impact-header {
+   display: flex;
+   justify-content: center;
+ }
+ 
+ .impact-score-card {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+   background: linear-gradient(135deg, $color-l6-olive 0%, darken($color-l6-olive, 10%) 100%);
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   padding: $spacing-xl;
+   border-radius: $radius-xl;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .score-circle {
+   width: 100px;
+   height: 100px;
+   border-radius: 50%;
+   background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+ 
+   .big-score {
+     font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+     font-style: italic;
+     font-size: 2.5rem;
+     font-weight: 700;
+     line-height: 1;
+   }
+ 
+   .score-unit {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     opacity: 0.8;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .score-info {
+   h2 {
+     font-size: $font-size-xl;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     margin: 0 0 $spacing-xs;
+   }
+ 
+   p {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     opacity: 0.8;
+     margin: 0;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .dimensions-grid {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .dimension-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .dim-header {
+   display: flex;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   align-items: center;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .dim-name {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+ }
+ 
+ .dim-score {
+   font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+   font-style: italic;
+   font-size: $font-size-lg;
+   font-weight: 700;
+ 
+   &amp;.score-excellent { color: $color-success; }
+   &amp;.score-good { color: $color-l6-olive; }
+   &amp;.score-fair { color: $color-warning; }
+ }
+ 
+ .dim-bar {
+   height: 6px;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   overflow: hidden;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .dim-fill {
+   height: 100%;
+   background: $color-l6-olive;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+ }
+ 
+ .dim-impact {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   margin: 0;
+   line-height: 1.4;
+ }
+ 
+ // EAP 效益
+ .eap-impact-card,
+ .recommendations-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .card-title {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   font-size: $font-size-md;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-md;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .eap-metrics {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .eap-metric {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .metric-icon {
+   width: 48px;
+   height: 48px;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   background: rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.1);
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.5rem;
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.productivity {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-success; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.retention {
+     background: rgba($color-l3-petrol, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-l3-petrol; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.roi {
+     background: rgba($color-l5-terracotta, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-l5-terracotta; }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .metric-info {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+ }
+ 
+ .metric-value {
+   font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+   font-style: italic;
+   font-size: 1.5rem;
+   font-weight: 700;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+ }
+ 
+ .metric-label {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ // 建議
+ .recommendations-list {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .recommendation-item {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: flex-start;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .rec-number {
+   width: 28px;
+   height: 28px;
+   border-radius: 50%;
+   background: $color-l6-olive;
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   flex-shrink: 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .rec-text {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   line-height: 1.5;
+ }
+ 
+ // 成果亮點
+ .highlights-section {
+   .section-header {
+     display: flex;
+     align-items: center;
+     justify-content: space-between;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .export-buttons {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-export {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   padding: $spacing-xs $spacing-md;
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.1rem;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-format="ppt"]:hover {
+     border-color: #E67E22;
+     color: #E67E22;
+     i { color: #E67E22; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-format="pdf"]:hover {
+     border-color: #E74C3C;
+     color: #E74C3C;
+     i { color: #E74C3C; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-format="word"]:hover {
+     border-color: #2980B9;
+     color: #2980B9;
+     i { color: #2980B9; }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .highlights-grid {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(340px, 1fr));
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .highlight-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+   transition: all 0.3s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     transform: translateY(-2px);
+     box-shadow: $shadow-md;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .highlight-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .highlight-category {
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   background: rgba($color-l6-olive, 0.1);
+   color: $color-l6-olive;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ }
+ 
+ .source-module {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: 4px;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-tertiary;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .highlight-title {
+   font-size: $font-size-md;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .highlight-desc {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-md;
+   line-height: 1.5;
+ }
+ 
+ .highlight-metrics {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   padding-top: $spacing-md;
+   border-top: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ .metric-item {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: 2px;
+ 
+   .metric-value {
+     font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+     font-style: italic;
+     font-size: $font-size-lg;
+     font-weight: 700;
+     color: $color-l6-olive;
+   }
+ 
+   .metric-label {
+     font-size: $font-size-xs;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // 響應式
+ @media (max-width: 1200px) {
+   .dimensions-grid {
+     grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
+   }
+ 
+   .eap-metrics {
+     grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ @media (max-width: 768px) {
+   .impact-page {
+     padding: $spacing-md;
+     padding-top: calc(var(--header-height) + $spacing-md);
+   }
+ 
+   .page-tabs {
+     flex-wrap: wrap;
+   }
+ 
+   .potentials-grid {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ 
+   .dimensions-grid {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ 
+   .eap-metrics {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ 
+   .highlights-grid {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ 
+   .impact-score-card {
+     flex-direction: column;
+     text-align: center;
+   }
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

已完成 L6 文化管理模組的建立！以下是開發摘要：

## ✅ L6 文化管理模組完成

### 建立的頁面

| 子功能 | 頁面路由 | 核心功能 |
|-------|---------|---------|
| **6.1 企業文化手冊** | `/culture/handbook` | 願景/使命/核心價值觀、文化故事分享、文化認同度調查、文化指標儀表板 |
| **6.1 EAP 員工協助** | `/culture/eap` | 5 種諮詢服務（心理/健康/法律/財務/家庭）、匿名預約、使用統計、健康促進計畫、EAP 效益分析 |
| **6.2 獎項資料庫** | `/culture/awards` | 獎項目錄、AI 匹配度推薦、截止日期提醒、申請進度追蹤、歷年成績 |
| **6.3 文件儲存庫** | `/culture/documents` | 文件分類管理、版本控制、到期提醒、儲存空間監控、活動記錄 |
| **6.4 AI 申請助理** | `/culture/ai-assistant` | 智慧檢核表、跨模組資料萃取自動填入、AI 文案產生器、簡報輸出（PPT/PDF/Keynote） |
| **6.5 智慧文件分析** | `/culture/analysis` | 文件缺漏偵測、合規風險儀表板、AI 分析建議 |
| **6.6 影響力評估** | `/culture/impact` | 報獎潛力 AI 評估、文化影響力報告、EAP ROI 分析、成果亮點摘要輸出 |

### 建立的檔案

```
src/app/features/culture/
├── culture.routes.ts           # 路由配置
├── models/
│   └── culture.model.ts        # 完整資料模型（20+ 介面）
├── services/
│   └── culture.service.ts      # API 服務與模擬資料
└── pages/
    ├── culture-handbook-page/  # 企業文化手冊
    ├── eap-page/               # EAP 員工協助方案
    ├── awards-page/            # 獎項資料庫
    ├── document-repository-page/ # 文件儲存庫
    ├── ai-assistant-page/      # AI 申請助理
    ├── document-analysis-page/ # 智慧文件分析
    └── impact-assessment-page/ # 影響力評估
```

### 側邊欄導航

文化管理模組已加入側邊欄，包含 7 個子功能選項。

所有頁面均採用：
- ✅ Standalone Components
- ✅ Signals 狀態管理
- ✅ OnPush 變更偵測
- ✅ 響應式設計 (RWD)
- ✅ 莫蘭迪配色（L6 乾燥玫瑰色系）
- ✅ Bento UI 風格

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="write">

**Chunk 1**

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,220 @@
- 
+ // ===== 1.2 人才庫與再接觸管理 =====
+ 
+ export type TalentStatus = 'active' | 'contacted' | 'scheduled' | 'hired' | 'declined' | 'expired';
+ export type TalentSource = '104' | 'linkedin' | 'referral' | 'website' | 'headhunter' | 'other';
+ export type ContactPriority = 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
+ 
+ export interface TalentTag {
+   id: string;
+   name: string;
+   color: string;
+   category: 'skill' | 'experience' | 'education' | 'personality' | 'custom';
+ }
+ 
+ export interface TalentCandidate {
+   id: string;
+   name: string;
+   email: string;
+   phone: string;
+   avatar?: string;
+   currentPosition: string;
+   currentCompany: string;
+   experience: number; // years
+   education: string;
+   expectedSalary?: string;
+   source: TalentSource;
+   status: TalentStatus;
+   tags: TalentTag[];
+   skills: string[];
+   matchScore: number; // AI 媒合分數 0-100
+   addedDate: Date;
+   lastContactDate?: Date;
+   nextContactDate?: Date;
+   contactPriority: ContactPriority;
+   notes: string;
+   resumeUrl?: string;
+ }
+ 
+ export interface TalentContactHistory {
+   id: string;
+   candidateId: string;
+   contactDate: Date;
+   contactMethod: 'phone' | 'email' | 'interview' | 'meeting';
+   contactBy: string;
+   summary: string;
+   outcome: 'positive' | 'neutral' | 'negative' | 'no-response';
+   nextAction?: string;
+   nextActionDate?: Date;
+ }
+ 
+ export interface TalentReminder {
+   id: string;
+   candidateId: string;
+   candidateName: string;
+   reminderDate: Date;
+   reminderType: 'contact' | 'follow-up' | 'interview' | 'offer';
+   message: string;
+   isCompleted: boolean;
+   assignedTo: string;
+ }
+ 
+ export interface TalentMatchResult {
+   candidateId: string;
+   jobId: string;
+   jobTitle: string;
+   matchScore: number;
+   matchReasons: string[];
+   gaps: string[];
+   recommendation: 'highly-recommended' | 'recommended' | 'consider' | 'not-recommended';
+ }
+ 
+ export interface TalentPoolStats {
+   totalCandidates: number;
+   activeCount: number;
+   contactedThisMonth: number;
+   hiredThisYear: number;
+   avgMatchScore: number;
+   sourceBreakdown: { source: TalentSource; count: number; percentage: number }[];
+   statusBreakdown: { status: TalentStatus; count: number }[];
+   upcomingReminders: number;
+ }
+ 
+ // ===== 1.3 員工檔案與歷程管理 =====
+ 
+ export type EmployeeStatus = 'active' | 'probation' | 'leave' | 'resigned' | 'terminated';
+ export type DocumentStatus = 'valid' | 'expiring' | 'expired' | 'pending';
+ 
+ export interface Employee {
+   id: string;
+   employeeNo: string;
+   name: string;
+   email: string;
+   phone: string;
+   avatar?: string;
+   department: string;
+   position: string;
+   level: string; // 職等
+   grade: string; // 職級
+   manager: string;
+   managerId: string;
+   hireDate: Date;
+   status: EmployeeStatus;
+   contractType: 'full-time' | 'part-time' | 'contract' | 'intern';
+   workLocation: string;
+   salary?: number;
+   skills: string[];
+   certifications: string[];
+ }
+ 
+ export interface EmployeeDetail extends Employee {
+   birthDate?: Date;
+   address?: string;
+   emergencyContact?: {
+     name: string;
+     relation: string;
+     phone: string;
+   };
+   education: {
+     degree: string;
+     school: string;
+     major: string;
+     graduationYear: number;
+   }[];
+   workHistory: JobChange[];
+   documents: EmployeeDocument[];
+   training: EmployeeTraining[];
+   performance: EmployeePerformance[];
+   roi: EmployeeROI;
+ }
+ 
+ export interface JobChange {
+   id: string;
+   effectiveDate: Date;
+   changeType: 'promotion' | 'transfer' | 'demotion' | 'title-change' | 'salary-adjustment';
+   fromPosition: string;
+   toPosition: string;
+   fromDepartment: string;
+   toDepartment: string;
+   fromLevel?: string;
+   toLevel?: string;
+   salaryChange?: number;
+   reason: string;
+   approvedBy: string;
+ }
+ 
+ export interface EmployeeDocument {
+   id: string;
+   name: string;
+   type: 'contract' | 'certificate' | 'id' | 'insurance' | 'tax' | 'other';
+   uploadDate: Date;
+   expiryDate?: Date;
+   status: DocumentStatus;
+   version: string;
+   filePath: string;
+   uploadedBy: string;
+ }
+ 
+ export interface EmployeeTraining {
+   id: string;
+   courseName: string;
+   courseType: 'internal' | 'external' | 'online';
+   completionDate: Date;
+   score?: number;
+   certificate?: string;
+   hours: number;
+   cost: number;
+ }
+ 
+ export interface EmployeePerformance {
+   id: string;
+   period: string;
+   overallScore: number;
+   grade: 'A' | 'B' | 'C' | 'D' | 'E';
+   goals: { name: string; achievement: number }[];
+   strengths: string[];
+   improvements: string[];
+   reviewedBy: string;
+   reviewDate: Date;
+ }
+ 
+ export interface EmployeeROI {
+   employeeId: string;
+   period: string;
+   salaryCost: number;
+   trainingCost: number;
+   benefitsCost: number;
+   totalCost: number;
+   revenue: number;
+   projectValue: number;
+   productivity: number;
+   roi: number; // (revenue + projectValue) / totalCost * 100
+   trend: 'up' | 'stable' | 'down';
+   comparison: {
+     departmentAvg: number;
+     companyAvg: number;
+   };
+ }
+ 
+ export interface EmployeeStats {
+   totalEmployees: number;
+   activeCount: number;
+   probationCount: number;
+   avgTenure: number; // months
+   departmentBreakdown: { department: string; count: number; percentage: number }[];
+   levelBreakdown: { level: string; count: number }[];
+   expiringDocuments: number;
+   upcomingAnniversaries: { employeeId: string; name: string; date: Date; years: number }[];
+ }
+ 
+ export interface AuditLog {
+   id: string;
+   employeeId: string;
+   action: 'create' | 'update' | 'delete' | 'view' | 'export';
+   field?: string;
+   oldValue?: string;
+   newValue?: string;
+   performedBy: string;
+   performedAt: Date;
+   ipAddress?: string;
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

+       message: '面試：1/8 下午 2:00，準備會議室與面試官', isCompleted: false, assignedTo: '人資部 李先生'
+     },
+     {
+       id: '3', candidateId: '5', candidateName: '李國華',
+       reminderDate: new Date('2025-01-03'), reminderType: 'offer' as const,
+       message: '準備正式 offer，需與財務確認薪資方案', isCompleted: false, assignedTo: '人資部 陳經理'
+     },
+     {
+       id: '4', candidateId: '2', candidateName: '林雅婷',
+       reminderDate: new Date('2025-01-10'), reminderType: 'follow-up' as const,
+       message: '主管面試後續追蹤', isCompleted: false, assignedTo: '人資部 王小姐'
+     }
+   ];
+ 
+   // ===== API Methods =====
+ 
+   getTalentPoolStats(): Observable&lt;TalentPoolStats&gt; {
+     const stats: TalentPoolStats = {
+       totalCandidates: this.mockCandidates.length,
+       activeCount: this.mockCandidates.filter(c =&gt; c.status === 'active').length,
+       contactedThisMonth: this.mockCandidates.filter(c =&gt; c.status === 'contacted').length,
+       hiredThisYear: 2,
+       avgMatchScore: Math.round(this.mockCandidates.reduce((sum, c) =&gt; sum + c.matchScore, 0) / this.mockCandidates.length),
+       sourceBreakdown: [
+         { source: '104' as const, count: 2, percentage: 33 },
+         { source: 'linkedin' as const, count: 1, percentage: 17 },
+         { source: 'referral' as const, count: 1, percentage: 17 },
+         { source: 'website' as const, count: 1, percentage: 17 },
+         { source: 'headhunter' as const, count: 1, percentage: 16 }
+       ],
+       statusBreakdown: [
+         { status: 'active' as const, count: 2 },
+         { status: 'contacted' as const, count: 2 },
+         { status: 'scheduled' as const, count: 1 },
+         { status: 'declined' as const, count: 1 }
+       ],
+       upcomingReminders: this.mockReminders.filter(r =&gt; !r.isCompleted).length
+     };
+     return of(stats).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   getCandidates(): Observable&lt;TalentCandidate[]&gt; {
+     return of(this.mockCandidates).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   getCandidateById(id: string): Observable&lt;TalentCandidate | undefined&gt; {
+     return of(this.mockCandidates.find(c =&gt; c.id === id)).pipe(delay(200));
+   }
+ 
+   getContactHistory(candidateId: string): Observable&lt;TalentContactHistory[]&gt; {
+     return of(this.mockContactHistory.filter(h =&gt; h.candidateId === candidateId)).pipe(delay(200));
+   }
+ 
+   getReminders(): Observable&lt;TalentReminder[]&gt; {
+     return of(this.mockReminders.sort((a, b) =&gt; a.reminderDate.getTime() - b.reminderDate.getTime())).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   getTags(): Observable&lt;TalentTag[]&gt; {
+     return of(this.mockTags).pipe(delay(200));
+   }
+ 
+   getMatchResults(candidateId: string): Observable&lt;TalentMatchResult[]&gt; {
+     const mockResults: TalentMatchResult[] = [
+       {
+         candidateId, jobId: '1', jobTitle: '資深前端工程師',
+         matchScore: 92, matchReasons: ['Angular 專長符合', '5年以上經驗', '薪資範圍符合'],
+         gaps: ['需加強 React 經驗'], recommendation: 'highly-recommended' as const
+       },
+       {
+         candidateId, jobId: '2', jobTitle: '全端工程師',
+         matchScore: 78, matchReasons: ['前端技術符合', '有團隊合作經驗'],
+         gaps: ['後端經驗較少', '需學習 Node.js'], recommendation: 'recommended' as const
+       }
+     ];
+     return of(mockResults).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   // Actions
+   addContact(candidateId: string, contact: Partial&lt;TalentContactHistory&gt;): Observable&lt;boolean&gt; {
+     return of(true).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   updateCandidateStatus(candidateId: string, status: TalentCandidate['status']): Observable&lt;boolean&gt; {
+     return of(true).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   completeReminder(reminderId: string): Observable&lt;boolean&gt; {
+     return of(true).pipe(delay(200));
+   }
+ }
+

@@ -1,14 +1,243 @@
- import { Component, ChangeDetectionStrategy } from '@angular/core';
+ import {
+   Component,
+   ChangeDetectionStrategy,
+   inject,
+   signal,
+   computed,
+   OnInit
+ } from '@angular/core';
+ import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
+ import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
  import { HeaderComponent } from '../../../../shared/components/header/header.component';
+ import { NotificationService } from '../../../../core/services/notification.service';
+ import { TalentPoolService } from '../../services/talent-pool.service';
+ import {
+   TalentCandidate,
+   TalentPoolStats,
+   TalentReminder,
+   TalentTag,
+   TalentContactHistory,
+   TalentMatchResult
+ } from '../../models/talent-pool.model';
  
  @Component({
    selector: 'app-talent-pool-page',
    standalone: true,
-   imports: [HeaderComponent],
+   imports: [CommonModule, FormsModule, HeaderComponent],
    templateUrl: './talent-pool-page.component.html',
    styleUrl: './talent-pool-page.component.scss',
    changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
  })
- export class TalentPoolPageComponent {}
- 
+ export class TalentPoolPageComponent implements OnInit {
+   private talentPoolService = inject(TalentPoolService);
+   private notificationService = inject(NotificationService);
+ 
+   // State
+   stats = signal&lt;TalentPoolStats | null&gt;(null);
+   candidates = signal&lt;TalentCandidate[]&gt;([]);
+   reminders = signal&lt;TalentReminder[]&gt;([]);
+   tags = signal&lt;TalentTag[]&gt;([]);
+   selectedCandidate = signal&lt;TalentCandidate | null&gt;(null);
+   contactHistory = signal&lt;TalentContactHistory[]&gt;([]);
+   matchResults = signal&lt;TalentMatchResult[]&gt;([]);
+ 
+   // Filters
+   searchQuery = signal&lt;string&gt;('');
+   selectedStatus = signal&lt;string&gt;('all');
+   selectedSource = signal&lt;string&gt;('all');
+   selectedTags = signal&lt;string[]&gt;([]);
+ 
+   // UI State
+   loading = signal&lt;boolean&gt;(false);
+   showContactModal = signal&lt;boolean&gt;(false);
+   activeTab = signal&lt;'info' | 'history' | 'match'&gt;('info');
+ 
+   // Computed
+   filteredCandidates = computed(() =&gt; {
+     let result = this.candidates();
+     const query = this.searchQuery().toLowerCase();
+     const status = this.selectedStatus();
+     const source = this.selectedSource();
+     const tagIds = this.selectedTags();
+ 
+     if (query) {
+       result = result.filter(c =&gt;
+         c.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
+         c.currentPosition.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
+         c.currentCompany.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
+         c.skills.some(s =&gt; s.toLowerCase().includes(query))
+       );
+     }
+ 
+     if (status !== 'all') {
+       result = result.filter(c =&gt; c.status === status);
+     }
+ 
+     if (source !== 'all') {
+       result = result.filter(c =&gt; c.source === source);
+     }
+ 
+     if (tagIds.length &gt; 0) {
+       result = result.filter(c =&gt; c.tags.some(t =&gt; tagIds.includes(t.id)));
+     }
+ 
+     return result;
+   });
+ 
+   upcomingReminders = computed(() =&gt; {
+     return this.reminders().filter(r =&gt; !r.isCompleted).slice(0, 5);
+   });
+ 
+   ngOnInit(): void {
+     this.loadData();
+   }
+ 
+   loadData(): void {
+     this.loading.set(true);
+ 
+     this.talentPoolService.getTalentPoolStats().subscribe(stats =&gt; {
+       this.stats.set(stats);
+     });
+ 
+     this.talentPoolService.getCandidates().subscribe(candidates =&gt; {
+       this.candidates.set(candidates);
+       this.loading.set(false);
+     });
+ 
+     this.talentPoolService.getReminders().subscribe(reminders =&gt; {
+       this.reminders.set(reminders);
+     });
+ 
+     this.talentPoolService.getTags().subscribe(tags =&gt; {
+       this.tags.set(tags);
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   selectCandidate(candidate: TalentCandidate): void {
+     this.selectedCandidate.set(candidate);
+     this.activeTab.set('info');
+ 
+     // Load contact history
+     this.talentPoolService.getContactHistory(candidate.id).subscribe(history =&gt; {
+       this.contactHistory.set(history);
+     });
+ 
+     // Load match results
+     this.talentPoolService.getMatchResults(candidate.id).subscribe(results =&gt; {
+       this.matchResults.set(results);
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   closeDetail(): void {
+     this.selectedCandidate.set(null);
+   }
+ 
+   setActiveTab(tab: 'info' | 'history' | 'match'): void {
+     this.activeTab.set(tab);
+   }
+ 
+   toggleTag(tagId: string): void {
+     const current = this.selectedTags();
+     if (current.includes(tagId)) {
+       this.selectedTags.set(current.filter(id =&gt; id !== tagId));
+     } else {
+       this.selectedTags.set([...current, tagId]);
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   openContactModal(): void {
+     this.showContactModal.set(true);
+   }
+ 
+   closeContactModal(): void {
+     this.showContactModal.set(false);
+   }
+ 
+   addContact(): void {
+     const candidate = this.selectedCandidate();
+     if (!candidate) return;
+ 
+     this.talentPoolService.addContact(candidate.id, {
+       contactDate: new Date(),
+       contactMethod: 'email',
+       summary: '新增聯繫紀錄',
+       outcome: 'neutral'
+     }).subscribe(() =&gt; {
+       this.notificationService.success('聯繫紀錄已新增');
+       this.closeContactModal();
+       this.talentPoolService.getContactHistory(candidate.id).subscribe(history =&gt; {
+         this.contactHistory.set(history);
+       });
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   updateStatus(status: TalentCandidate['status']): void {
+     const candidate = this.selectedCandidate();
+     if (!candidate) return;
+ 
+     this.talentPoolService.updateCandidateStatus(candidate.id, status).subscribe(() =&gt; {
+       this.notificationService.success('狀態已更新');
+       this.loadData();
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   completeReminder(reminder: TalentReminder): void {
+     this.talentPoolService.completeReminder(reminder.id).subscribe(() =&gt; {
+       this.notificationService.success('提醒已完成');
+       this.talentPoolService.getReminders().subscribe(reminders =&gt; {
+         this.reminders.set(reminders);
+       });
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   getStatusLabel(status: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'active': '待聯繫',
+       'contacted': '已聯繫',
+       'scheduled': '已排程',
+       'hired': '已錄用',
+       'declined': '已婉拒',
+       'expired': '已過期'
+     };
+     return labels[status] || status;
+   }
+ 
+   getSourceLabel(source: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       '104': '104人力銀行',
+       'linkedin': 'LinkedIn',
+       'referral': '內部推薦',
+       'website': '官網投遞',
+       'headhunter': '獵頭推薦',
+       'other': '其他'
+     };
+     return labels[source] || source;
+   }
+ 
+   getPriorityClass(priority: string): string {
+     return &#96;priority-${priority}&#96;;
+   }
+ 
+   getMatchClass(score: number): string {
+     if (score &gt;= 90) return 'match-excellent';
+     if (score &gt;= 80) return 'match-good';
+     if (score &gt;= 70) return 'match-fair';
+     return 'match-low';
+   }
+ 
+   getRecommendationLabel(rec: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'highly-recommended': '強烈推薦',
+       'recommended': '推薦',
+       'consider': '可考慮',
+       'not-recommended': '不推薦'
+     };
+     return labels[rec] || rec;
+   }
+ 
+   formatDate(date: Date | undefined): string {
+     if (!date) return '-';
+     return new Date(date).toLocaleDateString('zh-TW');
+   }
+ }
  
```

</details>

</tool-use>

+             &lt;span class="kpi-value"&gt;{{ s.activeCount }}&lt;/span&gt;

+     &lt;div class="page-layout"&gt;

+                 type="text"
+                 class="search-input"
+                 placeholder="搜尋姓名、職位、公司、技能..."

+             &lt;/div&gt;

+                 &lt;option value="active"&gt;待聯繫&lt;/option&gt;
+                 &lt;option value="contacted"&gt;已聯繫&lt;/option&gt;
+                 &lt;option value="scheduled"&gt;已排程&lt;/option&gt;
+                 &lt;option value="hired"&gt;已錄用&lt;/option&gt;
+                 &lt;option value="declined"&gt;已婉拒&lt;/option&gt;
+               &lt;/select&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;select class="filter-select" [value]="selectedSource()" (change)="selectedSource.set($any($event.target).value)"&gt;
+                 &lt;option value="all"&gt;所有來源&lt;/option&gt;
+                 &lt;option value="104"&gt;104人力銀行&lt;/option&gt;
+                 &lt;option value="linkedin"&gt;LinkedIn&lt;/option&gt;

+                 &lt;option value="website"&gt;官網投遞&lt;/option&gt;

+               &lt;/select&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           &lt;!-- Tag Filters --&gt;
+           &lt;div class="tag-filters"&gt;
+             &lt;span class="tag-label"&gt;標籤篩選：&lt;/span&gt;
+             @for (tag of tags(); track tag.id) {
+               &lt;button
+                 type="button"
+                 class="tag-btn"
+                 [class.active]="selectedTags().includes(tag.id)"
+                 [style.--tag-color]="tag.color"
+                 (click)="toggleTag(tag.id)"&gt;
+                 {{ tag.name }}
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             }
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/section&gt;
+ 
+         &lt;!-- Candidate List --&gt;
+         &lt;section class="candidate-list-section"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="section-header"&gt;
+             &lt;h3&gt;人才列表&lt;/h3&gt;
+             &lt;span class="count-badge"&gt;{{ filteredCandidates().length }} 人&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           &lt;div class="candidate-grid"&gt;
+             @for (candidate of filteredCandidates(); track candidate.id) {
+               &lt;article
+                 class="candidate-card"
+                 [class.selected]="selectedCandidate()?.id === candidate.id"
+                 [attr.data-priority]="candidate.contactPriority"
+                 (click)="selectCandidate(candidate)"&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="candidate-header"&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="candidate-avatar"&gt;
+                     {{ candidate.name.charAt(0) }}
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="candidate-info"&gt;
+                     &lt;h4 class="candidate-name"&gt;{{ candidate.name }}&lt;/h4&gt;
+                     &lt;p class="candidate-position"&gt;{{ candidate.currentPosition }}&lt;/p&gt;
+                     &lt;p class="candidate-company"&gt;{{ candidate.currentCompany }}&lt;/p&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="match-score" [class]="getMatchClass(candidate.matchScore)"&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="score-value"&gt;{{ candidate.matchScore }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="score-label"&gt;媒合度&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                 &lt;div class="candidate-meta"&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="meta-item"&gt;
+                     &lt;i class="ri-time-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                     {{ candidate.experience }}年經驗
+                   &lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="meta-item"&gt;
+                     &lt;i class="ri-map-pin-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                     {{ getSourceLabel(candidate.source) }}
+                   &lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                 &lt;div class="candidate-tags"&gt;
+                   @for (tag of candidate.tags.slice(0, 3); track tag.id) {
+                     &lt;span class="tag" [style.background]="tag.color + '20'" [style.color]="tag.color"&gt;
+                       {{ tag.name }}
+                     &lt;/span&gt;
+                   }
+                   @if (candidate.tags.length &gt; 3) {
+                     &lt;span class="tag more"&gt;+{{ candidate.tags.length - 3 }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   }
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                 &lt;div class="candidate-footer"&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="status-badge status-{{ candidate.status }}"&gt;
+                     {{ getStatusLabel(candidate.status) }}
+                   &lt;/span&gt;
+                   @if (candidate.nextContactDate) {
+                     &lt;span class="next-contact"&gt;
+                       &lt;i class="ri-calendar-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                       {{ formatDate(candidate.nextContactDate) }}
+                     &lt;/span&gt;
+                   }
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/article&gt;
+             } @empty {
+               &lt;div class="empty-state"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-user-search-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 &lt;p&gt;沒有找到符合條件的人才&lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             }
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/section&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- Side Panel --&gt;
+       &lt;aside class="side-panel"&gt;
+         &lt;!-- Upcoming Reminders --&gt;
+         &lt;section class="card reminder-section"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="card-header"&gt;
+             &lt;h4 class="card-title"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-notification-3-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               待處理提醒
+             &lt;/h4&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="card-body"&gt;
+             @for (reminder of upcomingReminders(); track reminder.id) {
+               &lt;div class="reminder-item" [attr.data-type]="reminder.reminderType"&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="reminder-date"&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="date-day"&gt;{{ reminder.reminderDate | date:'dd' }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="date-month"&gt;{{ reminder.reminderDate | date:'MMM' }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="reminder-content"&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="reminder-name"&gt;{{ reminder.candidateName }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="reminder-message"&gt;{{ reminder.message }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;button type="button" class="btn-complete" (click)="completeReminder(reminder); $event.stopPropagation()"&gt;
+                   &lt;i class="ri-check-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             } @empty {
+               &lt;p class="empty-text"&gt;沒有待處理的提醒&lt;/p&gt;
+             }
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/section&gt;
+ 
+         &lt;!-- Source Distribution --&gt;
+         @if (stats(); as s) {
+           &lt;section class="card source-section"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="card-header"&gt;
+               &lt;h4 class="card-title"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-pie-chart-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 來源分布
+               &lt;/h4&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="card-body"&gt;
+               @for (item of s.sourceBreakdown; track item.source) {
+                 &lt;div class="source-item"&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="source-name"&gt;{{ getSourceLabel(item.source) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="source-bar-container"&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="source-bar" [style.width.%]="item.percentage"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="source-count"&gt;{{ item.count }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               }
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/section&gt;
+         }
+       &lt;/aside&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+     &lt;!-- Candidate Detail Modal --&gt;
+     @if (selectedCandidate(); as candidate) {
+       &lt;div class="detail-overlay" (click)="closeDetail()"&gt;
+         &lt;div class="detail-modal" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="modal-header"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="candidate-profile"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="profile-avatar"&gt;{{ candidate.name.charAt(0) }}&lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div class="profile-info"&gt;
+                 &lt;h3&gt;{{ candidate.name }}&lt;/h3&gt;
+                 &lt;p&gt;{{ candidate.currentPosition }} &amp;#64; {{ candidate.currentCompany }}&lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;button type="button" class="btn-close" (click)="closeDetail()"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-close-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           &lt;div class="modal-tabs"&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               type="button"
+               class="tab-btn"
+               [class.active]="activeTab() === 'info'"
+               (click)="setActiveTab('info')"&gt;
+               基本資料
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               type="button"
+               class="tab-btn"
+               [class.active]="activeTab() === 'history'"
+               (click)="setActiveTab('history')"&gt;
+               聯繫紀錄
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               type="button"
+               class="tab-btn"
+               [class.active]="activeTab() === 'match'"
+               (click)="setActiveTab('match')"&gt;
+               職缺媒合
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           &lt;div class="modal-content"&gt;
+             @if (activeTab() === 'info') {
+               &lt;div class="info-grid"&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="info-item"&gt;
+                   &lt;label&gt;Email&lt;/label&gt;
+                   &lt;span&gt;{{ candidate.email }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="info-item"&gt;
+                   &lt;label&gt;電話&lt;/label&gt;
+                   &lt;span&gt;{{ candidate.phone }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="info-item"&gt;
+                   &lt;label&gt;經驗年資&lt;/label&gt;
+                   &lt;span&gt;{{ candidate.experience }} 年&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="info-item"&gt;
+                   &lt;label&gt;學歷&lt;/label&gt;
+                   &lt;span&gt;{{ candidate.education }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="info-item"&gt;
+                   &lt;label&gt;期望薪資&lt;/label&gt;
+                   &lt;span&gt;{{ candidate.expectedSalary || '面議' }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="info-item"&gt;
+                   &lt;label&gt;來源&lt;/label&gt;
+                   &lt;span&gt;{{ getSourceLabel(candidate.source) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;div class="info-section"&gt;
+                 &lt;h4&gt;專業技能&lt;/h4&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="skill-tags"&gt;
+                   @for (skill of candidate.skills; track skill) {
+                     &lt;span class="skill-tag"&gt;{{ skill }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   }
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;div class="info-section"&gt;
+                 &lt;h4&gt;標籤&lt;/h4&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="tag-list"&gt;
+                   @for (tag of candidate.tags; track tag.id) {
+                     &lt;span class="tag" [style.background]="tag.color + '20'" [style.color]="tag.color"&gt;
+                       {{ tag.name }}
+                     &lt;/span&gt;
+                   }
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;div class="info-section"&gt;
+                 &lt;h4&gt;備註&lt;/h4&gt;
+                 &lt;p class="notes"&gt;{{ candidate.notes || '無備註' }}&lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             }
+ 
+             @if (activeTab() === 'history') {
+               &lt;div class="history-list"&gt;
+                 @for (history of contactHistory(); track history.id) {
+                   &lt;div class="history-item" [attr.data-outcome]="history.outcome"&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="history-date"&gt;{{ formatDate(history.contactDate) }}&lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="history-content"&gt;
+                       &lt;div class="history-header"&gt;
+                         &lt;span class="history-method"&gt;
+                           @switch (history.contactMethod) {
+                             @case ('phone') { &lt;i class="ri-phone-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; 電話 }
+                             @case ('email') { &lt;i class="ri-mail-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; 信件 }
+                             @case ('interview') { &lt;i class="ri-user-voice-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; 面試 }
+                             @case ('meeting') { &lt;i class="ri-team-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; 會面 }
+                           }
+                         &lt;/span&gt;
+                         &lt;span class="history-by"&gt;{{ history.contactBy }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;p class="history-summary"&gt;{{ history.summary }}&lt;/p&gt;
+                       @if (history.nextAction) {
+                         &lt;p class="history-next"&gt;
+                           &lt;i class="ri-arrow-right-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                           下一步：{{ history.nextAction }}
+                         &lt;/p&gt;
+                       }
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 } @empty {
+                   &lt;p class="empty-text"&gt;尚無聯繫紀錄&lt;/p&gt;
+                 }
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;button type="button" class="btn-add-contact" (click)="openContactModal()"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-add-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 新增聯繫紀錄
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             }
+ 
+             @if (activeTab() === 'match') {
+               &lt;div class="match-list"&gt;
+                 @for (match of matchResults(); track match.jobId) {
+                   &lt;div class="match-card" [class]="getMatchClass(match.matchScore)"&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="match-header"&gt;
+                       &lt;h5&gt;{{ match.jobTitle }}&lt;/h5&gt;
+                       &lt;div class="match-score-badge"&gt;{{ match.matchScore }}%&lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="match-reasons"&gt;
+                       &lt;h6&gt;&lt;i class="ri-check-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; 符合條件&lt;/h6&gt;
+                       &lt;ul&gt;
+                         @for (reason of match.matchReasons; track reason) {
+                           &lt;li&gt;{{ reason }}&lt;/li&gt;
+                         }
+                       &lt;/ul&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                     @if (match.gaps.length &gt; 0) {
+                       &lt;div class="match-gaps"&gt;
+                         &lt;h6&gt;&lt;i class="ri-error-warning-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; 待補強&lt;/h6&gt;
+                         &lt;ul&gt;
+                           @for (gap of match.gaps; track gap) {
+                             &lt;li&gt;{{ gap }}&lt;/li&gt;
+                           }
+                         &lt;/ul&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                     }
+                     &lt;div class="match-recommendation"&gt;
+                       &lt;span class="rec-badge rec-{{ match.recommendation }}"&gt;
+                         {{ getRecommendationLabel(match.recommendation) }}
+                       &lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 } @empty {
+                   &lt;p class="empty-text"&gt;尚無媒合職缺&lt;/p&gt;
+                 }
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             }
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           &lt;div class="modal-footer"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="status-actions"&gt;
+               &lt;span class="current-status status-{{ candidate.status }}"&gt;
+                 {{ getStatusLabel(candidate.status) }}
+               &lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;div class="status-buttons"&gt;
+                 &lt;button type="button" class="btn-status" (click)="updateStatus('contacted')"&gt;
+                   &lt;i class="ri-phone-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; 標記已聯繫
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;button type="button" class="btn-status" (click)="updateStatus('scheduled')"&gt;
+                   &lt;i class="ri-calendar-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; 安排面試
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     }
+   &lt;/div&gt;
+ &lt;/main&gt;
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

+   padding-top: calc(var(--header-height) + $spacing-lg);
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
