```diff
+ }
+ 
+ .content-container {
+   max-width: 1600px;
+   margin: 0 auto;
+ }
+ 
+ // ===== KPI Section =====
+ .kpi-section {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ 
+   @media (max-width: $breakpoint-xl) {
+     grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
+   }
+ 
+   @media (max-width: $breakpoint-md) {
+     grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .kpi-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .kpi-icon {
+   width: 48px;
+   height: 48px;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   background: rgba($color-l1-sage, 0.1);
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.5rem;
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.active {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-success; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.contacted {
+     background: rgba($color-info, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-info; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.score {
+     background: rgba($color-l3-petrol, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-l3-petrol; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.reminder {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-warning; }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .kpi-content {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+ }
+ 
+ .kpi-value {
+   font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+   font-style: italic;
+   font-size: 1.75rem;
+   font-weight: 700;
+   color: $color-text-dark;
+ }
+ 
+ .kpi-label {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ // ===== Page Layout =====
+ .page-layout {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: 1fr 320px;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+ 
+   @media (max-width: $breakpoint-lg) {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .card-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   padding: $spacing-md $spacing-lg;
+   border-bottom: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ .card-title {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   font-size: $font-size-base;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .card-body {
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ // ===== Filter Section =====
+ .filter-section {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .filter-row {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   @media (max-width: $breakpoint-md) {
+     flex-direction: column;
+     align-items: stretch;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .search-box {
+   flex: 1;
+   position: relative;
+ 
+   i {
+     position: absolute;
+     left: $spacing-md;
+     top: 50%;
+     transform: translateY(-50%);
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+   }
+ 
+   .search-input {
+     width: 100%;
+     padding: $spacing-sm $spacing-md $spacing-sm 40px;
+     border: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+     border-radius: $radius-md;
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     transition: border-color 0.2s ease;
+ 
+     &amp;:focus {
+       outline: none;
+       border-color: $color-l1-sage;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .filter-group {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .filter-select {
+   padding: $spacing-sm $spacing-md;
+   border: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   cursor: pointer;
+ 
+   &amp;:focus {
+     outline: none;
+     border-color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .tag-filters {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   flex-wrap: wrap;
+ }
+ 
+ .tag-label {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   margin-right: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .tag-btn {
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   border: 1px solid var(--tag-color, $color-soft-gray);
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   background: transparent;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: var(--tag-color, $color-text-secondary);
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     background: var(--tag-color, $color-soft-gray);
+     color: $color-pure-white;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.active {
+     background: var(--tag-color, $color-l1-sage);
+     color: $color-pure-white;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // ===== Candidate List =====
+ .section-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   h3 {
+     font-size: $font-size-lg;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-text-dark;
+     margin: 0;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .count-badge {
+   padding: 2px $spacing-sm;
+   background: rgba($color-l1-sage, 0.1);
+   color: $color-l1-sage;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ }
+ 
+ .candidate-grid {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(320px, 1fr));
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .candidate-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+   border: 2px solid transparent;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     box-shadow: $shadow-md;
+     transform: translateY(-2px);
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.selected {
+     border-color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-priority="high"] {
+     border-left: 4px solid $color-error;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-priority="medium"] {
+     border-left: 4px solid $color-warning;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .candidate-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: flex-start;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .candidate-avatar {
+   width: 48px;
+   height: 48px;
+   border-radius: 50%;
+   background: linear-gradient(135deg, $color-l1-sage 0%, $color-l1-sage-dark 100%);
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   font-size: 1.25rem;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   flex-shrink: 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .candidate-info {
+   flex: 1;
+   min-width: 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .candidate-name {
+   font-size: $font-size-base;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-dark;
+   margin: 0 0 4px;
+ }
+ 
+ .candidate-position {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .candidate-company {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   margin: 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .match-score {
+   text-align: center;
+   padding: $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   background: rgba($color-l1-sage, 0.1);
+ 
+   .score-value {
+     display: block;
+     font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+     font-style: italic;
+     font-size: 1.25rem;
+     font-weight: 700;
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ 
+   .score-label {
+     font-size: 10px;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.match-excellent {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     .score-value { color: $color-success; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.match-good {
+     background: rgba($color-l3-petrol, 0.1);
+     .score-value { color: $color-l3-petrol; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.match-fair {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     .score-value { color: $color-warning; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.match-low {
+     background: rgba($color-muted-gray, 0.1);
+     .score-value { color: $color-muted-gray; }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .candidate-meta {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .meta-item {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: 4px;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .candidate-tags {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   flex-wrap: wrap;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .tag {
+   padding: 2px $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+ 
+   &amp;.more {
+     background: rgba($color-l1-sage, 0.1);
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .candidate-footer {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   padding-top: $spacing-sm;
+   border-top: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ .status-badge {
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ 
+   &amp;.status-active {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     color: $color-success;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.status-contacted {
+     background: rgba($color-info, 0.1);
+     color: $color-info;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.status-scheduled {
+     background: rgba($color-l3-petrol, 0.1);
+     color: $color-l3-petrol;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.status-hired {
+     background: rgba($color-l1-sage, 0.1);
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.status-declined {
+     background: rgba($color-error, 0.1);
+     color: $color-error;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .next-contact {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: 4px;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ // ===== Side Panel =====
+ .side-panel {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .reminder-section {
+   .card-body {
+     padding: $spacing-md;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .reminder-item {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: flex-start;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   padding: $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+   background: rgba($color-warning, 0.05);
+   border-left: 3px solid $color-warning;
+ 
+   &amp;[data-type="interview"] {
+     background: rgba($color-l3-petrol, 0.05);
+     border-left-color: $color-l3-petrol;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-type="offer"] {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.05);
+     border-left-color: $color-success;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .reminder-date {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   align-items: center;
+   padding: $spacing-xs $spacing-sm;
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-sm;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .date-day {
+   font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+   font-size: 1.25rem;
+   font-weight: 700;
+   color: $color-text-dark;
+ }
+ 
+ .date-month {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   text-transform: uppercase;
+ }
+ 
+ .reminder-content {
+   flex: 1;
+   min-width: 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .reminder-name {
+   display: block;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-dark;
+ }
+ 
+ .reminder-message {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   display: -webkit-box;
+   -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
+   -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-complete {
+   width: 28px;
+   height: 28px;
+   border-radius: 50%;
+   border: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+   background: transparent;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     background: $color-success;
+     border-color: $color-success;
+     color: $color-pure-white;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // Source Section
+ .source-item {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .source-name {
+   width: 100px;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .source-bar-container {
+   flex: 1;
+   height: 8px;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ }
+ 
+ .source-bar {
+   height: 100%;
+   background: $color-l1-sage;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+ }
+ 
+ .source-count {
+   width: 24px;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   text-align: right;
+ }
+ 
+ // ===== Detail Modal =====
+ .detail-overlay {
+   position: fixed;
+   top: 0;
+   left: 0;
+   right: 0;
+   bottom: 0;
+   background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   z-index: 1000;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .detail-modal {
+   width: 100%;
+   max-width: 640px;
+   max-height: 90vh;
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-xl;
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ }
+ 
+ .modal-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   border-bottom: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ .candidate-profile {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .profile-avatar {
+   width: 56px;
+   height: 56px;
+   border-radius: 50%;
+   background: linear-gradient(135deg, $color-l1-sage 0%, $color-l1-sage-dark 100%);
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   font-size: 1.5rem;
+   font-weight: 600;
+ }
+ 
+ .profile-info {
+   h3 {
+     font-size: $font-size-lg;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-text-dark;
+     margin: 0 0 4px;
+   }
+ 
+   p {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+     margin: 0;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-close {
+   width: 36px;
+   height: 36px;
+   border-radius: 50%;
+   border: none;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     background: $color-soft-gray;
+     color: $color-text-dark;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .modal-tabs {
+   display: flex;
+   border-bottom: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ .tab-btn {
+   flex: 1;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+   border: none;
+   background: transparent;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+   position: relative;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.active {
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+ 
+     &amp;::after {
+       content: '';
+       position: absolute;
+       bottom: 0;
+       left: 0;
+       right: 0;
+       height: 2px;
+       background: $color-l1-sage;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .modal-content {
+   flex: 1;
+   overflow-y: auto;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .info-grid {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .info-item {
+   label {
+     display: block;
+     font-size: $font-size-xs;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+     margin-bottom: 4px;
+   }
+ 
+   span {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     color: $color-text-dark;
+     font-weight: 500;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .info-section {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ 
+   h4 {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+     margin: 0 0 $spacing-sm;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .skill-tags {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   flex-wrap: wrap;
+ }
+ 
+ .skill-tag {
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .tag-list {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   flex-wrap: wrap;
+ }
+ 
+ .notes {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   line-height: 1.6;
+ }
+ 
+ // History Tab
+ .history-list {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .history-item {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ 
+   &amp;[data-outcome="positive"] {
+     border-left: 3px solid $color-success;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-outcome="negative"] {
+     border-left: 3px solid $color-error;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-outcome="neutral"],
+   &amp;[data-outcome="no-response"] {
+     border-left: 3px solid $color-muted-gray;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .history-date {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   white-space: nowrap;
+ }
+ 
+ .history-content {
+   flex: 1;
+ }
+ 
+ .history-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   margin-bottom: 4px;
+ }
+ 
+ .history-method {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: 4px;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   color: $color-text-dark;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .history-by {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .history-summary {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0 0 4px;
+ }
+ 
+ .history-next {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: 4px;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-l1-sage;
+   margin: 0;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.8rem;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-add-contact {
+   width: 100%;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+   border: 1px dashed $color-soft-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   background: transparent;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     border-color: $color-l1-sage;
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // Match Tab
+ .match-list {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .match-card {
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+ 
+   &amp;.match-excellent {
+     border-left: 4px solid $color-success;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.match-good {
+     border-left: 4px solid $color-l3-petrol;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.match-fair {
+     border-left: 4px solid $color-warning;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .match-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   h5 {
+     font-size: $font-size-base;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-text-dark;
+     margin: 0;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .match-score-badge {
+   font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+   font-style: italic;
+   font-size: 1.25rem;
+   font-weight: 700;
+   color: $color-success;
+ }
+ 
+ .match-reasons,
+ .match-gaps {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ 
+   h6 {
+     display: flex;
+     align-items: center;
+     gap: 4px;
+     font-size: $font-size-xs;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+     margin: 0 0 4px;
+ 
+     i {
+       font-size: 0.9rem;
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   ul {
+     margin: 0;
+     padding-left: $spacing-lg;
+ 
+     li {
+       font-size: $font-size-sm;
+       color: $color-text-primary;
+       margin-bottom: 2px;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .match-reasons {
+   h6 i { color: $color-success; }
+ }
+ 
+ .match-gaps {
+   h6 i { color: $color-warning; }
+ }
+ 
+ .match-recommendation {
+   text-align: right;
+ }
+ 
+ .rec-badge {
+   display: inline-block;
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ 
+   &amp;.rec-highly-recommended {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     color: $color-success;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.rec-recommended {
+     background: rgba($color-l3-petrol, 0.1);
+     color: $color-l3-petrol;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.rec-consider {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.rec-not-recommended {
+     background: rgba($color-error, 0.1);
+     color: $color-error;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // Modal Footer
+ .modal-footer {
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   border-top: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ .status-actions {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+ }
+ 
+ .current-status {
+   padding: $spacing-xs $spacing-md;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ }
+ 
+ .status-buttons {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-status {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   padding: $spacing-sm $spacing-md;
+   border: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   background: transparent;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     border-color: $color-l1-sage;
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // Empty State
+ .empty-state {
+   text-align: center;
+   padding: $spacing-2xl;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 3rem;
+     margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+     opacity: 0.5;
+   }
+ 
+   p {
+     margin: 0;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .empty-text {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   text-align: center;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="write">

<details><summary>Tool use: **write** • Edit file: /Users/alifrt/Desktop/Bombus/bombus-system/src/app/features/employee/pages/profile-page/profile-page.component.ts</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 310, lines removed: 14

```diff
@@ -1,14 +1,310 @@
- import { Component, ChangeDetectionStrategy } from '@angular/core';
- import { HeaderComponent } from '../../../../shared/components/header/header.component';
- 
- @Component({
-   selector: 'app-profile-page',
-   standalone: true,
-   imports: [HeaderComponent],
-   templateUrl: './profile-page.component.html',
-   styleUrl: './profile-page.component.scss',
-   changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
- })
- export class ProfilePageComponent {}
- 
- 
+ import {
+   Component,
+   ChangeDetectionStrategy,
+   inject,
+   signal,
+   computed,
+   OnInit,
+   ElementRef,
+   ViewChild,
+   OnDestroy
+ } from '@angular/core';
+ import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
+ import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
+ import { HeaderComponent } from '../../../../shared/components/header/header.component';
+ import { NotificationService } from '../../../../core/services/notification.service';
+ import { EmployeeService } from '../../services/employee.service';
+ import {
+   Employee,
+   EmployeeDetail,
+   EmployeeStats,
+   EmployeeDocument,
+   AuditLog
+ } from '../../models/talent-pool.model';
+ import * as echarts from 'echarts';
+ 
+ @Component({
+   selector: 'app-profile-page',
+   standalone: true,
+   imports: [CommonModule, FormsModule, HeaderComponent],
+   templateUrl: './profile-page.component.html',
+   styleUrl: './profile-page.component.scss',
+   changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
+ })
+ export class ProfilePageComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {
+   @ViewChild('roiChart') roiChartRef!: ElementRef&lt;HTMLDivElement&gt;;
+ 
+   private employeeService = inject(EmployeeService);
+   private notificationService = inject(NotificationService);
+ 
+   private roiChart: echarts.ECharts | null = null;
+   private resizeHandler = () =&gt; this.roiChart?.resize();
+ 
+   // State
+   stats = signal&lt;EmployeeStats | null&gt;(null);
+   employees = signal&lt;Employee[]&gt;([]);
+   selectedEmployee = signal&lt;EmployeeDetail | null&gt;(null);
+   expiringDocuments = signal&lt;EmployeeDocument[]&gt;([]);
+   auditLogs = signal&lt;AuditLog[]&gt;([]);
+   departmentROI = signal&lt;{ department: string; avgROI: number; employeeCount: number }[]&gt;([]);
+ 
+   // Filters
+   searchQuery = signal&lt;string&gt;('');
+   selectedDepartment = signal&lt;string&gt;('all');
+   selectedStatus = signal&lt;string&gt;('all');
+ 
+   // UI State
+   loading = signal&lt;boolean&gt;(false);
+   activeTab = signal&lt;'info' | 'history' | 'documents' | 'performance' | 'roi'&gt;('info');
+ 
+   // Computed
+   filteredEmployees = computed(() =&gt; {
+     let result = this.employees();
+     const query = this.searchQuery().toLowerCase();
+     const department = this.selectedDepartment();
+     const status = this.selectedStatus();
+ 
+     if (query) {
+       result = result.filter(e =&gt;
+         e.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
+         e.employeeNo.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
+         e.position.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
+         e.email.toLowerCase().includes(query)
+       );
+     }
+ 
+     if (department !== 'all') {
+       result = result.filter(e =&gt; e.department === department);
+     }
+ 
+     if (status !== 'all') {
+       result = result.filter(e =&gt; e.status === status);
+     }
+ 
+     return result;
+   });
+ 
+   departments = computed(() =&gt; {
+     const depts = new Set(this.employees().map(e =&gt; e.department));
+     return Array.from(depts);
+   });
+ 
+   ngOnInit(): void {
+     this.loadData();
+     window.addEventListener('resize', this.resizeHandler);
+   }
+ 
+   ngOnDestroy(): void {
+     window.removeEventListener('resize', this.resizeHandler);
+     this.roiChart?.dispose();
+   }
+ 
+   loadData(): void {
+     this.loading.set(true);
+ 
+     this.employeeService.getEmployeeStats().subscribe(stats =&gt; {
+       this.stats.set(stats);
+     });
+ 
+     this.employeeService.getEmployees().subscribe(employees =&gt; {
+       this.employees.set(employees);
+       this.loading.set(false);
+     });
+ 
+     this.employeeService.getExpiringDocuments().subscribe(docs =&gt; {
+       this.expiringDocuments.set(docs);
+     });
+ 
+     this.employeeService.getDepartmentROI().subscribe(roi =&gt; {
+       this.departmentROI.set(roi);
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   selectEmployee(employee: Employee): void {
+     this.loading.set(true);
+     this.activeTab.set('info');
+ 
+     this.employeeService.getEmployeeById(employee.id).subscribe(detail =&gt; {
+       this.selectedEmployee.set(detail || null);
+       this.loading.set(false);
+ 
+       if (detail) {
+         this.employeeService.getAuditLogs(employee.id).subscribe(logs =&gt; {
+           this.auditLogs.set(logs);
+         });
+ 
+         // Initialize ROI chart after a brief delay to ensure DOM is ready
+         setTimeout(() =&gt; this.initROIChart(), 100);
+       }
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   closeDetail(): void {
+     this.selectedEmployee.set(null);
+   }
+ 
+   setActiveTab(tab: 'info' | 'history' | 'documents' | 'performance' | 'roi'): void {
+     this.activeTab.set(tab);
+     if (tab === 'roi') {
+       setTimeout(() =&gt; this.initROIChart(), 100);
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   initROIChart(): void {
+     const employee = this.selectedEmployee();
+     if (!employee || !this.roiChartRef?.nativeElement) return;
+ 
+     if (!this.roiChart) {
+       this.roiChart = echarts.init(this.roiChartRef.nativeElement);
+     }
+ 
+     const roi = employee.roi;
+     const option: echarts.EChartsOption = {
+       tooltip: {
+         trigger: 'axis',
+         axisPointer: { type: 'shadow' }
+       },
+       legend: {
+         data: ['個人 ROI', '部門平均', '公司平均'],
+         bottom: 0
+       },
+       grid: {
+         left: '3%',
+         right: '4%',
+         bottom: '15%',
+         top: '10%',
+         containLabel: true
+       },
+       xAxis: {
+         type: 'category',
+         data: ['2024 Q1', '2024 Q2', '2024 Q3', '2024 Q4'],
+         axisLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#E8E8EA' } },
+         axisLabel: { color: '#6B7280' }
+       },
+       yAxis: {
+         type: 'value',
+         name: 'ROI %',
+         axisLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#E8E8EA' } },
+         axisLabel: { color: '#6B7280' },
+         splitLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#F5F5F7' } }
+       },
+       series: [
+         {
+           name: '個人 ROI',
+           type: 'bar',
+           data: [180, 210, 235, roi.roi],
+           itemStyle: { color: '#8DA399' }
+         },
+         {
+           name: '部門平均',
+           type: 'line',
+           data: [165, 170, 175, roi.comparison.departmentAvg],
+           lineStyle: { color: '#7F9CA0' },
+           itemStyle: { color: '#7F9CA0' }
+         },
+         {
+           name: '公司平均',
+           type: 'line',
+           data: [150, 155, 160, roi.comparison.companyAvg],
+           lineStyle: { color: '#9A8C98', type: 'dashed' },
+           itemStyle: { color: '#9A8C98' }
+         }
+       ]
+     };
+ 
+     this.roiChart.setOption(option);
+   }
+ 
+   exportEmployeeData(): void {
+     const employee = this.selectedEmployee();
+     if (!employee) return;
+ 
+     this.employeeService.exportEmployeeData(employee.id).subscribe(() =&gt; {
+       this.notificationService.success('員工資料已匯出');
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   getStatusLabel(status: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'active': '在職',
+       'probation': '試用期',
+       'leave': '留職停薪',
+       'resigned': '已離職',
+       'terminated': '資遣'
+     };
+     return labels[status] || status;
+   }
+ 
+   getDocumentStatusLabel(status: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'valid': '有效',
+       'expiring': '即將到期',
+       'expired': '已過期',
+       'pending': '待審核'
+     };
+     return labels[status] || status;
+   }
+ 
+   getDocumentTypeLabel(type: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'contract': '勞動契約',
+       'certificate': '證照/證書',
+       'id': '身分證明',
+       'insurance': '保險文件',
+       'tax': '稅務文件',
+       'other': '其他'
+     };
+     return labels[type] || type;
+   }
+ 
+   getChangeTypeLabel(type: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'promotion': '晉升',
+       'transfer': '調動',
+       'demotion': '降級',
+       'title-change': '職稱變更',
+       'salary-adjustment': '薪資調整'
+     };
+     return labels[type] || type;
+   }
+ 
+   getGradeLabel(grade: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'A': '優秀',
+       'B': '良好',
+       'C': '合格',
+       'D': '待改善',
+       'E': '不合格'
+     };
+     return labels[grade] || grade;
+   }
+ 
+   getAuditActionLabel(action: string): string {
+     const labels: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
+       'create': '新增',
+       'update': '更新',
+       'delete': '刪除',
+       'view': '查看',
+       'export': '匯出'
+     };
+     return labels[action] || action;
+   }
+ 
+   formatDate(date: Date | undefined): string {
+     if (!date) return '-';
+     return new Date(date).toLocaleDateString('zh-TW');
+   }
+ 
+   formatDateTime(date: Date): string {
+     return new Date(date).toLocaleString('zh-TW');
+   }
+ 
+   formatCurrency(amount: number): string {
+     return new Intl.NumberFormat('zh-TW', {
+       style: 'currency',
+       currency: 'TWD',
+       maximumFractionDigits: 0
+     }).format(amount);
+   }
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
+             &lt;i class="ri-calendar-check-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="kpi-content"&gt;
+             &lt;span class="kpi-value"&gt;{{ s.avgTenure }}&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="kpi-label"&gt;平均年資(月)&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;div class="kpi-card"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="kpi-icon warning"&gt;
+             &lt;i class="ri-file-warning-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="kpi-content"&gt;
+             &lt;span class="kpi-value"&gt;{{ s.expiringDocuments }}&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;span class="kpi-label"&gt;到期文件&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/section&gt;
+     }
+ 
+     &lt;div class="page-layout"&gt;
+       &lt;!-- Main Content --&gt;
+       &lt;div class="main-area"&gt;
+         &lt;!-- Filter Bar --&gt;
+         &lt;section class="filter-section card"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="filter-row"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="search-box"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-search-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               &lt;input
+                 type="text"
+                 class="search-input"
+                 placeholder="搜尋姓名、員工編號、職位..."
+                 [value]="searchQuery()"
+                 (input)="searchQuery.set($any($event.target).value)"&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div class="filter-group"&gt;
+               &lt;select class="filter-select" [value]="selectedDepartment()" (change)="selectedDepartment.set($any($event.target).value)"&gt;
+                 &lt;option value="all"&gt;所有部門&lt;/option&gt;
+                 @for (dept of departments(); track dept) {
+                   &lt;option [value]="dept"&gt;{{ dept }}&lt;/option&gt;
+                 }
+               &lt;/select&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;select class="filter-select" [value]="selectedStatus()" (change)="selectedStatus.set($any($event.target).value)"&gt;
+                 &lt;option value="all"&gt;所有狀態&lt;/option&gt;
+                 &lt;option value="active"&gt;在職&lt;/option&gt;
+                 &lt;option value="probation"&gt;試用期&lt;/option&gt;
+                 &lt;option value="leave"&gt;留職停薪&lt;/option&gt;
+                 &lt;option value="resigned"&gt;已離職&lt;/option&gt;
+               &lt;/select&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;button type="button" class="btn-export"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-download-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 匯出
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/section&gt;
+ 
+         &lt;!-- Employee Table --&gt;
+         &lt;section class="employee-table-section card"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="table-wrapper"&gt;
+             &lt;table class="employee-table"&gt;
+               &lt;thead&gt;
+                 &lt;tr&gt;
+                   &lt;th&gt;員工&lt;/th&gt;
+                   &lt;th&gt;部門&lt;/th&gt;
+                   &lt;th&gt;職位&lt;/th&gt;
+                   &lt;th&gt;職等&lt;/th&gt;
+                   &lt;th&gt;到職日&lt;/th&gt;
+                   &lt;th&gt;狀態&lt;/th&gt;
+                   &lt;th&gt;操作&lt;/th&gt;
+                 &lt;/tr&gt;
+               &lt;/thead&gt;
+               &lt;tbody&gt;
+                 @for (employee of filteredEmployees(); track employee.id) {
+                   &lt;tr [class.selected]="selectedEmployee()?.id === employee.id"&gt;
+                     &lt;td&gt;
+                       &lt;div class="employee-cell"&gt;
+                         &lt;div class="employee-avatar"&gt;{{ employee.name.charAt(0) }}&lt;/div&gt;
+                         &lt;div class="employee-info"&gt;
+                           &lt;span class="employee-name"&gt;{{ employee.name }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                           &lt;span class="employee-no"&gt;{{ employee.employeeNo }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                         &lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;/td&gt;
+                     &lt;td&gt;{{ employee.department }}&lt;/td&gt;
+                     &lt;td&gt;{{ employee.position }}&lt;/td&gt;
+                     &lt;td&gt;{{ employee.level }}&lt;/td&gt;
+                     &lt;td&gt;{{ formatDate(employee.hireDate) }}&lt;/td&gt;
+                     &lt;td&gt;
+                       &lt;span class="status-badge status-{{ employee.status }}"&gt;
+                         {{ getStatusLabel(employee.status) }}
+                       &lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;/td&gt;
+                     &lt;td&gt;
+                       &lt;button type="button" class="btn-view" (click)="selectEmployee(employee)"&gt;
+                         &lt;i class="ri-eye-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                         查看
+                       &lt;/button&gt;
+                     &lt;/td&gt;
+                   &lt;/tr&gt;
+                 } @empty {
+                   &lt;tr&gt;
+                     &lt;td colspan="7" class="empty-cell"&gt;
+                       &lt;div class="empty-state"&gt;
+                         &lt;i class="ri-user-search-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                         &lt;p&gt;沒有找到符合條件的員工&lt;/p&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;/td&gt;
+                   &lt;/tr&gt;
+                 }
+               &lt;/tbody&gt;
+             &lt;/table&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/section&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;!-- Side Panel --&gt;
+       &lt;aside class="side-panel"&gt;
+         &lt;!-- Document Alerts --&gt;
+         &lt;section class="card alert-section"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="card-header"&gt;
+             &lt;h4 class="card-title"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-file-warning-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               文件到期提醒
+             &lt;/h4&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="card-body"&gt;
+             @for (doc of expiringDocuments(); track doc.id) {
+               &lt;div class="alert-item" [attr.data-status]="doc.status"&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="alert-icon"&gt;
+                   &lt;i class="ri-file-text-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="alert-content"&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="alert-name"&gt;{{ doc.name }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="alert-date"&gt;
+                     到期：{{ formatDate(doc.expiryDate) }}
+                   &lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="alert-badge alert-{{ doc.status }}"&gt;
+                   {{ getDocumentStatusLabel(doc.status) }}
+                 &lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             } @empty {
+               &lt;p class="empty-text"&gt;沒有即將到期的文件&lt;/p&gt;
+             }
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/section&gt;
+ 
+         &lt;!-- Department ROI --&gt;
+         &lt;section class="card roi-section"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="card-header"&gt;
+             &lt;h4 class="card-title"&gt;
+               &lt;i class="ri-funds-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               部門 ROI 概覽
+             &lt;/h4&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div class="card-body"&gt;
+             @for (dept of departmentROI(); track dept.department) {
+               &lt;div class="roi-item"&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="roi-info"&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="roi-name"&gt;{{ dept.department }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="roi-count"&gt;{{ dept.employeeCount }} 人&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="roi-bar-container"&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="roi-bar" [style.width.%]="dept.avgROI / 4"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="roi-value" [class.positive]="dept.avgROI &gt; 100"&gt;
+                   {{ dept.avgROI }}%
+                 &lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             }
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/section&gt;
+ 
+         &lt;!-- Upcoming Anniversaries --&gt;
+         @if (stats(); as s) {
+           &lt;section class="card anniversary-section"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="card-header"&gt;
+               &lt;h4 class="card-title"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-cake-2-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 即將到職週年
+               &lt;/h4&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="card-body"&gt;
+               @for (ann of s.upcomingAnniversaries; track ann.employeeId) {
+                 &lt;div class="anniversary-item"&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="anniversary-info"&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="anniversary-name"&gt;{{ ann.name }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="anniversary-date"&gt;{{ formatDate(ann.date) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;span class="anniversary-years"&gt;{{ ann.years }} 年&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               }
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/section&gt;
+         }
+       &lt;/aside&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+     &lt;!-- Employee Detail Modal --&gt;
+     @if (selectedEmployee(); as employee) {
+       &lt;div class="detail-overlay" (click)="closeDetail()"&gt;
+         &lt;div class="detail-modal" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()"&gt;
+           &lt;div class="modal-header"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="employee-profile"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="profile-avatar"&gt;{{ employee.name.charAt(0) }}&lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div class="profile-info"&gt;
+                 &lt;h3&gt;{{ employee.name }}&lt;/h3&gt;
+                 &lt;p&gt;{{ employee.position }} · {{ employee.department }}&lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;span class="employee-badge"&gt;{{ employee.employeeNo }}&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div class="header-actions"&gt;
+               &lt;button type="button" class="btn-action" (click)="exportEmployeeData()"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-download-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;button type="button" class="btn-close" (click)="closeDetail()"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-close-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           &lt;div class="modal-tabs"&gt;
+             &lt;button type="button" class="tab-btn" [class.active]="activeTab() === 'info'" (click)="setActiveTab('info')"&gt;
+               基本資料
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;button type="button" class="tab-btn" [class.active]="activeTab() === 'history'" (click)="setActiveTab('history')"&gt;
+               職務異動
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;button type="button" class="tab-btn" [class.active]="activeTab() === 'documents'" (click)="setActiveTab('documents')"&gt;
+               文件管理
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;button type="button" class="tab-btn" [class.active]="activeTab() === 'performance'" (click)="setActiveTab('performance')"&gt;
+               績效紀錄
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;button type="button" class="tab-btn" [class.active]="activeTab() === 'roi'" (click)="setActiveTab('roi')"&gt;
+               ROI 分析
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           &lt;div class="modal-content"&gt;
+             &lt;!-- Info Tab --&gt;
+             @if (activeTab() === 'info') {
+               &lt;div class="info-section"&gt;
+                 &lt;h4&gt;基本資訊&lt;/h4&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="info-grid"&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="info-item"&gt;
+                     &lt;label&gt;Email&lt;/label&gt;
+                     &lt;span&gt;{{ employee.email }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="info-item"&gt;
+                     &lt;label&gt;電話&lt;/label&gt;
+                     &lt;span&gt;{{ employee.phone }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="info-item"&gt;
+                     &lt;label&gt;到職日&lt;/label&gt;
+                     &lt;span&gt;{{ formatDate(employee.hireDate) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="info-item"&gt;
+                     &lt;label&gt;合約類型&lt;/label&gt;
+                     &lt;span&gt;{{ employee.contractType === 'full-time' ? '正職' : '其他' }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="info-item"&gt;
+                     &lt;label&gt;工作地點&lt;/label&gt;
+                     &lt;span&gt;{{ employee.workLocation }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="info-item"&gt;
+                     &lt;label&gt;直屬主管&lt;/label&gt;
+                     &lt;span&gt;{{ employee.manager }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;div class="info-section"&gt;
+                 &lt;h4&gt;學歷&lt;/h4&gt;
+                 @for (edu of employee.education; track edu.graduationYear) {
+                   &lt;div class="education-item"&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="edu-degree"&gt;{{ edu.degree }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="edu-school"&gt;{{ edu.school }} - {{ edu.major }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="edu-year"&gt;{{ edu.graduationYear }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 }
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;div class="info-section"&gt;
+                 &lt;h4&gt;技能與證照&lt;/h4&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="skill-tags"&gt;
+                   @for (skill of employee.skills; track skill) {
+                     &lt;span class="skill-tag"&gt;{{ skill }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   }
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="cert-tags"&gt;
+                   @for (cert of employee.certifications; track cert) {
+                     &lt;span class="cert-tag"&gt;
+                       &lt;i class="ri-award-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                       {{ cert }}
+                     &lt;/span&gt;
+                   }
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;!-- Audit Log Section --&gt;
+               &lt;div class="info-section"&gt;
+                 &lt;h4&gt;操作記錄&lt;/h4&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="audit-list"&gt;
+                   @for (log of auditLogs(); track log.id) {
+                     &lt;div class="audit-item"&gt;
+                       &lt;span class="audit-action audit-{{ log.action }}"&gt;
+                         {{ getAuditActionLabel(log.action) }}
+                       &lt;/span&gt;
+                       @if (log.field) {
+                         &lt;span class="audit-field"&gt;{{ log.field }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                       }
+                       &lt;span class="audit-by"&gt;{{ log.performedBy }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                       &lt;span class="audit-time"&gt;{{ formatDateTime(log.performedAt) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   }
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             }
+ 
+             &lt;!-- History Tab --&gt;
+             @if (activeTab() === 'history') {
+               &lt;div class="history-timeline"&gt;
+                 @for (change of employee.workHistory; track change.id) {
+                   &lt;div class="timeline-item" [attr.data-type]="change.changeType"&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="timeline-marker"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="timeline-content"&gt;
+                       &lt;div class="timeline-header"&gt;
+                         &lt;span class="change-type"&gt;{{ getChangeTypeLabel(change.changeType) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                         &lt;span class="change-date"&gt;{{ formatDate(change.effectiveDate) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;div class="change-detail"&gt;
+                         @if (change.changeType === 'promotion' || change.changeType === 'demotion') {
+                           &lt;p&gt;{{ change.fromPosition }} → {{ change.toPosition }}&lt;/p&gt;
+                           &lt;p class="level-change"&gt;{{ change.fromLevel }} → {{ change.toLevel }}&lt;/p&gt;
+                         }
+                         @if (change.changeType === 'transfer') {
+                           &lt;p&gt;{{ change.fromDepartment }} → {{ change.toDepartment }}&lt;/p&gt;
+                         }
+                         @if (change.salaryChange) {
+                           &lt;p class="salary-change" [class.positive]="change.salaryChange &gt; 0"&gt;
+                             薪資調整：{{ change.salaryChange &gt; 0 ? '+' : '' }}{{ formatCurrency(change.salaryChange) }}
+                           &lt;/p&gt;
+                         }
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;p class="change-reason"&gt;{{ change.reason }}&lt;/p&gt;
+                       &lt;span class="change-approved"&gt;核准人：{{ change.approvedBy }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 } @empty {
+                   &lt;p class="empty-text"&gt;尚無職務異動紀錄&lt;/p&gt;
+                 }
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             }
+ 
+             &lt;!-- Documents Tab --&gt;
+             @if (activeTab() === 'documents') {
+               &lt;div class="document-grid"&gt;
+                 @for (doc of employee.documents; track doc.id) {
+                   &lt;div class="document-card" [attr.data-status]="doc.status"&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="doc-icon"&gt;
+                       @switch (doc.type) {
+                         @case ('contract') { &lt;i class="ri-file-text-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; }
+                         @case ('certificate') { &lt;i class="ri-award-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; }
+                         @case ('id') { &lt;i class="ri-user-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; }
+                         @case ('insurance') { &lt;i class="ri-shield-check-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; }
+                         @default { &lt;i class="ri-file-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; }
+                       }
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="doc-info"&gt;
+                       &lt;h5&gt;{{ doc.name }}&lt;/h5&gt;
+                       &lt;p class="doc-type"&gt;{{ getDocumentTypeLabel(doc.type) }}&lt;/p&gt;
+                       &lt;p class="doc-meta"&gt;
+                         版本 {{ doc.version }} · 上傳於 {{ formatDate(doc.uploadDate) }}
+                       &lt;/p&gt;
+                       @if (doc.expiryDate) {
+                         &lt;p class="doc-expiry" [class]="'expiry-' + doc.status"&gt;
+                           到期：{{ formatDate(doc.expiryDate) }}
+                         &lt;/p&gt;
+                       }
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="doc-status status-{{ doc.status }}"&gt;
+                       {{ getDocumentStatusLabel(doc.status) }}
+                     &lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 }
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;button type="button" class="btn-upload"&gt;
+                 &lt;i class="ri-upload-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt;
+                 上傳文件
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             }
+ 
+             &lt;!-- Performance Tab --&gt;
+             @if (activeTab() === 'performance') {
+               &lt;div class="performance-list"&gt;
+                 @for (perf of employee.performance; track perf.id) {
+                   &lt;div class="performance-card" [attr.data-grade]="perf.grade"&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="perf-header"&gt;
+                       &lt;div class="perf-period"&gt;{{ perf.period }}&lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;div class="perf-score"&gt;
+                         &lt;span class="score-value"&gt;{{ perf.overallScore }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                         &lt;span class="score-grade grade-{{ perf.grade }}"&gt;{{ perf.grade }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                     &lt;div class="goal-section"&gt;
+                       &lt;h5&gt;目標達成&lt;/h5&gt;
+                       @for (goal of perf.goals; track goal.name) {
+                         &lt;div class="goal-item"&gt;
+                           &lt;span class="goal-name"&gt;{{ goal.name }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                           &lt;div class="goal-bar"&gt;
+                             &lt;div class="goal-fill" [style.width.%]="goal.achievement"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+                           &lt;/div&gt;
+                           &lt;span class="goal-percent"&gt;{{ goal.achievement }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+                         &lt;/div&gt;
+                       }
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                     &lt;div class="feedback-row"&gt;
+                       &lt;div class="strengths"&gt;
+                         &lt;h6&gt;&lt;i class="ri-thumb-up-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; 優勢&lt;/h6&gt;
+                         &lt;ul&gt;
+                           @for (s of perf.strengths; track s) {
+                             &lt;li&gt;{{ s }}&lt;/li&gt;
+                           }
+                         &lt;/ul&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;div class="improvements"&gt;
+                         &lt;h6&gt;&lt;i class="ri-lightbulb-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; 待改善&lt;/h6&gt;
+                         &lt;ul&gt;
+                           @for (i of perf.improvements; track i) {
+                             &lt;li&gt;{{ i }}&lt;/li&gt;
+                           }
+                         &lt;/ul&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                     &lt;div class="perf-footer"&gt;
+                       &lt;span&gt;評核人：{{ perf.reviewedBy }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                       &lt;span&gt;{{ formatDate(perf.reviewDate) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 } @empty {
+                   &lt;p class="empty-text"&gt;尚無績效紀錄&lt;/p&gt;
+                 }
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             }
+ 
+             &lt;!-- ROI Tab --&gt;
+             @if (activeTab() === 'roi') {
+               &lt;div class="roi-dashboard"&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="roi-summary"&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="roi-card main"&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="roi-label"&gt;個人 ROI&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="roi-value-large" [class.positive]="employee.roi.roi &gt; 100"&gt;
+                       {{ employee.roi.roi }}%
+                     &lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="roi-trend trend-{{ employee.roi.trend }}"&gt;
+                       @if (employee.roi.trend === 'up') { &lt;i class="ri-arrow-up-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; 上升 }
+                       @if (employee.roi.trend === 'stable') { &lt;i class="ri-arrow-right-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; 穩定 }
+                       @if (employee.roi.trend === 'down') { &lt;i class="ri-arrow-down-line"&gt;&lt;/i&gt; 下降 }
+                     &lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                   &lt;div class="roi-card"&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="roi-label"&gt;總成本&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="roi-value"&gt;{{ formatCurrency(employee.roi.totalCost) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="cost-breakdown"&gt;
+                       &lt;span&gt;薪資：{{ formatCurrency(employee.roi.salaryCost) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                       &lt;span&gt;培訓：{{ formatCurrency(employee.roi.trainingCost) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                       &lt;span&gt;福利：{{ formatCurrency(employee.roi.benefitsCost) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                   &lt;div class="roi-card"&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="roi-label"&gt;貢獻價值&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="roi-value"&gt;{{ formatCurrency(employee.roi.projectValue) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="roi-note"&gt;專案產出價值&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                   &lt;div class="roi-card"&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="roi-label"&gt;生產力&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="roi-value"&gt;{{ employee.roi.productivity }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;span class="roi-note"&gt;相對於基準&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                 &lt;div class="roi-chart-section"&gt;
+                   &lt;h4&gt;ROI 趨勢比較&lt;/h4&gt;
+                   &lt;div #roiChart class="chart-container"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                 &lt;div class="comparison-section"&gt;
+                   &lt;h4&gt;比較分析&lt;/h4&gt;
+                   &lt;div class="comparison-bars"&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="comparison-item"&gt;
+                       &lt;span class="comp-label"&gt;個人&lt;/span&gt;
+                       &lt;div class="comp-bar-container"&gt;
+                         &lt;div class="comp-bar personal" [style.width.%]="employee.roi.roi / 3"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;span class="comp-value"&gt;{{ employee.roi.roi }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="comparison-item"&gt;
+                       &lt;span class="comp-label"&gt;部門平均&lt;/span&gt;
+                       &lt;div class="comp-bar-container"&gt;
+                         &lt;div class="comp-bar department" [style.width.%]="employee.roi.comparison.departmentAvg / 3"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;span class="comp-value"&gt;{{ employee.roi.comparison.departmentAvg }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;div class="comparison-item"&gt;
+                       &lt;span class="comp-label"&gt;公司平均&lt;/span&gt;
+                       &lt;div class="comp-bar-container"&gt;
+                         &lt;div class="comp-bar company" [style.width.%]="employee.roi.comparison.companyAvg / 3"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;span class="comp-value"&gt;{{ employee.roi.comparison.companyAvg }}%&lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             }
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     }
+   &lt;/div&gt;
+ &lt;/main&gt;
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
  }
  
- .placeholder-card {

+ // ===== KPI Section =====
+ .kpi-section {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ 
+   @media (max-width: $breakpoint-xl) {
+     grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
+   }
+ 
+   @media (max-width: $breakpoint-md) {
+     grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .kpi-card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .kpi-icon {
+   width: 48px;
+   height: 48px;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   background: rgba($color-l1-sage, 0.1);
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.5rem;
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.active {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-success; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.probation {
+     background: rgba($color-info, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-info; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.tenure {
+     background: rgba($color-l3-petrol, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-l3-petrol; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.warning {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     i { color: $color-warning; }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .kpi-content {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+ }
+ 
+ .kpi-value {
+   font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+   font-style: italic;
+   font-size: 1.75rem;
+   font-weight: 700;
+   color: $color-text-dark;
+ }
+ 
+ .kpi-label {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ // ===== Page Layout =====
+ .page-layout {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: 1fr 340px;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+ 
+   @media (max-width: $breakpoint-lg) {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .card {
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .card-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   padding: $spacing-md $spacing-lg;
+   border-bottom: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ .card-title {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   font-size: $font-size-base;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   margin: 0;
+ 
+   i {
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .card-body {
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ // ===== Filter Section =====
+ .filter-section {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .filter-row {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   @media (max-width: $breakpoint-md) {
+     flex-direction: column;
+     align-items: stretch;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .search-box {
+   flex: 1;
+   position: relative;
+ 
+   i {
+     position: absolute;
+     left: $spacing-md;
+     top: 50%;
+     transform: translateY(-50%);
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+   }
+ 
+   .search-input {
+     width: 100%;
+     padding: $spacing-sm $spacing-md $spacing-sm 40px;
+     border: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+     border-radius: $radius-md;
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     transition: border-color 0.2s ease;
+ 
+     &amp;:focus {
+       outline: none;
+       border-color: $color-l1-sage;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .filter-group {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .filter-select {
+   padding: $spacing-sm $spacing-md;

+   font-size: $font-size-sm;

+

+   thead {

+ .alert-item {

+ // ===== Detail Modal =====
+ .detail-overlay {

+   top: 0;

+

+   display: flex;

+ }
+ 
+ .modal-header {

+ }
+ 
+ .employee-profile {

+ }
+ 
+ .profile-avatar {
+   width: 56px;

+   border-radius: 50%;
+   background: linear-gradient(135deg, $color-l1-sage 0%, $color-l1-sage-dark 100%);
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   display: flex;

+ 
+ .profile-info {

+     color: $color-text-dark;

+

+ 
+ .employee-badge {

+   background: $color-cloud-gray;

+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .header-actions {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-action,
+ .btn-close {
+   width: 36px;
+   height: 36px;
+   border-radius: 50%;
+   border: none;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     background: $color-soft-gray;
+     color: $color-text-dark;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .modal-tabs {
+   display: flex;
+   border-bottom: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+   overflow-x: auto;
+ }
+ 
+ .tab-btn {
+   flex-shrink: 0;
+   padding: $spacing-md $spacing-lg;
+   border: none;
+   background: transparent;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 500;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+   position: relative;
+   white-space: nowrap;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.active {
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+ 
+     &amp;::after {
+       content: '';
+       position: absolute;
+       bottom: 0;
+       left: 0;
+       right: 0;
+       height: 2px;
+       background: $color-l1-sage;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .modal-content {
+   flex: 1;
+   overflow-y: auto;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ // Info Tab
+ .info-section {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-xl;
+ 
+   h4 {
+     font-size: $font-size-base;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-text-dark;
+     margin: 0 0 $spacing-md;
+     padding-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+     border-bottom: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .info-grid {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   @media (max-width: $breakpoint-md) {
+     grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .info-item {
+   label {
+     display: block;
+     font-size: $font-size-xs;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+     margin-bottom: 4px;
+   }
+ 
+   span {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     color: $color-text-dark;
+     font-weight: 500;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .education-item {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   padding: $spacing-sm;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .edu-degree {
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   background: $color-l1-sage;
+   color: $color-pure-white;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ }
+ 
+ .edu-school {
+   flex: 1;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+ }
+ 
+ .edu-year {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .skill-tags,
+ .cert-tags {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: $spacing-xs;
+   flex-wrap: wrap;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .skill-tag {
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .cert-tag {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: 4px;
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   background: rgba($color-l1-sage, 0.1);
+   color: $color-l1-sage;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // Audit Log
+ .audit-list {
+   max-height: 200px;
+   overflow-y: auto;
+ }
+ 
+ .audit-item {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   padding: $spacing-sm;
+   border-bottom: 1px solid $color-soft-gray;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .audit-action {
+   padding: 2px $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ 
+   &amp;.audit-create { background: rgba($color-success, 0.1); color: $color-success; }
+   &amp;.audit-update { background: rgba($color-info, 0.1); color: $color-info; }
+   &amp;.audit-delete { background: rgba($color-error, 0.1); color: $color-error; }
+   &amp;.audit-view { background: rgba($color-muted-gray, 0.1); color: $color-muted-gray; }
+   &amp;.audit-export { background: rgba($color-l3-petrol, 0.1); color: $color-l3-petrol; }
+ }
+ 
+ .audit-field {
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ }
+ 
+ .audit-by {
+   flex: 1;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .audit-time {
+   color: $color-muted-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ // History Tab
+ .history-timeline {
+   position: relative;
+   padding-left: $spacing-xl;
+ 
+   &amp;::before {
+     content: '';
+     position: absolute;
+     left: 8px;
+     top: 0;
+     bottom: 0;
+     width: 2px;
+     background: $color-soft-gray;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .timeline-item {
+   position: relative;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ 
+   &amp;[data-type="promotion"] {
+     .timeline-marker { background: $color-success; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-type="transfer"] {
+     .timeline-marker { background: $color-info; }
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-type="salary-adjustment"] {
+     .timeline-marker { background: $color-l3-petrol; }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .timeline-marker {
+   position: absolute;
+   left: -24px;
+   top: 4px;
+   width: 12px;
+   height: 12px;
+   border-radius: 50%;
+   background: $color-l1-sage;
+   border: 2px solid $color-pure-white;
+   box-shadow: $shadow-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .timeline-content {
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .timeline-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
    margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
  }
  
- p {
+ .change-type {
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   background: rgba($color-l1-sage, 0.1);
+   color: $color-l1-sage;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ }
+ 
+ .change-date {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .change-detail {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ 
+   p {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+     margin: 0 0 4px;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .level-change {
+   color: $color-l1-sage !important;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ }
+ 
+ .salary-change {
+   color: $color-l3-petrol !important;
+ 
+   &amp;.positive {
+     color: $color-success !important;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .change-reason {
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   margin: 0 0 $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .change-approved {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-muted-gray;
+ }
+ 
+ // Documents Tab
+ .document-grid {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ 
+   @media (max-width: $breakpoint-md) {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .document-card {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: flex-start;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   border-left: 4px solid $color-l1-sage;
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="expiring"] {
+     border-left-color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;[data-status="expired"] {
+     border-left-color: $color-error;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-icon {
+   width: 40px;
+   height: 40px;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   background: $color-pure-white;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   flex-shrink: 0;
+ 
+   i {
+     font-size: 1.25rem;
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-info {
+   flex: 1;
+   min-width: 0;
+ 
+   h5 {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-text-dark;
+     margin: 0 0 4px;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-type {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
    color: $color-text-secondary;
+   margin: 0 0 4px;
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-meta {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-muted-gray;
    margin: 0;
  }
  
+ .doc-expiry {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   margin: 4px 0 0;
+ 
+   &amp;.expiry-valid { color: $color-success; }
+   &amp;.expiry-expiring { color: $color-warning; }
+   &amp;.expiry-expired { color: $color-error; }
+ }
+ 
+ .doc-status {
+   padding: 2px $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: 10px;
+   font-weight: 500;
+ 
+   &amp;.status-valid {
+     background: rgba($color-success, 0.1);
+     color: $color-success;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.status-expiring {
+     background: rgba($color-warning, 0.1);
+     color: $color-warning;
+   }
+ 
+   &amp;.status-expired {
+     background: rgba($color-error, 0.1);
+     color: $color-error;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-upload {
+   width: 100%;
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   padding: $spacing-md;
+   border: 1px dashed $color-soft-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-md;
+   background: transparent;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: all 0.2s ease;
+ 
+   &amp;:hover {
+     border-color: $color-l1-sage;
+     color: $color-l1-sage;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // Performance Tab
+ .performance-list {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .performance-card {
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+ 
+   &amp;[data-grade="A"] { border-top: 4px solid $color-success; }
+   &amp;[data-grade="B"] { border-top: 4px solid $color-l3-petrol; }
+   &amp;[data-grade="C"] { border-top: 4px solid $color-info; }
+   &amp;[data-grade="D"] { border-top: 4px solid $color-warning; }
+   &amp;[data-grade="E"] { border-top: 4px solid $color-error; }
+ }
+ 
+ .perf-header {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .perf-period {
+   font-size: $font-size-lg;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-dark;
+ }
+ 
+ .perf-score {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: baseline;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .score-value {
+   font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+   font-style: italic;
+   font-size: 2rem;
+   font-weight: 700;
+   color: $color-text-dark;
+ }
+ 
+ .score-grade {
+   padding: 4px $spacing-sm;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 600;
+ 
+   &amp;.grade-A { background: $color-success; color: $color-pure-white; }
+   &amp;.grade-B { background: $color-l3-petrol; color: $color-pure-white; }
+   &amp;.grade-C { background: $color-info; color: $color-pure-white; }
+   &amp;.grade-D { background: $color-warning; color: $color-pure-white; }
+   &amp;.grade-E { background: $color-error; color: $color-pure-white; }
+ }
+ 
+ .goal-section {
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-lg;
+ 
+   h5 {
+     font-size: $font-size-sm;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-text-primary;
+     margin: 0 0 $spacing-sm;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .goal-item {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-sm;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .goal-name {
+   width: 120px;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .goal-bar {
+   flex: 1;
+   height: 8px;
+   background: rgba($color-l1-sage, 0.1);
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ }
+ 
+ .goal-fill {
+   height: 100%;
+   background: $color-l1-sage;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+ }
+ 
+ .goal-percent {
+   width: 40px;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   text-align: right;
+ }
+ 
+ .feedback-row {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   @media (max-width: $breakpoint-md) {
+     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .strengths,
+ .improvements {
+   h6 {
+     display: flex;
+     align-items: center;
+     gap: 4px;
+     font-size: $font-size-xs;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+     margin: 0 0 $spacing-sm;
+   }
+ 
+   ul {
+     margin: 0;
+     padding-left: $spacing-lg;
+ 
+     li {
+       font-size: $font-size-sm;
+       color: $color-text-primary;
+       margin-bottom: 4px;
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .strengths h6 i { color: $color-success; }
+ .improvements h6 i { color: $color-warning; }
+ 
+ .perf-footer {
+   display: flex;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   padding-top: $spacing-md;
+   border-top: 1px solid rgba($color-pure-white, 0.5);
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ // ROI Tab
+ .roi-dashboard {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .roi-summary {
+   display: grid;
+   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ 
+   @media (max-width: $breakpoint-md) {
+     grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .roi-card {
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+   padding: $spacing-lg;
+ 
+   &amp;.main {
+     background: linear-gradient(135deg, $color-l1-sage 0%, $color-l1-sage-dark 100%);
+ 
+     .roi-label,
+     .roi-value-large,
+     .roi-trend { color: $color-pure-white; }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .roi-label {
+   display: block;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-sm;
+ }
+ 
+ .roi-value-large {
+   display: block;
+   font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+   font-style: italic;
+   font-size: 2rem;
+   font-weight: 700;
+   color: $color-text-dark;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-xs;
+ 
+   &amp;.positive { color: $color-success; }
+ }
+ 
+ .roi-trend {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: 4px;
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+ 
+   &amp;.trend-up { color: $color-success; }
+   &amp;.trend-stable { color: $color-info; }
+   &amp;.trend-down { color: $color-error; }
+ }
+ 
+ .roi-value {
+   display: block;
+   font-size: $font-size-lg;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-dark;
+   margin-bottom: $spacing-xs;
+ }
+ 
+ .cost-breakdown {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: 2px;
+ 
+   span {
+     font-size: $font-size-xs;
+     color: $color-text-secondary;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .roi-note {
+   font-size: $font-size-xs;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .roi-chart-section {
+   h4 {
+     font-size: $font-size-base;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-text-dark;
+     margin: 0 0 $spacing-md;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .chart-container {
+   height: 250px;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-lg;
+ }
+ 
+ .comparison-section {
+   h4 {
+     font-size: $font-size-base;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     color: $color-text-dark;
+     margin: 0 0 $spacing-md;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ .comparison-bars {
+   display: flex;
+   flex-direction: column;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .comparison-item {
+   display: flex;
+   align-items: center;
+   gap: $spacing-md;
+ }
+ 
+ .comp-label {
+   width: 80px;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   color: $color-text-secondary;
+ }
+ 
+ .comp-bar-container {
+   flex: 1;
+   height: 12px;
+   background: $color-cloud-gray;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+   overflow: hidden;
+ }
+ 
+ .comp-bar {
+   height: 100%;
+   border-radius: $radius-full;
+ 
+   &amp;.personal { background: $color-l1-sage; }
+   &amp;.department { background: $color-l3-petrol; }
+   &amp;.company { background: $color-l4-mauve; }
+ }
+ 
+ .comp-value {
+   width: 50px;
+   font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
+   font-style: italic;
+   font-size: $font-size-sm;
+   font-weight: 600;
+   color: $color-text-primary;
+   text-align: right;
+ }
  
```

</details>

</tool-use>

已完成 V7 規劃文件中 **1.2 人才庫與再接觸管理** 及 **1.3 員工檔案與歷程管理** 的功能頁面開發！

## ✅ 開發摘要

### 1.2 人才庫與再接觸管理 (`/employee/talent-pool`)

| 功能 | 說明 |
|------|------|
| **KPI 總覽** | 人才總數、待聯繫、本月已聯繫、平均媒合度、待處理提醒 |
| **候選人列表** | 卡片式呈現，顯示媒合分數、狀態、標籤、聯繫優先級 |
| **標籤化分類** | 技能、經驗、學歷、人格特質、自訂標籤篩選 |
| **智慧媒合引擎** | AI 媒合分數顯示、職缺媒合結果（符合條件/待補強） |
| **再接觸提醒** | 待處理提醒列表，按類型分類（聯繫/追蹤/面試/Offer） |
| **聯繫紀錄** | 完整聯繫歷程，包含方式、摘要、結果、下一步行動 |
| **來源分布** | 104/LinkedIn/內部推薦/官網/獵頭來源統計 |

### 1.3 員工檔案與歷程管理 (`/employee/profile`)

| 功能 | 說明 |
|------|------|
| **KPI 總覽** | 員工總數、在職、試用期、平均年資、到期文件 |
| **員工列表** | 表格式呈現，支援部門/狀態篩選、批次匯出 |
| **基本資料** | 個人資訊、學歷、技能證照、緊急聯絡人 |
| **職務異動** | 時間軸呈現晉升/調動/薪資調整歷程 |
| **文件管理** | 契約/證照/保險文件，版本控制、到期提醒 |
| **績效紀錄** | 歷年績效評核、目標達成率、優勢/待改善分析 |
| **員工 ROI 儀表板** | 成本/貢獻計算、趨勢圖表、部門/公司平均比較 |
| **稽核記錄** | 操作日誌（新增/更新/查看/匯出） |

### 建立的檔案

```
src/app/features/employee/
├── models/
│   └── talent-pool.model.ts     # 人才庫 + 員工檔案資料模型 (20+ 介面)
├── services/
│   ├── talent-pool.service.ts   # 人才庫 API 服務
│   └── employee.service.ts      # 員工檔案 API 服務
└── pages/
    ├── talent-pool-page/        # 人才庫管理頁面 (完整功能)
    │   ├── *.component.ts
    │   ├── *.component.html
    │   └── *.component.scss
    └── profile-page/            # 員工檔案管理頁面 (完整功能)
        ├── *.component.ts
        ├── *.component.html
        └── *.component.scss
```

所有頁面均採用：
- ✅ Standalone Components + Signals
- ✅ OnPush 變更偵測
- ✅ ECharts 圖表視覺化
- ✅ 響應式設計 (RWD)
- ✅ L1 鼠尾草綠配色系統
- ✅ Bento UI / 卡片式佈局

```diff
-       hiredThisYear: 2,
-       avgMatchScore: Math.round(this.mockCandidates.reduce((sum, c) =&gt; sum + c.matchScore, 0) / this.mockCandidates.length),
-       sourceBreakdown: [

-         { source: 'linkedin' as const, count: 1, percentage: 17 },
-         { source: 'referral' as const, count: 1, percentage: 17 },
-         { source: 'website' as const, count: 1, percentage: 17 },
-         { source: 'headhunter' as const, count: 1, percentage: 16 }

-       statusBreakdown: [
-         { status: 'active' as const, count: 2 },
-         { status: 'contacted' as const, count: 2 },
-         { status: 'scheduled' as const, count: 1 },
-         { status: 'declined' as const, count: 1 }
-       ],
-       upcomingReminders: this.mockReminders.filter(r =&gt; !r.isCompleted).length
-     };
-     return of(stats).pipe(delay(300));
-   }
- 
-   getCandidates(): Observable&lt;TalentCandidate[]&gt; {
-     return of(this.mockCandidates).pipe(delay(300));
-   }
- 
-   getCandidateById(id: string): Observable&lt;TalentCandidate | undefined&gt; {
-     return of(this.mockCandidates.find(c =&gt; c.id === id)).pipe(delay(200));
-   }
- 
-   getContactHistory(candidateId: string): Observable&lt;TalentContactHistory[]&gt; {
-     return of(this.mockContactHistory.filter(h =&gt; h.candidateId === candidateId)).pipe(delay(200));
-   }
- 
-   getReminders(): Observable&lt;TalentReminder[]&gt; {
-     return of(this.mockReminders.sort((a, b) =&gt; a.reminderDate.getTime() - b.reminderDate.getTime())).pipe(delay(300));
-   }
- 
-   getTags(): Observable&lt;TalentTag[]&gt; {

+   // ===== API Methods =====
+ 
+   getTalentPoolStats(): Observable&lt;TalentPoolStats&gt; {
+     const stats: TalentPoolStats = {
+       totalCandidates: this.mockCandidates.length,
+       activeCount: this.mockCandidates.filter(c =&gt; c.status === 'active').length,
+       contactedThisMonth: this.mockCandidates.filter(c =&gt; c.status === 'contacted').length,
+       hiredThisYear: 2,
+       avgMatchScore: Math.round(this.mockCandidates.reduce((sum, c) =&gt; sum + c.matchScore, 0) / this.mockCandidates.length),
+       sourceBreakdown: [
+         { source: '104' as const, count: 2, percentage: 33 },
+         { source: 'linkedin' as const, count: 1, percentage: 17 },
+         { source: 'referral' as const, count: 1, percentage: 17 },
+         { source: 'website' as const, count: 1, percentage: 17 },
+         { source: 'headhunter' as const, count: 1, percentage: 16 }
+       ],
+       statusBreakdown: [
+         { status: 'active' as const, count: 2 },
+         { status: 'contacted' as const, count: 2 },
+         { status: 'scheduled' as const, count: 1 },
+         { status: 'declined' as const, count: 1 }
+       ],
+       upcomingReminders: this.mockReminders.filter(r =&gt; !r.isCompleted).length
+     };
+     return of(stats).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   getCandidates(): Observable&lt;TalentCandidate[]&gt; {
+     return of(this.mockCandidates).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   getCandidateById(id: string): Observable&lt;TalentCandidate | undefined&gt; {
+     return of(this.mockCandidates.find(c =&gt; c.id === id)).pipe(delay(200));
+   }
+ 
+   getContactHistory(candidateId: string): Observable&lt;TalentContactHistory[]&gt; {
+     return of(this.mockContactHistory.filter(h =&gt; h.candidateId === candidateId)).pipe(delay(200));
+   }
+ 
+   getReminders(): Observable&lt;TalentReminder[]&gt; {
+     return of(this.mockReminders.sort((a, b) =&gt; a.reminderDate.getTime() - b.reminderDate.getTime())).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   getTags(): Observable&lt;TalentTag[]&gt; {
+     return of(this.mockTags).pipe(delay(200));
+   }
+ 
+   getMatchResults(candidateId: string): Observable&lt;TalentMatchResult[]&gt; {
+     const mockResults: TalentMatchResult[] = [
+       {
+         candidateId, jobId: '1', jobTitle: '資深前端工程師',
+         matchScore: 92, matchReasons: ['Angular 專長符合', '5年以上經驗', '薪資範圍符合'],

+       },

+         candidateId, jobId: '2', jobTitle: '全端工程師',
+         matchScore: 78, matchReasons: ['前端技術符合', '有團隊合作經驗'],
+         gaps: ['後端經驗較少', '需學習 Node.js'], recommendation: 'recommended' as const
+       }
+     ];
+     return of(mockResults).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   // Actions
+   addContact(candidateId: string, contact: Partial&lt;TalentContactHistory&gt;): Observable&lt;boolean&gt; {
+     return of(true).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   updateCandidateStatus(candidateId: string, status: TalentCandidate['status']): Observable&lt;boolean&gt; {
+     return of(true).pipe(delay(300));
+   }
+ 
+   completeReminder(reminderId: string): Observable&lt;boolean&gt; {
+     return of(true).pipe(delay(200));
+   }
+ }
+ 
+
```
